1.1: Gopti shilǝn ki Yesu almasihu, yakǝn ki Lya kǝnngu.
1.2: Kan u nǝɗa ki laci ge' lwatbati ki Ishaya mulnjeshinkǝn u, ti ussu, “In ngu an shin mulshinkǝn i ni tǝnnda kina, mulnǝ ti likǝni ki shitu u.
1.3: Yal mul tati bi age' dǝlgǝn ti ussu, likǝni Lya shitu nǝ mbatldlwakǝn, likǝnǝ shituwasi.”
1.4: Yahaya mul baptisma mbi gawasi ge' dǝlgǝn, ti dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya, “Tǝ mbalǝn za pǝl bezǝn lǝɓa a pǝlsi baptisma tingaki tǝ pacisi bezǝn lǝɓa wasǝn ɗa.”
1.5: Mbalǝn ki galt ki Yahudiya nǝ kum mbalǝn ki Ulushalima is go' mbǝ' mati, a si dlǝp bezan lǝɓa u nǝs pǝli u, i pǝlsi baptisma a dlilka ki Uldun.
1.6: Yahaya ti nǝ ulki laki a dli ki medlǝn ki Lakumi, nǝ ulkǝndǝdlom ki bati amisi, ulki ɗami wasi zhita nǝ mal du.
1.7: Ati dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya, i' usu, “Mulǝn ɗǝ mbǝti ge kalini mul nalti ngǝdlǝni, zhim kaptalan wasi ambǝci ta ngusi a ɓatli wai.
1.8: A miɓo ge mal kǝn ami pǝlikin baptisma, tiɓo nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ki zeki ti pǝlikini.” A pǝli Yesu Baptisma
1.9: Nǝgu dǝmi Yesu i' mbǝ te' Nazillat ge atl ki Galili, i Yahaya pǝli' baptisma a dlilka ki Uldun.
1.10: Ɗǝ petuwasi to' ge mali i' en lya abuli, i Yal ki mbatl ki Lya pesul lya kǝnǝ kulu.
1.11: I kum yalon sul lya ɗǝ ussu, “Kiki yakuyini gunǝ ami lyamti, nǝti ami holtugi iye.” Shedan Cibǝl Yesu
1.12: Alǝbi alǝbi i Yalkimbatl ki Lya dloti i' te' ge' dǝlgǝn,
1.13: A tiki dǝmi, mutti kutl kutl lǝbi upsi, a Shedan ɗǝ cibǝlti, atine' tlu kige' dǝlgǝn a mi' shinkǝnki Lya ɗǝ pǝlliti kyautǝn. Yesu Gop Kyautǝn Wasi a Galili
1.14: Kalki dlǝl Yahaya, I Yesu te ge' atli ki Galili, ati dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya.
1.15: Ati ussu “Cini apoyi gunki Lya ɓalnja i. Zakǝn pǝtl byazǝn lǝɓa ndǝnǝ nǝ shilǝn ki Lya.” Yesu Taki Mi' Lati Lekku Bi Gudul Upsi
1.16: Ati ɓeuti abi dlilka ki Galili, i' en ki Bitlus nǝ Andalawus yelse wasi, asi lati lekku a dlilka tǝngaki si mi' gopti Kes kǝnǝ.
1.17: I Yesu ulsisu “bǝlǝnnǝn kali, an palkini adǝmni mi' ngau mbalǝn.”
1.18: Alǝbi alǝbi is za lati lekku wasǝn is bǝlti kali.
1.19: Nǝs ɓeu kina ten i' en Yakubu nǝ yelse wasi Yahaya, mil ki Zabadi, a ge Kudǝlǝn ki mali asi likǝ' lekku.
1.20: Nǝ' takisi bi'u Alǝbi alǝbi is bǝlti kali. Is za bwaswasǝn Zabadi age Kudǝlǝn ne' mil pǝliti kyautǝn. Mul Du Mi'gadli
1.21: Is tege gatl ki Kapalnahum cin shuti, i' Yesu tege lu dopga ki Yahudawa ati kulcisi shǝlǝn ki Lya ɗaɗanu.
1.22: Is en ulki gagashinti tǝn ulnǝ ti kulcissi u, tǝn gaki ti kulcissi kǝnǝ gunǝ ti kumti nǝ ndǝlton u, bǝ kǝnǝ mi' lashti zhil ki Musa wai.
1.23: Mulǝn ɗa, mul du mi'gatli a ge'lu dopga wasǝn, i' la yali,
1.24: I' usu, “Yalamineki Yesu yakǝn nazalet? Ki mbǝni ki hwotimi bezǝn lǝɓa ya? A manini ki wokǝni, ki yakǝn ki Lya mul zo'mbadl kǝni!”
1.25: I Yesu mati mi'gatli ki geti, i' usu, “Dǝm shot! Pe' ɗǝ ge mulu!”
1.26: I ki i bezǝn mi'gatli i' u mulisi. I' la yali, i' petaka geti.
1.27: Kum mbalǝn en ulki gagashinti, is go' gyep yelsǝni, a si u'su, “Yakǝn nǝgu u? A sǝti pyal kushti won ngǝ! Mulu tinǝ ndǝtl ki pi' du mi'gatliyi shilǝn, a si kup shilǝn wasi!”
1.28: Alǝbi alǝbi shilǝnni zǝga ko una ge' atl ki Galili. Yesu Ndokǝl Kom Ki Bitlus
1.29: Nǝ petwasǝn ge' lu dopga ki Yahudawa, ki Yakubu nǝ Yahaya is te libi ki Bitlus nǝ Andalawus.
1.30: Kom ki Bitlus ki muɗi atli ti gonti, nǝ te ki Yesu, is piti.
1.31: I' lǝ mati, i' gopi' toh i' tliltilya, i' ndoki, i' hilya ma i' pǝlisi kyautǝn. Yesu Ndokǝl Mbalǝn Diɓǝli a Suti
1.32: A suti, kalki ki nda ki cin, is mbǝlli Yesu mi' gonti, nǝ mil mi'gatli.
1.33: I mbalǝn ki ge' gatli kup si domga a kina dlabi.
1.34: I' ndokǝl mbalǝn diɓǝli, ko wongi nǝ unndi gontuwasi, iki pe'kǝl mil mi'gatli diɓǝlli. Ta ndǝgi tǝ mi'gatli shilǝn wai, tǝn gaki simanǝnti. Yesu Zǝga ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya
1.35: Nǝ kyau, balu a pa' ciltuwai, I Yesu hilya i' peki, i' zǝga gelu u nǝ bǝ mbalǝn ɗawai u, i' zǝga ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya tyaka
1.36: I Siman nǝ mbalǝn u nǝ tinesi u is zǝga ɗǝ ngauti.
1.37: Nǝs mbitu, is ultisu, “kup mbalǝn ɗǝ ngauki.”
1.38: I Yesu ulsisu, “Mǝlǝn ge' gatlu gunǝ kina u, ta dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya ɗa ɗanu. Ulnǝ laki yambǝɗa ungu.”
1.39: I kup ti tya'tya ge' atl ki Galili a ti dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya a ge' lu dopga ki Yahudawa, a ti pyakǝli' mbalǝn mi'gatli. Yesu Ndokǝl Mul Go' Ki Dakǝlti
1.40: Mul go' ki dakǝlti i'mbǝ ma Yesu, i' ngusiti i'ngemti, a ti ussu, “Inka ndǝgu, kin ma'paltǝn mul lǝshi ɗa'ti.
1.41: I ci' gontuwasi gop Yesu, i' ta toh wasi i' tǝnti, i' ultisu, a ndǝgi, a ndokǝlki, dǝmi mul lǝshi ɗati!”
1.42: Alǝbi alǝbi i dakǝltisi zati, i' dǝm mul lǝshi ɗati.
1.43: I ki i Yesu pi' shilǝn mul ndǝlti, nǝ tǝs zǝga u.
1.44: I' ultisu, “Bǝ pi mullǝn wai. Mǝllǝ le' en lǝɓa, a bǝl Lya ulki okǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa kanwunǝ Musa dlǝmi u tǝn gaki wokǝlti. Pǝli nǝgu tǝngaki tǝ mbalǝn mani ɗa ka ndoki.”
1.45: Ge' shuki nǝgu, i muli peki i go' dlǝp shilǝnni tyai. I gu la Yesu ta man te' ge gatlon a dwaɗǝn ɗǝ ye' dwaɗǝnwai, i' go' dǝp gelu u nǝ mbalǝn ɗa wai u. Ngo nǝ nǝgu, mbalǝn go' mbǝ mati, te' ge lu en.

2.1: Kal ki mutti ten, nǝ palte' Kapalnahum, is kummi ti a libi.
2.2: I' mbalǝn dom ga diɓǝlli, lu zǝ' a sǝn ma ɗawai, abi dlabi ma. A Yesu ɗǝ pi'si shilǝn ki Lya.
2.3: Mbalǝn upsi is mbǝ, is kam Mulǝn tyai ki tle ki mi'gatli.
2.4: Saman tǝla'ti ma Yesu wai tǝngaki diɓǝtl ki mbalǝn, is mbulǝn gabini tu' malu u nǝ Yesu ɗa u nǝs mbul gabini u, is shim muli suɗi, nǝ lu muttuwasi.
2.5: Nǝ Yesu en lati mbatluwasǝn u i' ulmul ki tle ki mi'gatlisu, “Yakuyini a paci bazǝn lǝɓa wagi.”
2.6: Mbalǝn mi' lashti zhil ki Musa siki dǝmi a lǝbi, a si shilǝn a mbadli,
2.7: A si ussu, “Ya lakiɗa mulu ɗǝ shilǝn nǝgu? Pǝli' Lya bezǝn lǝɓa ti ɗa! Wokǝn ma' wokǝli yakǝn mbalǝn bezǝn lǝɓa wasi ǝnbǝ Lya kǝn nǝmmwai u?”
2.8: Alǝbi alǝbi i Yesu man ulnǝ si dlǝmti a mbadlu, i Yesu ulsisu, “Yakǝn laki ɗa ki unndi shilǝn u a mbadlwakǝn?
2.9: Gukǝn ngǝtli nǝ mbǝlǝ, ti ulmul ki tle usu, ‘A wokǝli bezǝn lǝɓa wagi’ nǝ ta usu, ‘Hilya kam lumuttwagi ki zǝgaya?’
2.10: Ami lyamti ki manini Yakǝn mbalǝn ti nǝ ndǝtl ki wokǝl bezǝn lǝɓa a dǝplaɓa.” I' ul mul ki tle ki mi'gatli su
2.11: “A ulkisu, hilya kam lumuttuwagi ki zǝga libi.”
2.12: I Alǝbi alǝbi tǝ hilya, i' kam lumuttuwa si, i' peki a kum mbalǝn ɗǝ yetti, a si kup gagashinti, a si natl Lya asi ussu, “Ma en ulǝn nǝgu gason wai.” Taki' Lawi bi
2.13: Yesu peki i' lǝ bi Dlǝlka ki Galili ɗa ɗanu, Mbalǝn diɓǝli is domga a malgǝn wasi, ati kulcisi.
2.14: A ti beuti, i' en Lawi yakǝn ki Halpa ki dǝmi ati kyautǝn ki ka' upki ban. I Yesu ultisu, “Bǝlǝn kali.” I' hilya i' bǝlti kali.
2.15: Gason Yesu ɗǝ ɗap ulki ɗami a libi ki Lawi, mul ka' upki ban ne mi'bezǝn lǝɓa nǝ mbalǝn diɓǝli si ɗamti ne'ti ne mil kushti wasi, tǝn gaki mil diɓǝlti gesi mi' bǝtlti ni;
2.16: Nǝ mi' lashti zhil ki Musa si palisiyawani is enti ɗǝ ɗamti nesi, nǝ mi'bezǝn lǝɓa nǝ mi' ka' upki ban u, is ul mi' kushti wasisu, “Ya laki ti ɗamti nǝ tleti ne' mi' kap upki ban nǝ mi'bezǝn lǝɓa ɗa?”
2.17: Nǝ Yesu kumi nǝgu u, i' ulsisu, “Mi' ginǝ bǝ ɗa gontwai u sikǝn lǝ' mamul pǝtl igǝn wai, mi' gonti si ɗǝ ngau mul igǝn. Tǝn gaki mi' pǝtl ze kautǝnkǝn a mbǝɗawai, tǝn gagi mi' bezǝn lǝɓa ni.” Gyemti a Tǝn pǝtl Kuzǝn Mali
2.18: Mi' kushti ki Yahaya mul baptisma nǝ ki palisiyawa si pǝtl kuzǝn mali. Mbalǝn en ngem Yesu is usu, “Yalaki ɗa mi' kushti ki Yahaya nǝ ki palisiyawa si kuzǝn mali gwaɓo si ɗa pǝtl ti wai?”
2.19: I Yesu ulsisu, “Yelǝnsi ki mul kutleti sǝn pǝtl kuzǝn mali a mul kutleti nesiya? Tunnǝ mul kutleti nesi u sǝkǝn pǝtl kuzǝn malilwai,
2.20: Cin ɗǝ mbǝti sinkap mul kutletiyi taka ɗǝ masi. Cinisini sǝn pǝtl kuzǝn mali.
2.21: Kǝn ca'ti mbulǝn gǝsi nǝ pyal lulutwai. In a caki nǝ nali u, pyal luluti nǝn kyeshti gus lulutisi, nǝn ngǝtlti ki kal nǝ kyeshti.
2.22: Kǝn bǝna pyal mal ki mil pǝ' ki annabi ge gus kal ki bati wai. Mun nǝ a bine u, mali si nǝn tatlti kal ki bati si, a hol kal nǝ mal innabi isi. Pyal mal ki mil pǝ' ki innabi, sai nǝ pyal kal ki bati.” Mi' Kushti Ki Yesu Go' Cotlti Alkama Cin shuti
2.23: Gason cin shuti, Yesu ne mil kustiwasi si ɓeuti ge' gu ki alkama. Sige ɓeuti i mil kusti ki Yesu is go' catl ga alkama en.
2.24: I palisiyawa ultisu, “En ulnǝ mil kushtiwa ɗǝ pǝlti u. Ya laki ɗa si pǝtl ulnǝ zhil ki Musa a ndigi ti pǝlti cin ki shutwai u?”
2.25: I Yesu njesi shilǝn nisi i' ulsisu, ka kummǝn shilǝn ki ulnǝ Dawuda pǝli u waiya, cin u nǝ kuzǝn gopti, ti ne' yelǝnsi lǝtwaswaiya?
2.26: Hwon u nǝ Abiyatal tiki bal lǝɓa, Dauda tege' Libi ki Lya, i' ɗam biledi gunǝ zǝdli u iki bǝl yalǝnsiwasi ginǝ ne'tu, ki ɗami ki lǝɓasi ni nǝgwasǝn mulǝn kǝn ɗamtwai.
2.27: I Yesu ulsisu, “Pǝlǝn cin shuti tǝngaki mbalǝn, ba pǝlǝn mbalǝn gaki cin shutuwai.
2.28: Yakǝn mbalǝn kǝnki mulban ki shuti nǝ ki cin shuti.”

3.1: I Yesu te ge' lu dopga ki Yahudawa, mulǝn ɗa alǝbi mul toh kitle ki mi'gadli.
3.2: Tǝn gaki sǝmbi shitu ki gopti Yesu ɗa. I mbalǝn yen zid dwaɗǝn, tǝn ndokǝl mulisi cin shutwa?
3.3: I Yesu ulmul toh ki tle yisu, “Pete' ki akina.”
3.4: I Yesu ulsisu, “Ambuni tǝ pǝl ze' lǝɓa ko bezǝn lǝɓa cin shuta? Ti pekǝl mul mǝshti, ko ti tlota?” Is dǝm shot.
3.5: Nǝ' yasi nǝ mbadli ki lewi u, ati du mbadli nǝ ɗashti ki mbadlwasǝn, i' ul mulisisu, “Ta' toh wa'teɗi.” Ittakit tye, i toh was pal lǝbi.
3.6: Nǝ palisiwa yani nǝgu u is peki, Alǝbi alǝbi is dlil shilǝn nǝ mbalǝn ki Hilidus a tǝnti, kau u nǝ si' tlotu. Mbalǝn Dom ga Diɓǝli Abi dlǝlka
3.7: I Yesu hilya ne' mil kushtiwasi, is za'gatli is lǝ tya bi dlǝlka ki Galili. Mbalǝn mi' diɓǝlti iye ki Galili is bǝlti kali.
3.8: Nǝs kum ulnǝ ti pǝlti u, mbalǝn is mbǝ te' Yahudiya nǝ Ulushalima, nǝ atl ki Edom, nǝ te' bǝ gasi ki dlǝlka ki Uldum, nǝ te'ge luki Taya nǝ Sidom, bal dopga mbǝ mati, tǝn gaki si' kum ulnǝ ti pǝlti u.
3.9: Tǝn kitǝlli' ɓa mbalǝn diɓǝli gyemti, i ul mil kushtiwassu shakǝli nǝn kudǝlǝn ki mali nǝm teɗi.
3.10: Ti' pǝlin nǝgu u tǝn gaki ta ndokǝl mbalǝn diɓǝlli, i laki ɗa kum mbalǝn mi' gonti si shimga te' mati tǝn gaki si' tǝnti.
3.11: Du mi'gatli, ko anǝmi si enti, as nda kinawasi asi lati yali, asi ussu, “Ki yakǝn ki Lya kǝnǝ.”
3.12: I' dlǝmisi bǝs pi mbalǝn okǝnki ti wai. Yesu zabǝl mbalǝn kutl nǝ Lop
3.13: I' Yesu totǝn zǝnga, i' taki ginǝ ti lyap siyi bi, is lǝ mati.
3.14: A gesi is zabǝl mbalǝn kutl nǝ lop si' dǝm neti, tǝn gaki ti'go' shi'si asi dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya,
3.15: I' bǝlsi dǝlti ki pekǝl du mi'gatli.
3.17: Nǝ Yakubu yakǝn ki Zabadi, Nǝ yalkewasi Yahaya, i' bǝlsi shin Buwanaljis' mil ki ndaltannaca.
3.18: Iki ɗaɗanu i' zabǝl Andalawus, nǝ Pilibus nǝ Baltamawas, nǝ Matiyu, nǝ Toma, nǝ Yakubu yakǝn ki Halpa, nǝ Taddawus, nǝ Saminu Bakan'ane,
3.19: Nǝ Yahuza Iskaliyoti gunǝ bǝl Yesu. Yesu nǝ Ba'alzabul
3.20: I Yesu te' libi won, iki i mbalǝn dopga ɗaɗanu hal saman ɗap ulki ɗami wai ti ne' mil kushtiwasi.
3.21: Nǝ yelsǝnǝ wasi kumi nǝ gu u, iki is lǝ ɗǝ goptiti, tǝn gaki si usu, “Ga agǝliti.”
3.22: Mi' kushti zhil ki Musa gǝnǝ pete' Ulushalima is usu, “Ba'alzabul kǝn totǝnti! Nǝ ndǝtl ki guu mi'gatlkǝn ti pekǝtl mi'gatli.”
3.23: I Yesu takisibi, i' cimbǝlisi i' usu, “A u kǝn ti Shaɗan man pekǝtl Shaɗan?
3.24: In gu' a bwasi a tǝn nge yelsǝni u, guntu kǝn lǝ' kinawai.
3.25: Nǝgu in libi a bwasi a tǝn nge' yelsǝni u, libi u kǝn lǝ' kinawai.
3.26: In shaiɗan a dlani ga wasu, a bwasi, kǝn lǝ'kinawai, patwas kǝnmbǝ.
3.27: Mul ma' te' ge libi ki mul ndǝlti a' em galwasi ɗawai. In ba' kǝndi mul ndǝlti wai u, iki annda yep gal ki libini.
3.28: Bali ami pi'kini nǝn paci ko mulu kǝn bezǝn lǝɓawasi, nǝ bezǝn shilǝn u nǝ' tǝpǝli u.
3.29: Gunǝ a pǝli Yalkimbatl ki Lya ki gunti bezǝn lǝɓa u, kǝn paci tiwai, nǝ ngatlti ki dǝp lǝɓa.”
3.30: Gi ɓo si usu, “Du mi'gatli ni'ɗa.” Dya ki Yesu ne' Yelsǝniwasi
3.31: Iki dya ki Yesu ne' yelsǝniwasi is mbǝ. Is dlil a dla, is ta' shinkǝn timmbǝ.
3.32: Dop ga ki mbalǝn ki dǝmi a malgǝn wasi, is ultisu, “Dya wa' kǝngu nǝ yelsǝni wagi si kauki a dla.”
3.33: I' gyemsi, “ki wokǝn ki dya ini nǝ yelsǝni ini?”
3.34: I' ya ginǝ a malgǝn wasi, i' usu, “Dya ikǝngu nǝ yelsǝni ini!
3.35: Ko mulu kǝn pǝl ulnǝ Lya ɗǝ lyamti u, tiki dya ini nǝ yelsǝni ini, tiki koli ini ɗaɗanu.”

4.1: Ɗaɗanu Yesu a gop kulci'si shilǝn ki Lya abi dlilka u ɓalu, I' mbalǝn mil diɓǝlti domga amati, I lati, i'te ge' kundǝlǝn ki mali, Adlǝlka, i' dǝm a giɓi. I' dopga ki mbalǝn dlǝl atǝn bǝgasi abi dlǝlka isi.
4.2: I' kulcisi lǝɓa diɓǝli nǝ cibǝlti. A ge kulcisiwasi i' ulsisu,
4.3: “Ga kǝn kum! Mulǝn mul kotllu won ɗa is zǝga gegu tǝn gaki ti' wotl o'.
4.4: Tige dlati wundi lǝɓa, Ina wundiyen nda tǝn shutu, i yatli ɗakǝn unndiyisi.
4.5: Un ndiyen is nda age lu mul zǝnga luwu nǝ bǝ atl ɗa iye wai u. Alǝbi alǝbi is te' tǝn gaki atli loluwai.
4.6: Nǝ cin peku, Is landǝli, tǝn gaki dlǝlgwasǝn loluwai, Is kwakǝni.
4.7: I gyen nda age ili, I ili sǝnkǝlsi, Sa man pǝtl gwewai.
4.8: I gyen ɗaɗanu is nda gye lu atl ki zeki, Is te' kizeki, Is nali, Is pǝl gwe, I gyen pǝl gwe kutl kutl lǝbi maki, Gyen kutl kutl lǝbi mǝkka, Gyen kutl kutl lǝbi kutl.” I Yesu usu,
4.9: “Mul kǝm ki kumti tǝ'kumi.” Ulnǝ Lati Ɗǝ Cimbǝlti u
4.10: Nǝs pal mal gǝni u, Mil bǝtlti nǝ kutl nǝ lopiyi iki is gyemti yakǝn cimbǝlti u ɗǝ dlǝmti.
4.11: Iki i' ulsisu, “Kini ɓo, a ndǝgikini i kimannǝn tuki libi ki Lya, Gyen ginǝ bǝ ɗa gyekini wai u, Sai nǝ cimbǝlti.
4.12: “ ‘Yenti nǝ dwaɗǝn ɓo, Sa yeniyi, bǝ a mbatldlwai. Kumti ɓo, Sa kumiyi, Sa man ulnǝ ɗǝ dlǝmti u wai, Tǝn gaki, ɓaspaltyai a pacisi bezǝn lǝɓa wasǝn ɗa.’ ” Yesu Dlǝm Cimbǝlti Ki Mul Wotlti Unndi (Mt 13:18-23; Lk 8:11-15)
4.13: Yesu ulsisu, “A!, Kimanǝn ciɓǝlti uwayya? Tu i mi kǝnkimanǝn na ciɓǝlti en ɗa?
4.14: Mul wotlti o' u, Shilǝn ki Lya kǝnti wotlti.
4.15: Ginǝ ndatǝn shutu u ɓo, Siki ciɓǝlti ki gǝnǝ wotl shilǝn ki Lya a mbatl dlwasǝn u. Sǝn kup shilǝn nisi, Alǝbi alǝbi a shaidan kam shilǝn u nǝ wotldli a mbadlwasǝn u.
4.16: Nǝguni ɗaɗanu gunǝ wotl unndi o' a ge lu zǝnga u, Siki ginǝ sǝn kup shilǝn ki Lya as kami nǝ hwoltugi.
4.17: Si ɓo, Gǝs nisi ɗawai, si kǝn dǝm iye wai, ko ulukǝn hwossi tǝngaki shilǝn ki Lya u, Alǝbi alǝbi as pal nǝ kali.
4.18: Unndi ginǝ nda gelu ili u, iki ciɓǝlti ki mbalǝn u nǝ kum shilǝn ki Lya u,
4.19: Dǝp lǝɓa a hwosi u, nǝ lyap usǝn u, Nǝ laki lǝɓa u, Nǝnte'ti gesi asǝnkǝl shilǝn nisi, Ashilǝn nisi kǝn dǝmti kizeki masiwai.
4.20: Undi u nǝ nda age luki zeki u, iki cimbǝlti ki mbalǝn u nǝkum shilǝnisi, Sǝn kamti, As pǝl kyautǝn nǝ nali, As mbi mbǝlti tǝnki gyen kutl kutl lǝbi maki, Gyen kutl kutl lǝbi mǝkka, Gyenɓo kutl kutl lǝbi kutl.” Cibǝlti Atǝn Pitila
4.21: Yesu ulsisu, “Nǝn mbǝtl pitila teɗi a idlati nǝ bal gala, ko nǝnzǝdli agǝs lumutti, kin zǝti atǝn lu dǝmtuwa swaya?
4.22: Kum ulnǝ ki hwundǝli u, nǝn pekǝlti. Ulnǝ ki kuppi u, nǝn ɗutiti.
4.23: Mul kǝm ki kumti, ti' kumi.”
4.24: Yesu ulsisu, “Kumini, ko'talaku' nǝ cimbǝlin ɗa u, nǝ nali si' cimbǝlliki, hal ma as mbǝli ɗa.
4.25: Tǝngaki mulnǝ ulǝn ni'ɗa u, sim mbǝli' tiɗa, mulnǝ ulǝn ni' ɗawai u, na' ulnǝ nitu sin kamiti taka.” Cimbǝlti Ki Unndu nǝ Ate u
4.26: Yesu ulsisu, “Gu' ki libi ki Lya kǝnǝ mul dlati u'kǝni a atli.
4.27: Mutti nǝ hillya i undi te, i nali, timan kan u nǝ pǝl dli uwai.
4.28: Atli nǝ gawasi ti bǝtl lǝɓa, ki nǝm iki ulnǝ ɗǝ te'ti, sai ga, nǝ balgye laɓa tǝnki.
4.29: In gwe yi a nyau, iki alǝbi alǝbi atlo'dli nǝ kwaltǝn, gis acilu ngu.” Cimbǝlti nǝ Gwe' Mastad
4.30: I' usu ɗaɗanu, “Nǝ yakǝn tǝn cimbǝlǝn gu' ki Lya? Ko nǝ yakǝn tǝn cimbǝlǝnti?
4.31: Kǝnǝ gwe mastad kǝnɗa, gunǝ, iki yakǝn gwe lǝɓa gunǝ ɗǝ wotlti adǝp lǝɓa u,
4.32: Ngo nǝ nǝgu in wotl tu, an ngǝtl kap na dwa nǝ nalti, ap pǝlbas mil toh, yatl ma as man nda a gwasǝn wasi.”
4.33: Nǝ cimbǝlti diɓǝli Yesu dlǝm misi shilǝn ki Lya, ndace nǝ mantiwasǝn.
4.34: Ti ɗa pissi ulǝnwai, sai nǝ cimbǝlti. Iki ti pi' mil kushtiwasi ko yanngi a malgǝni bǝ nǝ cimbǝltiwai.
4.35: Age'cinisi, nǝ cin ɓalnja ti nda u, i Yesu ul mil kushti wassu, “Mi' ɗakǝcin tyatǝn bi dlǝlka ka.”
4.36: Nǝsza dopga ki mbalǝn akalu, is zǝga neti kau u nǝ tiɗa u age kundǝlǝn ki mali, na kundǝlǝn ki mali si amalgǝn wasi.
4.37: I bal lya ki mali mul yetǝl dlitoɗi, i bǝski mali go' tliti lya ɗǝ lyap jakǝ' kuɗǝlǝ nisi.
4.38: Yesu ɓo ati tu kal age kundǝlǝn ki mali atǝn lumutti, ati nde enbuɗi. Iki mil kushtiwasi is dlilti ɗǝ enɓuɗi, is ultisu, “Mul lashti, mun mǝshti kin ɗa entiwaya?”
4.39: I' hilya ɗǝ enɓuɗi, i' mati etǝlli, i ultisu “dǝm shot!” Iki i yetǝlli muɗi, i kumlu dǝm shot.
4.40: I' ulsisu, “Tǝn gaki yakǝn lakiɗa ikumǝn ɓanti nǝgu? Hal nǝgun lati mbatl kǝn nuna?”
4.41: Iskum ɓanti iye, is ulyelsǝnisu, “Wo kǝngu? Yetǝl nǝ mali ki dlika si bǝtl shilǝn wasi!”

5.1: A Yesu ne mil kushtiwasi is ɓǝci bidlilka age atl ki Galasinawa.
5.2: Nǝ pe'tuwasi ɗige kundǝlǝn ki mali, iki mul du mi'gatlon kǝngu te' gelu gum mbalǝn i mbǝ ma Yesu.
5.3: Ti ɓo lugum mbalǝn kǝn ki lǝ dǝm tuwasi. Mul ma'kǝndǝtti ɗawai, ko nǝ ulkǝndǝ mbalǝn kidom.
5.4: Tǝn a tle kǝndǝti toh nǝ asǝn nǝ ulkǝndǝ mbalǝn ki dom, ati ɓaɓatlti, a cacal dom ki tǝn asǝni. Mul ma'pǝliti ulǝn ɗawai.
5.5: Gasi nǝ dloncin a gelu gum mbalǝn ti dǝmti, nǝ tǝn zǝga, ati latiyali, ati gǝlǝshti dli wasi nǝ zǝnga.
5.6: Nǝ en Yesu te' lolu u, i' em kitǝl tya mati i' gus akinawasi.
5.7: I' layali i' usu, “Yesu yakǝn ki Lya mul nalti, ya lakǝnmiki? A maki nǝ Lya yi, bǝ hwoti besǝn lǝɓa wai.”
5.8: Tǝ ndan akinawasi nǝgu u tǝn gaki Yesu ultisu, “Za mulu, Ki du mi'gatli!”
5.9: I Yesu gyemti, “Ya kǝn ki shinwagi?” I' ultisu, “Shin i kǝnki, hututu, iki mi dimbǝli.”
5.10: Iki i' go' gyep Yesu bǝ'katsi ɗǝ kiwai
5.11: Amalǝbisi lu byatl dǝs kiban ɗa suttǝn mis calgadli.
5.12: Mi'gatli gyemti is usu, “In kandǝgu katmi swa ge dǝs kiban yi, tǝn te gesi.”
5.13: I Yesu ndǝgisi. Iki yi du mi'gatli peki, is te ge dǝs kiban nisi. Dǝbǝtl ki dǝs kiban nisi sǝn pǝtl zangu lop, is hilya nǝ kitǝl, suttǝn mis calgadli is ndage mali ki dlilka is gǝli.
5.14: Aki kǝn mil byatl dǝs kiban ni tlǝ nǝ kitǝl, is su dlǝm shilǝnni age bas gatli nǝ mil gatli. I mbalǝn ɓǝ si' en ulnǝ nda u.
5.15: Nǝs ɓǝ ma Yesu u is en mul nǝs pekǝli mi'gatli ngu ki dǝmi, nǝ luluti ki laki adli, ti ge dliwasi ɗaɗanu, is kum ɓanti.
5.16: Ginǝs pǝl ulisi a tǝn dwaɗǝn wasǝn u, is go' palli' mbalǝn shilǝn ki ulnǝ nda u nǝ mul mi'gatli nǝ dǝs kiban yi u
5.17: I mbalǝn nisi pi Yesu ti' zaki atlwasǝn.
5.18: Ti te'ge kundǝlǝn ki mali kǝn ngu, mulnǝ da du mi'gatli ɗa u bǝltibi ti' dǝm mati.
5.19: Yesu a ndǝgi tuwai, i Yesu ultisu, “Lǝ libi ma yalsǝnǝ wagi, a pisi bas ulnǝ Lya pǝliku, nǝ ci'gontuwagu nǝ' eni u.”
5.20: I' zǝga libi, i' tege dlǝm shilǝni a Dikapolis ki bas lǝɓa u nǝ Yesu pǝlitu. I kum mbalǝn i kum ulki gagashinti. Ndokǝl Yakǝn ki Yayilus nǝ Kǝli mul Bǝna' ki Hwula
5.21: Nǝ Yesu ɗakǝci tyatǝn bǝgasi gwa u ge kundǝlǝn ki mali ɗaɗanu u, I bal dopga ki mbalǝn gandǝlti. Ati abi dlilka.
5.22: Iki mulǝn ngu age bas mul kina ki lu dopga ki Yahudawa, mul shin Yayilus. Nǝ en Yesu u in nda akina wasi,
5.23: I' bǝlti bi balbali, i' ultisu, “Yakuyini yakǝnkǝli ti abiki mǝshti. Ami bǝtlki bi ngaɗi ki zittoh tǝngaki tin ndoɗa.”
5.24: Iki is zǝga neti. Bal dopga ki mbalǝn ɗǝ bǝlti kali, asi gyepti.
5.25: Iki kǝli won ngu ta pǝl hwon kutl nǝ lobpi a hwula ɗǝ binetti,
5.26: Kǝli u ta tle bal bǝna a toh ki mil bǝlt igǝn diɓǝli, ta gǝl kum ulnǝ ni' ɗa u, i ngo nǝnǝgu tambi ndotuwai, kina kina gonti ɗa.
5.27: Nǝ kumi ɗǝ dlǝm Yesu u, i' molti te' kalki Yesu age dopga nisi, i' tǝn bi lulugǝl ki Yesu.
5.28: Tǝn ti usu a mbatl tluwasi, “Lulugǝl ma atǝni u, an ndoti.”
5.29: Alǝbi bina' ki hwulawasi dlǝli, i' kumi a dliwasi ta ndoki gontuwasi.
5.30: Alǝbi alǝbi nǝ Yesu kumi ndǝlton a peɗi getu, iki i' go' yalu age dopga, i' usu, “Wokǝn tǝn lulugǝlni?”
5.31: Iki i mil kushtiwasi ultisu, “Ki ye' dopga ki mbalǝn nǝgu, a usu, wokǝn tǝnka?”
5.32: Iki i Yesu yalu kali tǝngaki ti' en mulnǝ pǝli' nǝgu u.
5.33: Kǝli yi nǝ man ulnǝ ndaniti u, iki i' ɓǝ nǝ ɓanti, ati nyepti ki dli i' nda a kina ki Yesu, i kǝliyi pi Yesu bali.
5.34: I Yesu ul kǝli usu, “Yakuyini, lati mbatluwagi a ndokǝlki. Mboci lau, ka ndo ɗǝ gontuwagi.”
5.35: A tige shilǝn, iki gyenkǝnngi te' libi ki Yayilus, is usu, “Yakuwagi ta mǝci, yalakiɗa ki'la' mul lashti ɗǝ bǝnaɗa?”
5.36: Yesu a pal kǝm tǝn ulnǝ si dlǝmti uwai, i' ul Yayilus su, “Bi kum ɓantuwai, la mbatl katl”
5.37: Ta za mulǝn a bǝlsi kaluwai iki Bitlus, nǝ Yakubu, nǝ Yahaya yalse ki Yakubu si bǝlti kali
5.38: Nǝs mbǝci libi ki Yayilus mul kina ki lu dopga ki Yahudawa u, is kumi wotilu, nǝ kulu, nǝ latiyali yenti ɗawai ba kumti ɗawai.
5.39: Nǝ te' gibi u, i' Yesu ulsisu, “Yalaki ɗa ki wotilu nǝ kulu ɗa nǝgu? Yakǝni kimǝci tiɗawai, nde yemmbukǝn tiɗa.”
5.40: Iki is pǝli gyetlti ki mbǝlti. Kalki ki Yesu a pekǝl mbalǝn nǝsi kumwasǝn tuwa dlayi, iki i' kan bwasi ki yakǝnkǝliyi nǝ dyawasi nǝ mil kushtiwasi guni netu, is te' gelu u nǝ yakǝn kǝliyi ɗa u.
5.41: I' Yesu goppi toh, i' ultisu, “Talita kumi”, iki, “Yakǝnkǝli, ami utlkisu, hilya.”
5.42: Alǝbi alǝbi yakǝnkǝliyi hilya i' go' lǝti. Tǝngaki timul hwon kutl nǝ lop kǝni. Gu lakisi ulki gagashinti iye
5.43: Iki i' matisi bǝ mulǝn kum shilǝn uwai, i' ulsisu ɗaɗanu si' bǝl yakǝn kǝliyi ulki ɗami.

6.1: I Yesu za' lǝbisi ippal tiya ge' gatluwasi, I mil kushti wasi is bǝltikal.
6.2: Nǝ Cin shuti pǝ' u, i' gop kulcissi age'lu dopga ki Yahudawa, diɓǝl mbalǝn yi nǝ lǝbi u si ga'ti kǝmu is kum gagashinti, asi ussu, “A ukǝn mulu mbi ulu nǝgu u?” Is ngemti, “Undi mallaɓa ukǝn ninnǝgu? Undi gagashintu kǝn ti pǝlti nǝgu?
6.3: Guki mul tlatti lǝɓa u waiwa? Yakǝn ki Malyamu nǝ yelse ki Yakubu, nǝ Yusupu, nǝ Yahuza nǝ Saminu? Yelsǝni was mudli simi ne'sǝ a kiwu waiwa?” Is nge'ti.
6.4: I Yesu ulsisu, “Mulnjeshinkǝn nǝnɗa mbin nalti ge'gatluwaswai nǝ ge' yelsǝniwasi nǝ a libi wasi.”
6.5: Taman pǝtl ulki gagashit tiya kawai, iki is zi mi'gonti ginǝ bǝs diɓǝllwai u toh is ndoki.
6.6: I' kum gagashinti nǝ hotl la'ti mbadlawasǝn. I'go' duk tiya ge mil gatli ati kulcissi. Yesu Shin Mil kushtiwasi Kutl nǝ Lob
6.7: Immbe mil kushti kutlh nǝ lopi bi is shinsi lob lob. Ibbǝlsi ndǝlti tǝn du mi'gatlǝ.
6.8: Ippisi i' usu, “Bǝ kamǝn ulǝnwai ɗǝ lǝ tuwasǝnwai kumɓǝlkǝn ki kamin katl bǝs kan ulki ɗamiwai bǝ kamǝn kulu wai bǝ kamǝn ulpwai.
6.9: Shimǝn kaptǝlan, ngo nǝnǝgu bi mbǝlǝn lu'lǝgǝl tǝnkiwai.
6.10: Libi u nǝ ka shitin lǝbi u a' dǝmni lǝbi hal a' za'kǝn gatliɗa.
6.11: Lu u nǝ bǝsa njekiniwai u ko sa nge kupkini u, za'kǝn gatli abatǝn kushka ki asǝnwakǝn taka gaki tǝdǝm dǝtlkǝm ɗa ma'si.”
6.12: Nǝgu si peki asi dlǝmi' mbalǝn shilǝn ki Lya gaki sǝ' za' pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa.
6.13: Is pekǝl mi'gatli diɓǝli, is suwati mi'gonti diɓǝli mili is ndoki. Mushti Ki Yahaya Mul Baptisma
6.14: Nǝ guu Hilidus kumi nǝgu u, tǝn gaki Yesu apǝl shin i, gemma si usu, “Yahaya mul pǝli mbalǝn baptisma ti tlilya ge' mi' mǝshti, I lakiɗa ti nǝ ndǝlki kyautǝn ki gagashinti ɗǝ pǝ' ma'tiɗa.”
6.15: Gen ɗǝ usu Iliya ni, gen ne si usu, “Nǝm kǝn ge mul njeshinkǝn ki Lya ki ɗigini.”
6.16: Nǝ Hilidus kumi nǝgu u, I' usu, “Yahaya u na patti ga taka u hilya ge' mil mushti!”
6.17: Ti Hilidus nǝ gawasi illaki sǝ' gop Yahaya, is ki ndǝti as la'ti ge'lu kǝnndǝ'mbalǝn. Tǝ pǝllǝn gu gaki Hilidiya kǝli ki yelse wasi Philip, gunǝ' kanti ippalti ɗǝ kǝliwasi.
6.18: Tǝn gaki Yahaya ul Hilidus su, “A mbuni ki dǝm nǝ kǝliki yelse wagwai”
6.19: Tǝn gaki nǝgu Hilidiya ngap Yahaya a mbatldli, ti lyamti tǝ' tloti, ngo' nǝnǝgu tamaniwai gaki Hilidus.
6.20: Hilidus ɗǝ' ɓanti Yahaya, gaki ti mani Yahaya mulzo' mbatl kǝni mul pǝtl lǝɓa kizokini, I lakiɗa bǝ tiɗa za'ti ulǝn ti nda nǝtiwai. Hilidus in tikum shilǝn ki Yahaya u ɗǝ hwottiti, ngo nǝnǝgu ti ɓalɗǝ kupti ɗǝ shilǝn u, ti kup hwol mbatl nǝ kup ti.
6.21: Iki ipmbi shitu nǝ cin ki zǝ'ti mbǝ u, ip pǝli Gumsisi wasi nǝ bas mi'kina ki dlati ne' bas mbalǝn ki Galili daddaɓǝl.
6.22: Nǝ yakǝn ki hiludiya tete' dlom ɗǝ nyeptu, i mbuni Hilidus ne'sǝbǝlswasi. I Guu ul yakǝn kǝlisu, ngem ulnǝ ki lyamti u an bǝlki.
6.23: I Hilidus ndǝgiti nǝzal ulnǝ ka ngemi u an bǝlki, “Ko ti bwasti dlom ki guntikǝni.”
6.24: Ippeki, in ngem dyawasi, “Yakǝn ta ngemi?” I dyani usu, “Gaki Yahaya mul pǝli' mbalǝn baptisma.”
6.25: A lǝbi alǝbi is susu' nǝ dleuti, ma' guu i' ultisu, “Ami lyamti nǝgun nǝguni ki bǝlǝn ga ki Yahaya mul pǝtl baptisma, age' gal ki pǝti.”
6.26: I mbatl ki guu lewi, Ngo nǝnǝgu gaki ta ultisuyi nǝzal akina ɗǝ sǝmbǝlswasi, tǝkǝn lyapti ti' ultisu zakiwai.
6.27: A lǝbi i guu la' mul shinkǝn wasi, illaki sǝm mbǝl ga ki Yahaya. I mul shinkǝni le' kotl ga ki Yahaya teɗi a ge'lu zǝm mbalǝn.
6.28: Im mbǝl gami age' galpǝti, ib bǝl yakǝn kǝliyi, i yakǝn kǝliyi bǝl dyawasi.
6.29: Nǝ mil kushti ki Yahaya kum shilǝni u, is mbǝ is kan dli i, is guti.
6.30: I mil shinkǝn ki Yesu is pal te' ma'ti, is dlimi' mus ulnǝs pǝli u, nǝ ulnǝs kulci u.
6.31: I Yesu ulsisu nganni tǝn na' shu'ni ge' lu u nǝbǝ mbalǝn ɗa wai u, gaki mbalǝn diɗǝli si lǝti asi palti, mbi' dlil ɗǝ ɗamtima mil shinkǝn ki Yesu ma sambiwai.
6.32: Is zǝga ge' kundǝlǝn ki mali si nǝgwasǝn lu u nǝ bǝ mbalǝn ɗa wai u.
6.33: Iki mbalǝn diɓǝl, is yen zǝ'ga wasǝn, si mansi, mus mbalǝn kige gadli nǝ lǝbi u is dululu is ngǝtl nǝ mbǝkǝsti.
6.34: Nǝ pe'ti ki Yesu ɗige' kundǝlǝn ki malu, i'yen diɓǝl mbalǝn i' kum ci' gon twasǝn, gaki si kǝnǝ mbǝla u nǝbǝ mil be'lsi ɗawai u. I' go' kulcissi lǝɓa diɓǝli. I Yesu Bǝl Diɓǝl Mbalǝn Ulki ɗami
6.35: Nǝ cin ɓal nja tǝnda u i mil kushti wasi mbǝ ma'ti, is ultisu, “Lǝbisi ngu mbalǝn ɗawai, i ngu cin ɓal nja ti ndayi.
6.36: Za' mbalǝn nisi sǝ' zǝga tiya ge' gatlu nǝ nja aki u, sǝ' uli gawasǝn ulki ɗamiɗa.”
6.37: I' ulsisu, “Kiniɓo bǝlǝnsi ulki ɗamiɗa” Is ul Yesu usu, “Ulki ɗamiwasǝn nǝ pǝtl bwasti dlom ki upki lii hwon nǝm kikyautǝn ki yakǝn mbalǝn, tǝn ullisi ulki ɗami ɗangwa?”
6.38: I Yesu ngemsi, “Ulki ɗami nǝmi nikini? Su' yanini.” Nǝs yani toɗu, is ultisu, “Lǝpa nantam kǝni, nǝ kes lob.”
6.39: I Yesu ul mil kushti wasi usu sǝ' bwas mbalǝn tiya as dǝm atli tiya tǝn di'me.
6.40: I mbalǝn dǝm atli swai nami kutl kutl lǝbǝ kutl, nami kutl kutl lǝbǝ nantam.
6.41: I Yesu kan lǝpa nantami nǝ kes gudǝl lopisi, it taki lya, i' gode Lya, i' caccal lǝpa i, ib bǝl mil kushti wasi sǝ' buwasi mbalǝn, is buwasisi kes lopi ɗaɗanu.
6.43: I mil kushti wasi yem dǝs kutl nǝ lop ki lǝpa gunǝ sa u nǝ kesi.
6.44: Diɓǝl ki mwani yi nǝ ɗami u sa tǝla zangu nantam. Yesu ɗǝ lǝ' tǝn mali
6.45: Nǝguni i Yesu la' mil kushti wasi sǝ' tege' kudǝlǝn ki mali sǝ' ngǝtl ti ɗǝ ɗakǝshti tiya Basaida, tiya ge'lu yiwon ki bal mal, i ul mbalǝn su sǝ' zǝga.
6.46: Nǝ' zasi u i totǝn zǝnga ɗǝ gyem Lya.
6.47: Nǝ gas pǝ'u, kudǝlǝni tiya dlom mali, Yesu tǝn bǝgasi nǝm nǝ gwasi.
6.48: Nǝ' en dǝl kudǝlǝn ɗǝ hwottisi u, tǝn gaki ndǝl ki yetǝl, adlom gasi i'go lǝ te'tǝnsi, a ti lǝ'tǝn mali. Ippǝli kǝnǝ tǝ' ɗakǝsh si,
6.49: Nǝs yen ti ɗǝ lǝ' tǝn malu, is yeni kǝnǝ nul kǝni, is la' yali.
6.50: Tǝn gaki kapuwasǝn i ɓa'gobsi nǝs yentu. I Yesu ɓulisi bi alǝbi, i' ulsisu, “Bǝ ɓanniwai amini.”
6.51: Iki it tege' kudǝlǝn ne'si, i yetǝli muɗi. I gagashi' gob mil kushti wasi,
6.52: gaki saman ulǝn tǝn lǝpa gunǝ bǝl mbalǝn zangu nantam is ɗamti ɗa uwai, gaki mbatldlowasǝn a kangǝli. Yesu Ndo'kǝl Mi'gonti a Jenisalata
6.53: Nǝs ɗakǝci, is mbǝci ge' atl ki Jenisalata, is kǝndǝ kudǝlǝni tǝn bigasi.
6.54: Nǝs pe' ɗige' kundǝlǝni u i mbalǝni mansi.
6.55: Is ngwal atlisi nǝ kitǝl, is go' ka' mi'go' tottǝn lumut si tala'si tiya ge'lu u nǝs kumi ti ɗa u.
6.56: Mus lu u nǝ Yesu lǝɗa u, bal gatli ko yakǝn gatli, as mbǝllic mi' gonti abi lu dobga, as ngemti sǝttin bi lulǝ gǝlwasma. Ginǝ tǝntu is ndoki.

7.1: Nǝ palisiyawa nǝ gyen mi' bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa ginǝ mbǝ te' Ulshelima is domga ma' Yesu.
7.2: Is yeni na mil kushti wasi si ɗamti siɗa o'kǝl towai tǝngaki bǝtl lǝɓa ki mi' kina.
7.3: Palisiyawa ne' Yehudawa sǝn ɗa ɗamti pawai senǝ sa o'kǝl toh pa, gaki si bǝtl lǝɓa ki mi' kina.
7.4: In sa pal te'ge'lu dobga ki ulti nǝ ulti taka u, sǝnɗa ɗamtipawai senǝ sa utisi mal takapa. Undǝ laɓa enɗa diɓǝli nǝsmbima' mi'kina wasǝn asi pǝlti, kǝnǝ ki o'kǝl gali ne' ki twom mali ne' kal ki dom.
7.5: I palisiyawa ne' mi' kulci' mbalǝn zhil ki Musa is ngemti, “Ya lakiɗa mil kushti wagi siɗa bǝtl ulnǝs mbima mi'kina wasǝn u wai, si ɗamti bǝsiɗa o'kǝtl towai?”
7.6: I' ulsisu, “Bali Ishaya dlǝmi tǝnkini, mi' bǝna ki dwaɗǝn, kan u nǝ ɗa ki laci u: “ ‘Mbalǝnyi agabi ki naltǝni, mbadlwakǝn lolu nǝ ami.
7.7: Bǝtl Lya wasǝn u bali wai, ge'shu ki zhil ki Lya, zhil ki mbalǝn kǝn si kulcissi.’
7.8: Ka lakǝn zhil ki Lya taka i, ka ngapǝn zhil ki mi' kina i.”
7.9: I' ulsisu, “Kimanǝn shitu ki la'ti zhil ki Lya taka huti aki ngapti zhil ki mi' kina.
7.10: Gaki Musa usu, ‘Nal bwagi nǝ dyawagi,’ ‘Mulnǝ, abyal bwasu ko dyawasu, a tloti.’
7.11: Ngo nǝnǝgu kini ki usu, in mulnǝ azi ulǝn tǝngaki ti' ɗǝl bwasi nǝ dyawasi adǝm Kolban i', (iki, abǝl Lya i)
7.12: nǝgu katl, kǝkǝn za'titi tǝ'pǝli bwasi ko dyawasi kyautǝn ki ulǝnwai.
7.13: Nǝgu lakiɗa ki ɗa katshilǝn ki Lya baliwai gaki bǝtl zhil ki mi' kina. Ki njikǝ' pǝtl undigi.”
7.14: Ɗaɗanu i Yesu taki diɓǝl mbalǝn bi, i' ulsisu, “Kumǝnnǝni muswakǝn, a'manangu.
7.15: Ulnǝ ɗǝ su' ge' yakǝn mbalǝn tu'dla u i ɗǝ bezǝtiwai, ulnǝ ɗǝ pe'tito' ge'tu ɗǝ bezǝti.”
7.16: Mul kǝm ki kumti, ti' kumi,
7.17: Kalki za'ti hwu'mbalǝn i, nǝtte libi u, i mil kushti wasi is ngemti yakǝn cimbǝlti u ɗǝ dlǝmti.
7.18: I' ulsisu, “Kinima kimaniniwaiya?” “Ulnǝ ɗǝ suge' mbalǝn tu'dla u, kǝn bezǝtiwai,
7.19: Nǝbǝ ambadlwas kǝn suwai u, atu'ɗa'ka su, tu'nǝgu tǝpekki.” Nǝnǝgu Yesu pal mus ulki ɗami ki zeki.
7.20: I' usu, “Ulnǝ ɗǝpe'ti to'ge' tu'ki yakǝn mbalǝn u iɗǝ bezǝt'ti.
7.21: A tugi, age' mbadl ki yakǝn mbalǝn, kǝn bezǝn lǝɓa ɗǝpe'ti, kǝnǝ kwonti, nǝ mǝgǝlti, nǝ tlom mbalǝn,
7.22: nǝ pǝti, nǝ lyap lǝɓa, nǝ ngashti, nǝ ship totugi, nǝ nge Lya, nǝ ndau bishitu, nǝ bezǝn dǝmti, nǝ nalkiga, nǝ kon nǝmbalǝn, nǝ ndokǝnti.
7.23: Mus bezǝn lǝɓagi atu'kǝn sipe'titoɗi, si ɗǝ bezǝn mbalǝn.” Lati mbatl ki Kǝli Solopinikiya
7.24: I Yesu za'lǝbi illǝ Taya nǝ Sidon. It tege' libiwon, ta lyami tǝmulǝn maniwai ngo' nǝnǝgu a hwunwai.
7.25: Kǝliwon, gunǝ du mi'gatli gob yakuwasi, nǝkumi Yesu ɗa ki u, illǝ in ndakina ɗakka.
7.26: Kǝliyisi yakǝn Helinawa ni, atlki zǝtti iki Solopinikiya ni. In ngem Yesu tǝp pekkǝli yakuwasi du mi'gatl taka.
7.27: I Yesu ultisu, “Hwe tǝkǝm mil pa, gaki a'mbuni akan ulki ɗami ki milwai tǝbǝl kaɗiwai.”
7.28: I kǝliyi ndǝgiti i'ultisu, “Mul nalti, ey nǝguɗa, ngo'nǝnǝgu kaɗi nǝnɗǝ ɗab bi ki mil.”
7.29: I Yesu ultisu, “Gaki shilǝnwa'gu, paltya, du mi'gatli aza' yakuwagi yakǝnkǝli.”
7.30: Nǝ' paltya libi u ille'mbi yakuwasi kǝmuɗi tǝn lumutti, du mi'gatli apeki. Yesu ndokǝl mul nǝ bǝɗa kup kǝm nǝ ma'shilǝnwai u
7.31: I Yesu za' lukǝ Taya, i' bǝli Sidon tǝn shitu i' bǝli Dikapolis illǝ dlilka ki Galili.
7.32: Is mbǝlli' mulnǝ bǝɗa kub kǝmwai u mul ɗǝɗɗǝtibi, is ngemti tǝszitto.
7.33: I Yesu Kanti ispal malgǝni' ki hwu' mbalǝn, i Yesu shim mil toh age' kǝm ki mulisi, ibbeza makkǝn, ittǝn lǝgawasi.
7.35: I kǝmwas ɓuli, i lǝgawas laki, i'gob shilǝn.
7.36: I Yesu dlimisi bǝs dlimi mulǝnwai. Sine se mbǝtl dlǝmtitǝnki siɗa.
7.37: Is kumgagashinti, is usu, “Tapǝl mus lǝɓa mbuni! Mulnǝ bǝ ɗa kubkǝmwai u ma ta kumi i, mul ɗǝɗɗǝti bima taman shilǝn I.”

8.1: Age cinisi i hwu' mbalǝn domga ɗaɗanu. Ulki ɗami nisi ɗawai, i Yesu imbe milkushti wasbi, i' ulsisu,
8.2: “Ami kub go'kǝ' hwu mbalǝnyi, gaki asǝti mutti maki ngu asi ne'kǝni, ulki ɗami nisiɗawai.
8.3: In a zasi sa zǝga libi nǝ kuzǝn u, sǝkǝn ma'mbǝkǝshti libiwai, i ngu nami pe'ni lolu.”
8.4: I mil kushti wasi ndǝgiti is ultisu, “A ukǝn tǝ mbalǝn mbi ulki ɗami u nǝtǝ kǝm mbalǝn age'dǝlgǝn u?”
8.5: I Yesu ngemsi, “Lǝpa nǝmi nikini?” Is usu, “Ninngi.”
8.6: I' ul diɓǝl mbalǝnsu sǝ'dǝm atli. Nǝ'kan lǝpa ninngiyi, i' gode Lya ɗa, iccacali, i'go' bǝtl milkushti wasi sǝ' bwasi mbalǝn, is pǝli nugu.
8.7: Kwesen nisiɗa ten ngulen. Nǝ' gode Lya u, ippi milkushti wasi sǝ'bwasi mbalǝn.
8.8: I mbalǝn ɗami i kǝmsi, i milkushti wasi yemi is njikǝn dǝs ninngi nǝgunǝ sa u.
8.9: Mbalǝnisi sa pǝl zangu upsi. Kal ki pallisibi,
8.10: ittege' kundǝlǝn ne' mik kushti wasi, illǝge' luki Dalmanuta. Palisiyawa ɗǝ Lyap Ye'lwaɗi
8.11: I palisiyawa gop ngep Yesu. Tǝn sǝ' cimbǝlti ɗa, is ngemti, tǝn gaki tǝn mbokisi toh tǝn lwaɗon sul lya.
8.12: I Yesu mbǝ mbadli lolu, i'usu, “Ya lakiɗa kini mbalǝn kinǝgun ki ngep lwadɗa? Bali amipi' kini, kǝnbǝtlkin lwaɗon sul lyawai.”
8.13: Iki is izza'si, ittege'kundǝlǝn ki mal, idɗakaci tiyatǝn bigasika. Yis Ki Palisiyawa Nǝki Hilidus
8.14: Imilkushti was musni sa kan bilediwai, lǝpa nǝm kǝn nisi katl ge'kundǝlǝni.
8.15: I Yesu dǝllisi kǝm, i'ulsisu, “Yanǝn lu kizoki, apǝn ɗemɗem nǝ yiski palisiyawa nǝki Hilidus.”
8.16: Is shilǝn ɗaɗɗasi, “Is usu tǝn gaki biledi niminɗawai.”
8.17: Yesu man ulnǝ si dlimti u, i Yesu ulsisu, “Ya lakiɗa iki usu biledi nikin ɗawai? Hal nǝguni ka manini uwaiya? Hal nǝgun kin ɗa yentiniwaiya? Mba dlwakǝn a ndǝdǝli kikǝn mantiniwaiya?
8.18: Dwaɗǝn nikinɗa bǝki enluwaiya nǝ kǝm nikinɗa bǝki kumtiwaiya? Kǝnɗa dabǝtl kiniwaiya?
8.19: Na chali mbalǝn zangu nantam lǝpa nantamu, mbutu nǝmi ki yemini ki bigeyi gunǝ sa u?” Is ultisu, “Kutl nǝ lop”
8.20: I Yesu ngemsi lǝpa ningi u na chali zangu upsi u pa? Mbutu nǝmi ki yemini? Is ultisu, “Ningi.”
8.21: I ulsisu, “Hal nǝgun ma, ka manini u waiya?” Yesu Ndokǝl Dwawon a Batsaida
8.22: Is mbǝkǝci a Batsaida, i mbalǝn en mbǝlli' dwawon, is bǝlti bi tǝttǝnti.
8.23: In ngapi dwanisi toh, it mbǝti malgǝn gatli. Ibbezze'makǝn a dwaɗǝn, izzǝ'toh, i Yesu ultisu, “Kǝn ɗǝ ye' ulunya?”
8.24: I dwani ya lulya, i'usu, “Ami yen mbalǝn; kǝnǝ pǝti asi duti”
8.25: I Yesu zǝ'toh tǝn dwaɗǝni ɗaɗanu. I dwanisi ɓul dwaɗǝn wasi, in ndoki, i'yen lu kizoki.
8.26: I Yesu ultisu, “Paltya libi, bǝ tege' yakǝn gatluwai.” Shilǝn Ki Bitlus Tǝn Yesu Tiki Almasihu
8.27: I Yesu ne' milkushtiwasi, is tege' mil gatlki Kaisaliya Pilibi. Tǝn shitu in ngemsi, “Ya mbalǝn ɗǝ mbetǝni?”
8.28: Is ultisu, “Yahaya mulpǝtl baptisma; gyenne, Iliya; gyenne ɗaɗanu, si usu nǝm ge' mik nje'shinkǝn ki Lya kǝni.”
8.29: In ngemsi, “Kinipa yaki mbetǝni?” Bitlus ndǝgiti i'ultisu, “Kikǝ Almasihu.”
8.30: I Yesu dǝlisi kǝm bǝs dlǝmi mulǝn ulǝn tǝntwai. Yesu Dlǝm Undi Mǝshtu nǝ Tǝppǝli U
8.31: I'gop kulcissi, yakǝn mbalǝn nǝn tlebbǝna diɓǝli a ngeti, ma mikkina, ne' bas lǝɓasi, ne'mik bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa, sǝn tloti, kalki mutti maki tǝn tlǝti lya ɗaɗanu.
8.32: I Yesu dlǝmisi shilǝni kan unǝ sǝ'mani ɗa u. I Bitlus dǝlti malgǝni, i'gop matiti.
8.33: Ngonǝnǝgu nǝ Yesu yalu kalu i'ya milkushtiwasi, im mati Bitlus i'ultisu, “Pǝlolu nǝ ami sheɗan! Ge mbatlwagi laɓa ki Lya ɗawai sai ki mbalǝn.”
8.34: Imbe hwu mbalǝni bi ne'milkushtiwasi, i' ulsisu, “Mul lyab dǝp mul kushti ini, tǝnge' gawasi, a'kan gǝdlǝnnga ki bǝnawasi, abbǝlǝn kali.
8.35: Mul lyab gawasi, tǝnholti, mulnǝ a hol gawas gayi u, gaki shilǝn ki Lya u, ziti tiɗa.
8.36: Yakǝn ti yankǝn mbalǝn mbi intambi dǝb lǝɓa mus, ge shu ki gawasu?
8.37: Yakǝn ɗaɗanu ti yakǝn mbalǝn bǝli tǝn gaki ti'ul mbatlwas ɗa?
8.38: In mulnǝ a kubsha i u nǝ shilǝn i u, age' hwon ki nge' ngapti ga nǝ pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa, yakǝn mbalǝn ma tǝnkub shaki matti, inta mbǝ ge' natl ki mulzǝtti u ne' milshinkǝn ki Lya kizoki.”

9.1: I' ulsisu, “Bali bali ami dlǝmikini, genɗa ki dlǝli aki sǝkkǝn yen mǝshtwai, sai nǝ sayen gukki Lya a mbǝ nǝ ndǝlti.” Shotti Ki Dli ki Yesu
9.2: Kalki mutti mǝkka i Yesu kan Bitlus, nǝ Yakubu, nǝ Yahaya, sinǝ gwasǝn it tolsi tǝn pyasti zǝnga. I dliwas shoti.
9.3: I lulǝgǝlwas hwali sol aɗi kaddwaɗǝn, kan u nǝbǝ mulǝn kǝn ma' pǝlti nǝgu tǝn dǝp lǝɓawai u.
9.4: I Iliya nǝ Musa is pekkisi, a shilǝn ne' Yesu.
9.5: I Bitlus ul Yesu su, “Mul lashti, a mbuni nǝmini ki u. Hwe tǝn pǝlǝn kǝs maki, gudǝl nǝm gwagi, nǝm ki Musa, nǝm ne ki Iliya.”
9.6: (Ta hwol ulnǝ tǝtl dlǝmi u yi, gaki sa kum ɓanti.)
9.7: I lyawon tlǝttoɗi i idlasi, i kum yalon ge'lyanisi, ti usu, “Guki yakuyini ki lyami. Kumǝnti.”
9.8: Bǝnǝ mantiwasǝnwai sige nǝgu is yalu malgǝn ɗasi sayen mulǝnwai, Yesu ka'tl ne'si.
9.9: Sige' pe'ti suttǝn Zǝga, I Yesu pisi bǝs dlǝmi mulǝn ulnǝs yeni u wai, sai nǝ yakǝn mbalǝn a hilya ɗige' mi'mǝshti.
9.10: Is za'shilǝni ge' dlomwasǝn, asi shilǝn ne' yelsǝni yakǝnki “Hillya ge' mi' mǝshti.”
9.11: Is ngemti is ultisu, “Ya lakiɗa mi' bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa ɗǝ ussu Iliya ki mulpatl su' pa?”
9.12: I' ulsisu, “Iliya ki mulpatl pa, appal mus lǝɓa. Imikǝnɗa ki laci tǝn yakǝn mbalǝn, tǝn tle'bǝna diɓǝli, as ngeti?
9.13: Ami pikkini, Iliya a lǝge tambǝyi, sa pǝlit ulnǝ tǝmisiɗa u i, kan unǝ ɗa ki laci tǝntu.” Yesu Ndokǝl Yakǝn Mulmi'gatlǝ
9.14: Nǝs palte' ma' na mil kushti wasu, is yen hwu mbalǝn aga ndǝlsi i, mi' bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa ɗǝ shottibi ne'si.
9.15: Nǝ ye' Yesu, mus hwu mbalǝnyi is kum gagashinti, is lǝtemma'ti nǝkitǝl, sǝ' shinnitti.
9.16: In ngemsi, “Shoti bi kiyakǝn kiniɗa ne'si?”
9.17: I gudǝl nǝm ge'mbalǝni ndǝgiti, i'ultisu, “Mul lashti, i ngu, a mbǝlli' yakuyini, gunǝ mi'gatli ki nge' shilǝn nidɗa.
9.18: Nǝta totǝntu, sai nǝ tala'ti atli, a biwas ɗǝpǝ't pukǝtkǝt, a ti ashti shinwasi, ati pǝ'sanganga. Adlimi milkushti wagiyi sǝppe'kǝlti, sa maniwai.”
9.19: I Yesu ndǝgisi i'ulsisu, “Kini mbalǝn ki nǝgun u nǝbǝ kiɗa la'ti mbadlwai u! Anǝmi taman dǝp ne'kini? Anǝmi taman ngashtibi nǝkini? Mbǝlli nǝn yakǝni.”
9.20: Is mbǝlli' yakǝni. Nǝ mi'gatli yen Yesu u, alǝbi alǝbi i mi'gatli bat yakǝni, i dliwas gon nyepti, in nda atli i'go' bǝdǝlti, a biwas ɗǝ pǝt pukǝtkǝt.
9.21: Yesu ngem mul zǝ'yakǝni, “Kǝnǝ anǝmi uli mbitu?” I bwasisi usu, “Adɗi na' yakǝn.
9.22: Ta tle la'titi ge' utu ko mali, gaki tǝ'tlotiɗa. Ngo nǝnǝgu kǝn ma'pǝl ulǝn u, kum gontinǝn a ɗǝlmi.”
9.23: “ ‘In kǝn manti u?’ ” I Yesu ultisu, “Mus lǝɓa mul pǝ'kǝni ma'mul la'ti mbadlǝ.”
9.24: Alǝbi alǝbi i bwas ki yakǝni usu “A la' mbadlǝ. Kati lǝshi la'ti mbadlǝ taka!”
9.25: Nǝ Yesu yen hwu mbalǝn ɗǝ kitǝl teɗu, im mati du mi'gatli i'ultisu, “Ki, mi'gatlu mul nge' kup kǝm nǝ shilǝn u, a piki bwaski kiti, bǝ tege'ti nǝwai.”
9.26: Kalki la'ti yalki mi'gatli, illi'ti nǝ ndǝlti, dlǝwas ɗǝ nepti, ibbwasti nǝti. I yakǝni palkǝni hwum mbalǝn, i ge' mbalǝn kilǝbi diɓǝli nami usu, “Tamǝcci”
9.27: I Yesu gobto wasi it tlǝlti lya, i' hilya gal.
9.28: I Yesu telibi u i mil kushtiwas ungemti a malgǝni is ultisu, “Ya lakiɗa ma man pekkǝltiwai?”
9.29: I Yesu ulsisu, “Undiyi nǝnɗa pe'twai sainǝ ngeb lya.” Yesu a Dlim Undi Mǝshtu Nǝtǝ'pǝli u Ɗaɗanu
9.30: Is hilya ɗilǝbi, is ɓeu tiya Galili, Yesu alyami tǝ mullǝn maniwai,
9.31: gaki ti kulci' mil kushtiwasi, ti ulsisu, “Sǝnbǝl yakǝn mbalǝn ma'mbalǝn, sin tlotti, in sa tlotu kuma, kalki mutti maki tǝn tlǝti lya.”
9.32: Sine saman shilǝnǝwai, si ɓanti'ngepti. Wokǝn Ngǝli nǝ Nalti?
9.33: Is mbǝ kapalnahum. Nǝ'te'libi u in ngemsi, “Yaki dlimtin tǝn shitu?”
9.34: Ama sa shilǝnwai, gaki tǝn shitu sa shilǝn i tǝn okǝnki baliwasǝn.
9.35: Iddǝm atli, imbe milkushti was kutl nǝ lopi bi, i'ulsisu, “Mulnǝ ɗǝ lyamti tǝt dǝm mulkina u, tikǝ mul dǝb yakǝni, addǝm zheli ki mbalǝn.”
9.36: I'kan na'yakuwon, izziti adlom ɗasi, illuti adli, i'ul sisu,
9.37: “Mulnǝ a nje na'yakǝn kǝnǝ gu u gaki shin i u, ami tǝ njeni. Mulnǝ nje u, ami tǝh njewai, mulnǝ shinǝn suɗuh tǝ njeti.” Mulnǝ ɗa gemmini wai u, ginǝn kǝnǝ
9.38: I Yahaya ultisu, “Mul lashti, miyen mulǝn ɗǝ pekkǝtl mi'gatli nǝ shin wagi, in ultisu tǝs zaki, gaki tiɗa bǝlmi kalwai.”
9.39: I Yesu usu, bi hane twai. Mulǝn kǝn pǝl gagashiti nǝ shinyini, apa alǝbi alǝbi abbyalǝnwai.
9.40: Mulnǝ bǝ ɗa leu badl nǝmini wai u, ginǝn kǝni.
9.41: Mulnǝ abǝlkin mbǝga mal nǝm gaki kini ki Almasihu u, bali ami pikkini, tǝkǝn hol ulnǝ sǝbbǝltwai. Shitu ki pǝl Bezǝn Ulǝn
9.42: Nǝtǝ mulnǝn la'gon ge'na'mili mi'la'ti mbatl nǝ ami tǝppǝl bes lǝɓa, nǝn ngǝtlitti sǝllaki'bal yegǝn nǝ'ti hwu a yalɗakka, a la'ti swage'bal mali.
9.43: In towa'ɗǝ la'tiki ɗǝpǝl beslǝɓa u, a pocitaka. Nǝn ngǝtli' ki, ki tege' gukki lya nǝ ndola toh, ɗǝ gunǝ ki' tege' utu nǝ toh lopu, utuyi mul pǝshtiwai.
9.44: [Alǝbi zhiɓǝl mi'cissi nǝnɗa mǝshtwai, nǝnɗa mbǝshti utuyiwai.]
9.45: In asǝnwa' ɗǝ la'tiki ɗǝ pǝl beslǝɓa u, a pocitaka. Nǝn ngǝtli' ki, ki' tege'gu'ki Lya nǝ ndola asǝn, nǝ sǝllaki ge' ban utu nǝ asǝn lop.
9.46: [Alǝbi zhiɓǝl mi'cissi nǝnɗa mǝshtwai, nǝnɗa mbǝshti utuyiwai.]
9.47: In dwaɗǝn wa'ɗǝ la'tiki ɗǝ pǝl beslǝɓa u, a ngongoli taka. Nǝn ngǝtlikki ki'tege' gukki Lya nǝ dwaɗǝn nǝm, nǝtǝ' laki age'ban utu nǝ dwaɗǝ lop.
9.48: Alǝbi zhiɓil mi'cissi nǝnɗa mǝshtwai, nǝnɗa mbǝshti utuyiwai.
9.49: Nǝ utu sǝ'okkǝl mbalǝn, kan unǝ ɗǝ okkǝl lǝɓa nǝ kukkudu u.
9.50: “Kukkudu ulki zekkini, in kukkudu i a hammu, nǝ yakǝn tǝ mbili' tǝptǝnki? A' dǝmni nǝ kukkudu ge' mba dlwakǝn. Pǝlǝn dǝbki zeki ne'yelsǝni.”

10.1: I Yesu hilya ɗǝlǝbi, illǝ ge' Atl ki Yehudiya, ne' tǝn bigasi ki dlǝlka Uldun. I hwu' mbalǝn maga ma'ti ɗaɗanu, i'kulcisi kan u nǝ'kuɗa u.
10.2: I palisiyawayen mbǝ ma'ti gaki sǝccimbǝlti, is ngemti is ultisu, “Kizoɗa tǝ yakǝn mbalǝn la' kǝli wasa?”
10.4: Is usu, “Musa bǝl mbalǝn sǝllash lwabbatki tlot kutleti, ala kǝliyisi.”
10.5: Yesu ulsisu, “Gaki ndǝlki gawakǝn lakiɗa i Musa lacikin zhiluɗa.
10.6: Amma teɗi ‘Lya kǝnǝnsi, mwani nǝ kǝli.
10.7: Gaki nǝgu a mulǝn za'dyawasi nǝ bwasi, an ngap kǝliwasi.’
10.8: Nǝguni si lopi as dǝm dlinǝm. Akinaki nǝmkǝni sǝkǝn dǝmti dli lopkǝnwai.
10.9: Ulnǝ Lya a mani u, bǝ mbalǝn bwasiwai.”
10.10: A gip libine i milkushtiwas ngemti ɗaɗanu tǝn shilǝngu.
10.11: I' ulsisu, “Mulnǝ ala kǝliwasu, in ngau kundu u, ko'kǝn ti pǝlti nǝki lopi.
10.12: In kǝliyi ala mwani wasu in ngau kundu u, tapǝl kontu ɓalu.” Yesu Alaki mil Albalka (Mt 19:13-15; Lk 18:15-17)
10.13: Mbalǝn ɗǝ mbǝllit Yesu na' mil gaki tǝttǝnsiɗa, i milkushtiwas matisi.
10.14: Nǝ Yesu yeni nǝgu u i uli cillo'si. I' ulsisu “Zakǝn na'mil sǝmmbǝ makkǝni, bi hanesiwai. Gu'ki Lya ki unduwasǝnkǝni.
10.15: Ami dlǝmikkini, mus mulnǝ andǝ nǝ gukki Lya kǝnǝ gunǝ na yakǝn ɗǝpǝlti wai u, tǝkǝn teti ge'guntiwai.”
10.16: I Yesu kansi twadli, ati zissito, ati laki'si albalka. Yakǝn giɗǝnsi mul usǝn (Mt 19:16-30; Lk 18:18-30)
10.17: Nǝ Yesu gollǝtu, i mulǝn pe'tetnǝkitǝl, inngus kinaɗakka, in ngemti i'ultisu, “Mullashti mul zo'mbadlǝ, yakǝntapǝli tambi dlǝwu nǝbǝ kǝnpa'twai u?”
10.18: I Yesu ultisu, “Yalakiɗa i'mbeki zo'mbadlǝ? Mul zo'mbatl nǝnɗawai sai Lya nǝgwasi.
10.19: Man zhilgi, ‘bǝtlo mbalǝnwai. Bǝ pǝl kontwai. Bǝ mǝgǝlwai, bǝdlǝm laga' tǝn mulǝnwai, bǝ dlu mbalǝnwai. Nal mikzǝ'ki.’ ”
10.20: I'ultisu, “Mullashti, mus apǝl undigi a ami na yakǝn.”
10.21: I Yesu yati ya'ki lyamti, i'ultisu, “Ul nǝmkǝn ɓaliki lǝ ki'ul ulnǝ ni'zi u taka, a'bǝl mingi nǝbǝ ulǝn nisi ɗawai u, kǝn mbi lǝɓa a Lya. Apa a'mbǝ a'bǝlǝnkal.”
10.22: Nǝ kub shilǝni i kinawasnda, izzǝga ati du mbadlǝ, gaki usǝn nǝdɗa eye.
10.23: A lǝbi I Yesu ya milkushtiwasi, i'ulsisu, “Nǝn lotiɗa tǝmi' usǝn tege'gu'ki Lya!”
10.24: Milkushti yi kum gagashit ki shilǝnwasi. I Yesu ulsisu ɗaɗanu, “Kini milini, nǝn lotiɗa te'ge guki Lya!
10.25: Nǝte'kǝ mul usǝn ge'guki Lya, nǝn ngǝtlǝ' tǝ lakumi tǝbɓeu ge'shuki allula.”
10.26: Is kum gagashit mulndǝlti, is ultisu, “In nǝgu uɓo, wokǝn mbi pekkǝlkǝn ngu?”
10.27: I Yesu yasi, i'usu, “Ma'mbalǝnɓo mulpǝkkǝnwai, ama bǝ ma'Lya wai. Gaki muslǝɓa mulpǝkǝni ma' Lya.”
10.28: I Bitlus ultisu, “Mi ngu ma za'lǝɓayi mabǝlkikali.”
10.29: Yesu usu, “Bali ami dlǝmi'kini, mulǝn kǝn za'ti libi, ko yelsǝniwas mudlǝ, ko yelsǝniwas mwani, ko dyawasi, ko bwasi, ko milwasi, ko guwasi, gayini nǝkuma shilǝnki Lya,
10.30: apa a'hwol mbi' diɓǝl lǝɓa kutlkutl lǝbi kutl ge' dǝpki nǝguni, nǝ libi, nǝ yelsǝni mudlǝ, nǝ yelsǝni mwani, ne' mi'zǝtti mudlǝ, ne'mil, ne'guh, i ngu kuma nǝ bǝna. A lahila ne, ammbi dliwunǝbǝ kǝn pa'twai u.
10.31: Diɓǝli kǝkina nǝnpaltikali, kikali nǝnpalti kina.” Yesu a Dlim Undi Mǝshtu nǝ Tǝppǝli u Ɗaɗanu (Mt 20:17-19; Lk 18:31-34)
10.32: Si to'ulshelima, Yesu ɗǝ lǝ'akinaɗasi, a milkushtiwas ɗǝ kup gagashinti, mbalǝnyi nǝ ɗǝ bǝdl si kalu sima asi kupɓanti. Im mbǝ' kutl nǝ lopiy, amalgǝni i'go'dlimissi ulnǝ tǝ mbitu.
10.33: I' usu, “I ngu mi sutin Ulshelima, sǝn bǝdl yakǝnmbalǝn ma'bas lǝɓasi ki Lya ne'mi'lashti zhil ki Musa, sin pocitti shilǝnki mǝshti, as bǝl mingi nǝbǝs man Lya wai u.
10.34: Sin lakkitti bi, as bezze'makǝn, as li'ti, as tloti, kalki mutti maki kuma atli lya.” Ngepki Yakubu nǝ Yahaya (Mt 20:20-28)
10.35: Yakubu nǝ Yahaya, milki Zabadi, is sha'temma'ti, is ultisu, “Mullashti, mingepki ki pǝlimi ulǝn.”
10.37: Is ultisu, “Ndǝgimi, cinkǝ te'ge' naltwagi, tǝ nǝm dǝm tǝn toshimtwagi, nǝm tǝn tonawagi.”
10.38: I Yesu ulsisu, “Kimanǝn ulnǝ ngemtini uwai. Kǝn ma'tleti ge'mbǝga malunǝtta tlewa? Ko nǝn ma'pǝlikkin baptisma unǝssǝ' pǝlitǝnwa?”
10.39: Is ultisu, “Mǝn manti.” I Yesu ulsisu, “Mbǝgamalunǝ tatle nǝnali u, nǝnali ki tleni, baptisma u nǝsǝ'pǝli u, nǝnali sǝppǝli kini.
10.40: Ama dǝptǝn toh shimtini, ko tǝn tohna yini, gikǝnwai gunǝ nǝ halta bǝli u. Ai, kǝginǝs pǝli gawasǝn uni.”
10.41: Nǝ milkushtiwas kutli kumi nǝgu u, is gob kub dutu'ki Yakubu nǝ Yahaya.
10.42: I Yesu takisibi i'ulsisu, “Ki manini ginǝ mansi nǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u gumsisi wasǝn sǝnɗǝ nu ne' mbalǝnwasǝn kǝmti sǝnɗǝ pǝlisi ndǝlti.
10.43: Kǝndǝmti nǝgu ge' dlomwakǝnwai, amma mulnǝ ɗǝ lyamti tǝ'dǝm bali age' kini u, sainǝ tadǝm zheli wakǝn.
10.44: Mulnǝ ɗǝlyab dǝb mulkina wakǝn u, sainǝ tadǝm zheli ki kowonngi.
10.45: Gaki yakǝn mbalǝn ma tǝ mbǝni sǝppǝli'bǝna ɗawai, gaki tima tǝppǝl bǝnaɗani, abbǝl dlǝwasi gaki diɓǝl mbalǝn.” Yesu Ndokǝl Baltimawus Dwa u (Mt 20:29-34; Lk 18:35-43)
10.46: Is mbǝkǝci a Yaliko. Ti pe'ti ɗǝ Yaliko ngu, nǝti ne'mikkushtiwasi, nǝ bal dwobgakǝ diɓǝl mbalǝn, i dwa won mul ngeplu shinwasi Baltimawus, yakǝnki Timawus, tiki dǝmi a bishitu.
10.47: Nǝkkumi Yesu mul Nazalat kǝn u, i'go' tlǝl yali ati usu, “Yesu yakǝnki Dauda, kum gontini!”
10.48: I diɓǝl mbalǝn matiti, tǝn bǝshilǝnnuwai. Amma i'gob mbǝtl tlǝl yaltinki, ti usu, “yakǝnki Dauda kum gontini!”
10.49: I Yesu dlili i'usu, “Takitibi teh.” Is taki dwanisi bi teɗi is ultisu, “Albishiliwagi! Leteɗi, ti mbekkibi.”
10.50: Illa' ul idlatti taka, ittlǝtyama' Yesu.
10.51: I Yesu ultisu, “Yaki lyamti ta pǝliki?” Idwani ultisu, “mullashti, tambi yellu!”
10.52: I Yesu ultisu, “Zǝgawagi, la'ti mbalwa' a ndokǝlki.” Alǝbi i'ellu, ibbǝl Yesu kal izzǝga.

11.1: Nǝs ɓalnja' nǝ Ulshelima u nǝ Betapaji, nǝ Betanya, a ma' Zǝnga Ki zaitun, i' Yesu shin mil kushtiwasi lob,
11.2: I Yesu ulsisu, “Tenge' yakǝn gatlu nǝ kina wakǝn u, Nǝte' twakǝn kǝn en' yakǝn zhaki ki kǝndi, gunǝ bǝmulǝn a to tǝnti gason wai u. A' tǝgǝlǝn ti suɗi.
11.3: In mulǝn a ulkinsu, ‘Ya kipǝlin ɗa nǝgu?’ A ulǝnsisu ‘Mulban kǝn ɗǝ lyapti, tǝn patltisut nǝguni.’ ”
11.4: Is zǝga, is le'mbi yakǝn zhaki a kina dlabi a bishitu, is tǝngǝlti.
11.5: Mɓalǝn inǝ ki dlǝli a lǝbi u, is ulsisu, “Ya laki ki tǝngǝtl yakǝn zhaki u ɗa?”
11.6: Is dlǝmisi ulnǝ Yesu pisi u. I mbalǝnni za'si is zǝga,
11.7: Nǝs mbǝlli Yesu yakǝn zhaki u, is lala lulutwasǝn tǝnti, it toh tǝnti.
11.8: I' hwu' mbalǝn lala lulutwasǝn tǝn shitu i'nami caldwa te' ge' dǝlgǝn i gen' dizhan dwai nǝscali te'ge' dǝlgǝni u.
11.9: Mi' ki kina nǝ mi' bǝtl kalwasi asi tlǝl yali asi ussu, “Hosanna! Albalka tǝn mul mbǝ ge' shin ki Lya!
11.10: Albalka ki gut mul mbǝti, ki bwasinǝn Dauda! Hosanna ki Lya!”
11.11: I Yesu te' Ulshelima, i' te'ge libi ki Lya. Nǝ yaya lutya u nǝ' enlu a gemtu, ippeki illǝ Betǝnya nǝ kult nǝ loppi. I Yesu Pǝli Pǝ' ki Kah bi
11.12: Cilkǝlu nǝ za'ti betanya wasǝn, a Yesu ɗǝ kum kuzǝn.
11.13: Nǝ' en pǝkkǝ kah tel lolu u mul dwa lede, Nǝllǝ' ya ni u tambi mil tǝnkiwai. Nǝm mbǝci ma'tu, tambi ulǝn tǝnkiwai amma dwakatl, gaki luɓal kǝpǝtl mil ki kah u wai.
11.14: I ul kah nisisu, “Bǝmulǝn ɗam mil lwanǝwai hal patwagi!” Amilkushtiwas ɗǝ kubti. Yesu Likǝn Libi ki Lya
11.15: Is mbǝci Ulshelima, I Yesu tye ge' libi ki Lya i'gop katti mil ultitaka alǝbi, i'dǝzhanisi kundǝn ki ulpwasǝn taka, ne' mil shotti ulpi, ne'mil utl balutaka,
11.16: Taza'si sǝllǝ ge' libi ki Lya nǝ ulǝn nǝwai,
11.17: Ippisi shilǝn, i ulsisu, “Kilaciɗa: ‘Libi ini nǝndemti libi shilǝn ki Lya ki mi' dǝplǝɓa’ ki ni ɓo ka palliniyi lu dǝpki mǝgǝlsi.”
11.18: Nǝbas lǝɓasi nemi' lashti zhil ki Musa nǝskumshilǝni u is gop ngau shitu kigoptiti sǝ'tloti, gaki mbalǝn diɓǝli sikupɓultwasi, mus dopga ki mbalǝn si kup gagashit ki kushtiwasi.
11.19: Nǝ su' pǝ u Yesu ne' milkushtiwasi is pe' ɗǝ ge'gadli. Shilǝn Tǝn Ko'Kǝn Pǝ' ki kah
11.20: Nǝkyau si ɓeuti, is ye'kah nǝsi akokkǝnyi hal nǝ tlilgisi,
11.21: Bitlus dambǝlti i' ul Yesu su, “Mullashti, nǝya! Kah u nǝ' pǝlibbi u. Akokkǝn i!”
11.22: I Yesu ndǝgi. I' ulsisu, “Lakǝn mbadli tǝn Lya”
11.23: “Bali a mipi'kini, in mulnǝ a ndǝ nǝ Lya u, tǝn ma' utl calgatl usu, ‘Ndus ɗǝki nda swa ge' dlǝlka u’ abǝ ta bwas mba dlwa swai u nǝn pǝlitti ulisi.
11.24: Gaki nǝgu a mi pikkini ulnǝ ka gyemin ge' shilǝn nǝ Lya u, i' ndǝ nǝ nali u, kǝm mbitini.
11.25: Kogassi u kǝn kidlǝlni ɗǝ gyep Lya u, in ka ngapǝn mullǝn mbatlu, a tusintaka, Gaki bwaswakǝn ki lya ma tǝn tusi'kin bezǝn lǝɓawakǝn taka.
11.26: Inkiɗa tusti mulnǝ ngapǝnti mbatl takawai u bwaswakǝn ki lya ma tikǝn ndusi'kin ulnǝ ki pǝliti u takawai.” Ngemti tǝn Ndǝtl ki Yesu
11.27: Nǝspalswa Ulshelima u, ti dut tyagelu libi ki Lya, i Lǝɓasi ne'mi'bǝl lashti zhil ki Musa, nǝ mi'kina ki mbalǝn is mbǝ ma'ti,
11.28: Is ul Yesu su, “Nǝ shitu u kǝn kipǝl usiɗa u? Wokǝn bǝlkishitu kǝpǝlti nǝgu?”
11.29: Yesu i' ulsisu, “Ta pǝllikin undi gyepton. A ndǝgi nǝni, amine adlǝmi'kini nǝ ndǝtl ki okǝn amipǝl usi ɗa.
11.30: Baptisma ki Yahaya sul lya, kǝnpeka koki mbalǝn kǝni? Dlǝminǝni!”
11.31: Is gob shottibi ne' elsǝni asi usu, “In ma ulnǝsu, ‘Sul lya kǝn pe'ku’ tǝn ulminsu ‘Ya lakiɗa bǝma ndǝ ninǝti ɗawai?’
11.32: Ngo nǝnǝgu sa ussu, ‘Ki mbalǝn kǝn u’ ” (Siɓulti' hwu'mbalǝn, nǝ kowongi simani Yahaya mul nje shinkǝ ki Lya kǝni.)
11.33: Is ndǝgi' Yesu, “Simani wai.” I Yesu usu, “Akǝn pi'kini nǝ ndǝltu kǝn amipǝl usi ɗawai.”

12.1: Yesu pǝlisi shilǝn nǝ cibǝlti, i ulsisu, “Mullǝn ɗa mulnǝ pǝl gu inabi. I' gandǝli, i' ɗushu ki cetti mill inabi isi. I' kǝn yakǝn kǝs ki mul ɓutti gu. Ip bǝl mbalǝn yen mi' kwolu kǝ lǝbi. Ilǝge Atliwon.
12.2: Nǝgis cilu, i shin zheliwasi ma mi' kwolu i tǝ'kami' na mil inabi i te'ɗi.
12.3: Ngo nǝnǝgu mi'kwolluyi is gobti, is liti is katti tohwas koni.
12.4: I' shin zheli won' ɗanu ma'si; is li'muli aga, is lati ge'sha.
12.5: I' shin gon'ɗanu, tiɓo, is tloti. I shin gen ɗanu diɓǝli; genwasǝn gen'ɓo is tlosi, genwasǝn ge'si ɓo is li'si.
12.6: Hal nǝgunma Yakǝn, nǝm ɗiti. Gunǝ ti lyapti u. Ibpa' shi' yakǝni swamasi, i' usu, ‘nǝgon as yen naltwasi.’
12.7: Ngo nǝnǝgu mi'kollu i ma is ul elsǝsu ‘Yakuwas kǝngu, mulgu tiɗǝ nje' bwasi nganni, Mi tloti, alǝɓayi dǝmginǝn.’
12.8: Is gobti is tloti, is latitaka tyakalbi.
12.9: Yakǝn tǝ mulgu i pǝli? Tǝn mbǝti a tlwami' kwollu i si, ab bǝlmbalǝn yen gu isi.
12.10: Kiniɓo ka yanǝn shilǝn ki Lya ki laci gasonwaiya? Ki laci ɗa ɗǝ ussu, ‘Zǝnga u nǝ mi' kǝbbi nge u, i dǝm zǝnga gǝsbi ki ze'ki.
12.11: Gu kyautǝn ki Lya kǝni, ma'mini ulki gagashi'kǝni.’ ”
12.12: Bal lǝɓa, nǝ mi' bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa ne' mi'kina is ngau shitu ki gobtiti, simani cimɓǝlti u tǝnsi ni, is kum ɓulti ki hwu mbalǝn. Gaki nǝgu is zati, is ziga wasǝn. Ngepti tǝn Ɓǝtl up Ki ban ki Kaisal
12.13: Is shin palisiyawa yentey nǝ mbalǝn ki Hilidus, gaki si hwodǝl Yesu geshilǝ wasi.
12.14: Nǝs mbǝ u, is ultisu, “Mul, lashti mimani ki mul dlǝb balini, kiɗa olt mbalǝn wai, i' kan kowonngi ndatce, sai kullcit mbalǝn shitu ki Lya kǝnkiɗa. A ndalini ki tǝnɓalt upki banya, ki Kaisalya bal gu ki Loma, ko imi?
12.15: Tǝm ɓatliya kobǝn ɓatliwai?” Ti'ma nǝm mangashtwasǝn u nǝsikǝn ndǝtti u, I'ulsisu, “Yalaki i ki cimbǝltǝn ɗa? Nǝ kaminǝn ulpu te'ɗi tanǝyani.”
12.16: Is kamiktai. I ulsisu, “Shin ki wokǝni nǝ shishipti ki wokǝntǝnki? Is ultisu, ki Kaisalkǝni.”
12.17: I Yesu ulsisu, “Bǝlǝn Kaisal, ulnǝ ki Kaisal u, a'bǝlǝn Lya ulnǝ ki Lya u.” Is kum gagashinti ki Yesu. Ngep tǝn Hillya Ki mi' Mǝshti
12.18: Sadukiyawa, si ussu, tlǝllya ki mi' mǝshtiɗawai, is mbǝ ma ti, nǝ gyemti,
12.19: “Mul lashti” is usu, “Musa alacimi, ǝn yelse ki mulǝn amǝcu, isza kǝliwasi bǝ yakǝn ni'ɗawai u, adǝmi hwel ki kan kǝlisi, azi yelse wagisi mil.
12.20: Is, pǝl mbalǝnyen elsǝni ini mwani gudǝl ninngi. Nǝm pǝl kutleti, immǝci taza yakǝnwai.
12.21: Kilopisi ma i kǝnkǝli i, tima immǝci, tambi Yakǝn sitwai. Ki maki ma nǝgu.
12.22: Nǝgu must ningi i sambi yakǝn ne'twai. Patibisi ikǝli i mǝci.
12.23: Gas, tlǝllya kǝmik mashti, kǝli kǝwo kǝntidǝmi age' si? Gaki muswasǝn sadǝm nǝkǝli isi i.”
12.24: I Yesu ulsisu, “Gaki nǝgu ki gǝlni ɗawaiwa? Gaki kimanǝn lwabatwai, bǝmanǝn pǝlti ki Lya wai.
12.25: Gas tlǝllya kǝmik mǝshti kuletti nǝn ɗawai, abǝkǝndǝti nǝn ɗawai, sitdǝm kǝnǝ milshinkǝn ki Lya kǝni.
12.26: Gaki tlǝl lya kimi mǝshti, kataɓa, dlap lashti ki lwabakki musa waiya, kǝnǝgunǝ Lya ultisu, ‘Ami ki Lya ki Iblahim, nǝ Ishaku nǝ Yakubu waiya?’
12.27: Gi'nǝ Lya wasǝn bǝ mul mushtiwai u, Lya wasǝn kamini. Balini kagǝlni i.” Zhil mul Nalti
12.28: I mul bǝl lashti won ki Musa immbǝ immbisi ɗǝ shotti bi ne yelsǝni. Nǝ' en Yesu apǝlisi shilǝn ki zeki u in gyem Yesu, “Zhilu kǝnki mul natl kǝni?”
12.29: I Yesu ndǝgiti i ultisu “Mul nalti tikǝ, ‘Kumini mi' Islaila, Lya i nǝn, Lya nǝmkǝni.
12.30: Lyam Lya wagi nǝ mbadlwagi, nǝ dliwagi, nǝmanti wagi, nǝ ndǝl twagi.’
12.31: Mul bǝtlti iki, ‘ki Lyam yelsewagi kǝnǝ gawagi.’ Zho ulǝn nǝnɗa ti ngǝtl gu nǝnaltwai.”
12.32: I' mul lashti zhil ki Musa i ultisu, “A ndǝgi balini mul lashti, Lya nǝm kǝni, gonnǝn ɗawai saiti,
12.33: A' lyam Lya nǝ mus mbatlwagi, nǝ mus mantiwagi, nǝ mus ndǝltwagi, a' lyam yel'sewagi kǝnǝ gawagi, Ai ngǝtl ulnǝ ki kyeli Lya u nǝ poshti poshti u nǝ kini ɗa u lolu.”
12.34: Nǝ Yesu Ye'ni tapǝlli shilǝn ki zeki u, I ultisu, “Kiɗa lolu nǝ gu'ki Lya wai.” Pa'ti bisi mulǝn a ngemti nǝ ndǝl ki mbatl ki ullǝn nuwai. Gyep tǝn Ya'kǝn ki Dauda
12.35: Nǝ Yesu ɗǝ, kulcik mbalǝn age libi ki Lya i' usu, “Yalaki i mi' lashti zhil ki Musa usu almasihu yakǝnkǝ Dauda ni?
12.36: Dauda gawasi, tǝn ndǝl ki yalki mbatl ki Lya ki gunti I usu, “ ‘Lya ul Lya i usu, “Dǝm tǝn toh shimtini, he nǝ azǝkki a ga ɗǝ mik ngekki.” ’
12.37: Dauda gawasi immɓe' ki ‘Lya.’ Yala'ti atdǝm yakuwasɗa?” Hwu mbalǝn is ga'ki' kǝm nǝ holtugi. Yesu Ɓuli mi' Lashti Zhil ki Musa Galɗǝga
12.38: A ge'lu kulcik mbalǝn ki Yesu, i' usu, “Pǝn ɗemɗem nǝmi bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa, mi' lyap dunnǝ bas lulugǝl, lyamtiwasǝn tǝ mbalǝn gob shinnissi age'lu ulti nǝ ultitaka,
12.39: lyamtiwasǝn tǝ mbalǝn bǝtlsi ludǝp kizeki age'lu dopga ki Yahudawa, nǝlu daddabǝl.
12.40: Siki mi'ɗap lǝɓa ki mudliyi nǝ mwani mǝcisi u, nǝ pǝtl pyasi' shilǝn nǝ Lya gaki gǝl assan. Sisǝ' pocisi batlti mulndǝlti.” Bǝtl up Ki kǝli u nǝ Mwani Mǝcitu
12.41: I Yesu dǝm malgun kǝlu kap up ki libi ki Lya, ati ya' ulpu nǝsi uttti agibɓi u. Hwu mbalǝn mik ulki toh asi utti ulpi milnalti.
12.42: Amma guli kǝliwonmbǝ gunǝ bǝ ullǝn nǝɗawai u gunǝ mwaniwas mǝci i bǝl bwasti dlom ki kobo, iki kobo nǝm,
12.43: I Yesu taki milkushtiwas bi, i ulsisu, “Balini, amipikkini, ulnǝ guli u utti u gunǝ bǝ ulǝn nǝɗa wai u ngǝl ki mbalǝn kap.
12.44: Musswasǝn si bǝlini tǝngaki usǝn wasǝn, ti ɓo jwa ulnǝ nǝtoh u tǝbǝli, gunǝ itidǝmiti.”

13.1: Yesu ɗǝpeti tet libi ki Lya, nǝm age'mil kushtiwasi i ultisu, “Mullashti, nǝyen undi zǝnga i nǝ kǝpbi i!”
13.2: I Yesu ultisu, “Kǝn ɗǝye' unndibas kǝpbi iwa?” Ba zǝnga u nǝ bǝkǝn dizhatti takawai u.
13.3: Yesu kǝdǝmi atǝn zǝga Zaitun gunǝ ɗǝ ya' libi ki Lya u iki Bitlus, nǝ Yakubu, nǝ Yahaya, nǝ Andalawas is gyemti amalgǝni
13.4: “Dlǝmimi anǝmi sǝppǝl usi u? Undi ulu kǝntǝn yeni gasi u nǝɗǝ lyap ndatu?”
13.5: I Yesu ulsisu, “Maninca bǝ mulǝn gǝl kiniwai.
13.6: Mbalǝn diɓǝli sǝn bǝti ge' shin ini, asi ussu ‘Siki ami,’ hal Sǝngǝl mbalǝn diɓǝli.
13.7: Inki kup shilǝn ki dlati dlati nǝ kumini kumini wasǝn u bǝ ɓatlwakǝn tlǝwai. Hwel nǝgu tǝnda, amma pati bisi i' ɓalla u wai.
13.8: Mɓalǝn nǝntli yelsǝni mbalǝn, gunti, nǝntli gunti. Nǝngotti kup nyapti ki atli agǝ luyen, nǝ kuzǝn. Ngo nǝnǝgu la'ti gǝs ki bǝnani.”
13.9: “Pǝn ɗemɗem nǝ gawakǝn, gakisǝn tilakin kina ɗǝ mik atli, as likin age lu dopga ki Yahudawa. Gaki shin ini, kin dliti akina ɗǝmik kǝndǝdlom nǝ gumsi tǝn gaki ki pisi ulnǝ' manini u.
13.10: Adǝmi hwel gopti shilǝn ki Lya kǝn pa tǝn dlǝmi mbalǝn.
13.11: Ga'si unǝ satǝlakin kina ɗǝ gumsi' u, bǝ hwok kiniwai, ngo nǝnǝgu kini kǝmil shilǝnwai, Yalkimbatl ki Lya kǝn bǝtl kin ulki dlǝmi.
13.12: Yel'se nǝn bǝtl yel'sewasi as tloti, bwasi tǝn bǝtl yakuwasi mil nǝn tlǝlli' mikzi'si as laki a tlosi.
13.13: Mbalǝn nǝnnge'kini gaki shin ini, ngo nǝnǝgu mulnǝ a ngashbi nǝpatwasu tǝnpeti.” Besǝn Bǝna
13.14: Ka yenǝn a dllǝl bezǝn kyautǝn mull cik zhenti gelu unǝ bǝ a mbunwai u (mull dlǝm lashti tǝmmanica), Ginǝ ge' atl ki Yahudiya u as kitǝli as tege'zǝnga.
13.15: Mulnǝ ge libi ki lya u bǝppe' suɗi atte' libi gaki ka' ullǝnwai.
13.16: Mulnǝ agegu u bǝ pal te' ɗǝ ka' lulutwai.
13.17: Mi' tugi nǝ mi' mil kali age'cin u ulki cik go'kǝni!
13.18: Shilǝnni nǝ Lya bǝ ulu nda age' watlǝnwai.
13.19: Age cin u nǝnpǝl bezǝn lǝɓa u nǝ bǝ a pǝldlǝ gason wai u, tun nǝ Lya pǝl dǝplǝɓa, i mbǝl cin ki sǝti, kǝnpǝl u ndwas nǝwai, nǝpatiki dǝplǝɓa.
13.20: “Tǝ' Lya abosǝn mutti takawai u, da mulǝn kǝnsatwai, gaki ginǝ olsi i, in ndokǝl mutti taka.
13.21: Age cin u inmullǝn a ulkisu, ‘Yen Almasihu ngu u!’ Ko ‘yenǝn, ti ngwa!’ Bǝ ndǝniwai.
13.22: Gaki almasihu ki lǝgati nǝ mik njeshinkǝn ki Lya ki lǝgatti sǝn peti teɗi asi pǝl ulkǝ gagashinti tǝn gaki sǝ'gǝl ginǝ' olsi i, ǝnnǝn pǝtu.
13.23: Tǝngaki nǝgu a' pǝn ɗemɗem; apikini mus lǝɓa u nǝ nǝn ndatu.” Patl ki Yakǝn Mbalǝn
13.24: “Amma age' muttyi, kalki bǝna, “ ‘Cin nǝndǝp dǝmshal, Liy kǝn cil nuwai.
13.25: Cadlǝl nǝn gobti nda sullya, Nǝn wu' bas lǝɓa ki lya.’
13.26: “Age' cin u mbalǝn nǝn ye' Yakǝn mbalǝn ɗǝ mbǝtige' ku'kuti, nǝ naltwasi nǝ ndǝlti.
13.27: Tǝnshik mil shinkǝnwas suɗi as dom ginǝ' olsi kal nǝ kina, tohna nǝ tohshimti, nǝ ngwatlti ki dǝplǝɓa nǝ ki lya.” Cimbǝlti tǝn Pǝt ki Kah
13.28: “Kulcin ulǝn tǝn pǝt ki kah: Kayenǝn tǝɓal dǝltu, manini watlǝn ɓal nja i.
13.29: Ɗaɗanu kayenǝn u ndigi ɗǝ ndatu, manini tǝɓal nja i, tǝn bidlabi kǝn tiɓali.
13.30: Balini, amipikkini, hwonnu kǝnpatwai, sainǝ mus usi a nda.
13.31: Lya nǝ atli nǝn pati amma shilǝn yini kǝnpa'twai.”
13.32: “Amma cini nǝ gasi isi, mullǝn maniwai ko mik shinkǝni ko Yakǝni, mul zǝtti mani katl.
13.33: Pǝn ɗemɗem! Dǝmni nǝ manti aki shilǝn nǝ Lya! Gaki ki manǝn gasi u nǝtǝ cin u mbǝ uwai.
13.34: Kǝnǝ mullǝ'lo kǝni: Isza' libiwasi ipbǝl zheliwasi kyautǝn ko gukǝni nǝ kyautǝnwasi, i'ul mul kitǝn dlabi usu Dlǝlgal.
13.35: Dlǝlnigal, gaki kǝmanǝn gasi unǝ tǝmullibini paluwai, ko asuti ko agasi ko abilucili ko nǝ kyau.
13.36: Bǝm mbǝ katl, ambikin ɗǝ nde' Yemmbuɗwai.
13.37: Ulna dlǝmmikini u, I ami pikkini: ‘dlǝlni galt!’ ”

14.1: Mutti lob kǝn ɗǝ as pǝl daddaɓǝl ki ɗakǝshti ki biledi u' nǝ bǝ Yis ɗagibiwai u, I bas lǝɓasi ki Lya nǝ mi'lashti zhil ki Musa is ngau shitu u nǝ sǝ' gob Yesu ɗa u ki hwuni sǝ' tloti.
14.2: Is usu “Bǝspǝli ge' daddaɓǝl luwai, gaki ɓa mbalǝn tlǝl dlati.” I Swati Yesu Mil mul Ulpi Abetani
14.3: Yesu a Betaniya a libi ki mulnǝ si mbeti ki Saminu dakǝl. Ti ɗamti ngu, I kǝliwon mbǝ nǝ yakǝn lǝda gunǝs pǝli nǝ zǝnga ki onis, nǝ mil a giɓi ki naldi mul ulpi. It tatl lǝda mili, it ci ndǝlli' Yesu aga.
14.4: Ginǝ a lǝbi u is kum lwetl ki mbadlǝ, is ul yelsǝni su, “Ya lak kon nǝ milu ɗa nǝgu?
14.5: Tǝ'sa ulin taka u, ngǝtl upki ndacin ki hwon nǝm as bǝlginǝ bǝ ulǝn nisi ɗawai u, da nǝn gǝtlti!” Is mati kǝli isi.
14.6: Iki i Yesu usu. “Zakǝnti, Ya laki iki hwottiti ɗa? Ulki zokki tǝpǝlini.
14.7: Ginǝ bǝ ulǝn nisiɗawai u sinekkini ko gasiukǝni. Ko gasiukǝn ki lyamtini kin pǝlissi zo'lǝɓa, gaki ko gasi u kǝn kine'kǝnwai.
14.8: I kǝliyi pǝl pǝl tiwasi. It bene mil adli it li'kǝnǝni kamin gutǝni.
14.9: Balini amipikkini, mus lu unǝ tǝ dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya tǝn dǝplǝɓa u, sin gobti dlǝb ulnǝ kǝli u pǝli u gaki da mbǝtlti.” Yahuza Dǝgi Ti'bǝl Yesu
14.10: I Yahuza Iskalyoti, nǝm ge' mil kushtiwasi kutl nǝ lobpi, illǝma bas lǝɓasi ki Lya gaki tǝbbǝl yesu masi ɗa.
14.11: Nǝskumi nǝgu u is pǝlhwol mbatli, is ndigi sǝ'bǝlti ulpi. I' Yahuda ngwau shitu ki bǝlti. Yesu ne Mil Kushtiwasi Ɗam Ulkiɗami Gelu Dadabǝl ki Ɗakǝshti
14.12: Cin ki nǝm ki dadabǝl ki biledi gunǝbǝ yis ɗagiɓiwai u, a kuɗi pǝtl dli i ɗǝ poshti yakǝn mbǝla gaki dadabǝl ki ɗakǝshti, i mil kushtiwas gyemti is usu, “A ukǝn ki lyamti tǝn le' likǝni' lu ɗap dadabǝl ki ɗakushti?”
14.13: I' shin mil kushtiwasi gudǝl lob, i' ulsisu, “Ten ge'gatli, kin mati nǝ mullǝn ki kami nǝ tobmal a' bǝlǝnti kali.
14.14: Ulǝn mullibi u nǝ' te giɓi usu, ‘Mul lashti ɗǝ ngau: kǝbsi nǝtǝ' dǝmi ti' ɗap ulki ɗami ki dadaɓǝl ki ɗakǝshti ne mil kushtiwasu?’
14.15: Tǝn mbokikin toh tǝnbal kǝpson ki libi ki lya, gunǝ ki likǝni ki zoki. A lǝbi ki likǝnimi.”
14.16: I' mil kushtiyi za'lǝbi, is su ge'gatli, is mbi ulisi kǝnǝ gunǝ Yesu dlǝmisi u. Is likǝn dadabǝl ki ɗakǝshti.
14.17: Nǝ bisu pǝ u, i Yesu mbǝ ne' milkushtiwas kutl nǝ lob.
14.18: Asi ɗap ulki ɗami ngu, i Yesu usu, “balini amipi'kini, nǝm agekini tin bǝltǝni, gunǝ ti ɗamti nǝ ami u.”
14.19: I mikushwasi ispǝl du'tugi, asi ultisu nǝ nǝm nǝm, “ko a mini?”
14.20: I' ulsisu, “Nǝm ge' kutl nǝ lobpi gunǝ ami ɗamti ge' gal nǝm miti.
14.21: Ya'kǝn mbalǝn nǝn zǝ'ga, kan u nǝɗa kǝlaci tǝntu. Amma ulki zǝ'go'kǝni tǝnmulnǝ nǝn bǝtl yakǝn mbalǝn u, nǝn ngǝtli' muli tǝ azǝntwai.” Ulki ɗami ki mulban
14.22: Si ge' ɗamti, i Yasu kan biledi, nǝn ngem Lya u, iccaccali, ibbǝl mil kushti wasi, i' usu, “Kamini; guɓo dliyikǝni.”
14.23: Iki i'kan mbǝgamal, kimal ki innabi iki in ngem Lya, ibbǝlsi, muswasǝn is tle a giɓi.
14.24: “Guki hwulayini ki njikǝ' alkawali, gunǝ bǝna dli gaki mbalǝn u” i' ulsisu.
14.25: “Bali ami pikkini, akǝn tle' malki innabi nuwai, sai gasiwu nǝta tle pyale' i ge' gu'ki Lya u.”
14.26: Nǝs ulwul ki ndwa'ti Lya u, is peki is totǝn zǝga ki zaitun. Bitlus Nǝn Nge' Ma' Yesu
14.27: I Yesu ulsisu, “Muswakǝn kǝn ndatini, ki laciɗa: ‘An li'ti mul byatl mbǝla i', mbǝla i nǝn dla'ti ga.’
14.28: Amma kal ki tlǝl lya ini, an ngǝtltikin ɗǝ mbǝkǝshti a Galili.”
14.29: I Bitlus usu, “In muswasǝn sǝn ndatu, ami akǝn ndatwai.”
14.30: I Yesu ultisu, “Bali ami dlǝmi'ki, age' gasu, kapǝn tǝ guda la'yal asǝn lop, kǝn usu kǝmanǝn wai asǝn maki.”
14.31: I Bitlus go' dlǝmti nǝndǝlti ati usu, “In nǝn tlotǝn imimiku, akǝn nge' makkiwai.” Muswasǝnma nǝgu sǝ dlǝmi. Yesu Ngem Lya a Gatsemani
14.32: Is lǝge'luwon nǝɗǝ mbettiki Gatsemani, i' ul mil kushtiwasisu, “dǝmniki ta shilǝn nǝ Lya.”
14.33: I' kan Bitlus nǝ Yakubu, nǝ Yahaya, a ge'nǝgu i wuli gop hwottiti a mbadlwasi, i wuli tlwedli.
14.34: I' ulsisu “Mbadli ɗǝ bǝna, kǝnǝ ta mǝci. Dlilni aki, a dlilni gal.”
14.35: Nǝ' ɓeukina ten ngulen u, in nda atli, in ngem Lya, i' usu, in nǝn pǝtu akami' bǝna u taka.
14.36: I' usu, “Abba, Bwasinǝn, mus lǝɓa mul pǝkǝni amaki. Kami mbǝgamalu taka. Musnǝ nǝgu bǝ manti ki gayiwai, gwagi.”
14.37: Ippal te ma' mil kushtiwasi im mbǝsi ɗǝ nde' yemmbuɗi, i' ul Bitlus su, “Bitlus! Nde' embukǝn kiɗaya? Kǝkǝn maddǝb kǝpǝdǝliwaiya?
14.38: Dǝmni ki pǝdǝli a ngemǝn Lya, ɓa'ndan ge' cibǝlti, yalki mbatl ki lya akami i' amma dli a ndǝlwai.”
14.39: Ippal tya ɗaɗɗanu, in ngem Lya, kǝnǝ kiɗigi.
14.40: Nǝppal te'ɗu, im mbisi ɗǝ nde' yemmbuɗi, gaki yemmbu' a njikǝn dwaɗǝn wasǝn. Is hwol ulnǝ sǝ' dlǝmitu.
14.41: Patl te' ki makisi, i' ulsisu, “Kiɗi nde' yemmbuɗi aki shu'ta? Anjikǝn i! Cin ambǝ i. Yanini, sabǝl yakǝn mbalǝn a toh ɗǝ mi' pǝtl bezǝn laɓa i'.
14.42: Hillya! Mǝzǝnga! Mul bǝltǝn u ɓalu!” A Gob Yesu i
14.43: Ti ge' shilǝn, Yahuda ngu, nǝm ge' mil kushtiwasi kutl nǝ lopi, im mbǝ ne' hwu' mbalǝn siki ngapi nǝ bas pǝga nǝ kumbǝl, bas lǝɓasi ki Lya, mi' lashti zhil ki Musa, ne' mi'kina shinsi suɗi.
14.44: Mulbǝtlti u, takǝndi nesi i, “Mulnǝ akucenttu, tiki mullisi: a'gobpǝnti, a'zǝngane'ti a'ngappǝnti kizeki.”
14.45: Nǝ mbǝkki Yahuza, I'lǝmak Yesu, I' ultisu, “mullashti!” I'kucenti.
14.46: Imbalǝni gob Yesu is ngapti nǝ ndǝlti.
14.47: Nǝm ge' milkushti ki Yesu ki dlǝli nja nǝti, in ndust pǝga wasi ittele zheli ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi ki Lya nde'ti, ippa'ti kǝm.
14.48: I Yesu ulsisu, “kipe'ni ton nǝ bas pǝga nǝ kuɓǝl wakǝn ki' gobpǝnnǝn ɗama ami mǝgǝlkǝma?
14.49: Ko gasiwu kǝni amine'kini, age' libi ki Lya ami dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya, kagobnǝnwai. Pǝlǝn dli nǝgu gaki tǝ shilǝnki Lya njikǝnǝnɗa.”
14.50: Musswasǝn alǝbi is za'ti, is kitǝli.
14.51: Yakǝn giɗǝnsiwon gunǝ bǝ ulǝn nidɗa dliwai u amma ul idlatlti katl, ati bǝtl Yesu kal.
14.52: Nǝs'gob Yesu u, i' kitǝli bǝ ulǝn nidɗa dliwai, is zakkisi ul idlatti. Yesu Akina Ɗǝ mi'Dlitl Shilǝn
14.53: Is tǝla Yesu ma' ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi ki Lya, mus bas lǝɓasi, ne' mi'kina, ne' mi'lashti zhil ki Musa is domga ma'ti.
14.54: I Bitlus bǝlti kali, alolu lolu, swa dlomban ɗǝ ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi ki Lya. Alǝbi iddǝm ne' mi'ɓutti dlabi, a ti ko'utu.
14.55: Bas laɓasi ne'mi'dlil shilǝn si ngau ulnǝ sǝm mbi tǝn Yesu u tǝdǝmki ta pǝl byaslǝɓayi sǝm mbi sǝ'tlotti ɗa, sa mbiwai.
14.56: Mbalǝn diɓǝli is lige'ga, biwasǝn anda nǝmwai.
14.57: A ge' kale igyen, shali Yesu lǝga'ga:
14.58: “Mǝkum ti usu, ‘Tǝn batti libi ki lya u nǝ mbalǝn kǝni nǝ toh u, a'kǝn kundu ge'mutti maki, gunǝ'bǝ kǝntiki toh wai u.’ ”
14.59: Mus nǝ nǝgu biwasǝn a nda nǝmwai.
14.60: I ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi ki Lya hiliya akinawasǝn, ingem Yesu, i'ultisu, “Ulki dlimi ni'ɗawaiya? Shilǝn u nǝsi dlimti tǝnkupa?”
14.61: Yesu a shilǝn wai ta dlǝmi' ulǝnwai. I ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi ki Lya ngemti ɗaɗɗanu, “Ko kiki Almasihu yakǝn ki mulnaltwa?”
14.62: Yesu usu, “Amini, kǝn ye' yakǝn mbalǝn kidǝmi tǝntohship ki mul ndǝl ki Lya, ti sussuɗi ge' kukkuti.”
14.63: I ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi kye'kyesh lulugǝllwasi. In gyemi, “Undǝ sheda ukǝn tǝn ngayin ɗaɗanu?
14.64: Ka kumǝn musǝn Lya u nǝppǝli uwaiya. Ya kiyanǝni?” Mus i mbalǝni pochi shilǝn gaki sǝ'tloti.
14.65: I gen gob bezetti makǝn, is kǝndi' dwaɗǝn, is lili'ti, si ultisu, “Dlǝmimi okǝn liki!” Mik ɓutti dlabi ki libi ki Lya is gob lilititi. Bitlus Usu Tǝman Yesu Wai
14.66: Bitlus a atli adlomban ge' libini, I zheli Yakǝn kǝli kǝ bali ki bas lǝɓasi mbǝ.
14.67: Nǝ en Bitlus ɗiko' utu u, I' yati kizekki. I' ultisu, “Kima a yenǝnki nǝ Yesu, Banazelet tu!”
14.68: Amma i musǝn matti, i' usu, “Aman ulnǝ ki dlǝmti uwaima.” Nǝdl dlǝmi nǝgu u, i' hilya illǝbidla, alǝmdǝmtwai i guda la'yali.
14.69: I zheli yakǝn kiliyi yenti, itl dlǝmi ginǝ ki dlǝli alǝbi u, “Guma age' si tiɗa.”
14.70: Immusǝnte ɗaɗanu. Alǝn dǝmtwai, iki dlili i is ul Bitlus su, “Kima nǝmwasǝn kǝni, gaki kimul Galilini.”
14.71: I Bitlus pǝli gawas bi. Ati Lenceti, ati ussu, “Aman mulnǝ kishilǝn tǝntuwai.”
14.72: Alǝbi alǝbi i guda la'yali asǝn lob. I Bitlus dambǝl shilǝn unǝ Yesu pitu, “Kapǝn tǝgunda la'yali ki asǝn lob, kǝnmusǝnti nǝ ami asǝn maki.” Nǝ' dambǝlli u, iki immbutlgekulu.

15.1: Nǝcil kǝlu, bas lǝɓasi ki Lya nǝ mikkina ki lashti zhil ki Musa, mus mi' dlil shilǝn is dlǝl shilǝn. Tǝngaki sǝ' kǝndǝ Yesu, is ziga nǝti, is bǝl Bilatus ti.
15.2: I Bilatus gyemti i' ultisu “Kiki guu ki Yahudawaya?” I Yesu ndǝgiti i'usu, “Nǝgu ki dlǝmi.”
15.3: I bas lǝɓasi ki Lya is gob dagǝtlti tǝnlǝɓa diɓǝli.
15.4: I Bilatus gyemti ɗanu i' ultisu, “Ki ngu, si dagǝtlti tǝn lǝɓa diɓǝli, kikǝn ndǝgissi waiya?”
15.5: Amma hal nǝguni Yesu appallisi shilǝnwai, i uli hwot Bilatus. Apoci Yesu Mǝshti
15.6: Ulnǝ guu kuɗi pelti agas cin ki dadabǝl tǝn zakkissi mulnǝmi nǝm kige' kulkuku gunǝ mbalǝn ngemi u.
15.7: Mulǝnɗa si mbettiki Balnabas gunǝ ki kǝndǝ age' kulkuku u, ne'mi'ndǝlkiga ginǝ mbǝ mǝshti age' cin ki ndǝlkiga.
15.8: I dobga ki hwu mbalǝn is mbǝ ma'Bǝlatus tǝppǝlisi ulnǝ' kuɗǝ pǝlti u.
15.9: I Bǝlatus ngemsi i'usu, “Ki lyamtini ta zakikkin guu ki Yahudawaya?”
15.10: Gaki tamaniyi si usu gaki ngetti lakiɗa i bas lǝɓasi ki Lya bǝl Yesu a tohwasi.
15.11: I bas lǝɓasi ki Lya is datti mbalǝn shilǝn bi, sǝ'usu tǝzzakisi Balnabas ge'shuki Yesu.
15.12: I Bǝlatus ngyemsi ɗaɗanu, “I mikǝn ta pǝli nǝmulnǝ ki mbetti ki guu ki Yahudawa u?”
15.13: Is mbǝl la'ti yal tǝnki ɗaɗanu asi usu, “Tolǝnti tǝn gadlǝnnga!”
15.14: I Bǝlatus ngemsi, “Yalakiɗa? Bezǝn lǝɓa yakǝn tǝpǝli?” Is mbǝl tlǝlyal tǝnki asi usu, “Loti!”
15.15: Bǝlatus ɗǝ lyamti tǝppǝli mbalǝn ulnǝ mba tlwasǝn ɗǝ lyamti u, is zakisi Balnabas. Illaki is lǝ' Yesu u, ibbǝli, sǝ' tolti tǝn gadlǝnnga. Sojoji is Laki Yesu Bi
15.16: I sojoji zǝga nǝti a tya bidla ɗǝ guu, (iki bidla ki gunti) is domi diɓǝl sojoji ga.
15.17: Is laki'lulǝgǝl undi ki gumsi mul hwula gagi, is pǝl kulu gawon ki gumsi ki ili, is shimi'ga.
15.18: Is go'shinitti si usu, “Tǝ Lya pǝli'pyasti ki mutti guu ki Yahudawa!”
15.19: Is go'li'titi aga nǝ kumbǝl, asi bezetti makǝn. Is ngus atli tǝnsi bǝtlti nalti.
15.20: Nǝspa' lakkitti bi nǝgu u, is tusi' lulǝgǝl ki guntisi taka, is lakki' lulǝgǝlwasi. Iki is sulti dla gaki sǝ'tloti. Atol Yesu tǝn Gadlǝnnga Yi
15.21: Sige'zǝgga, sai mulǝn kǝngu ɗǝ ɓeuti, mulshin Siman, mulki Sayilin, mul zǝg Elekzanda nǝ Lupus, ti petite'ge' yakǝn gatlon, is la'ti nǝngesi ɗǝka' gadlǝnga ki Yesu.
15.22: Is tǝla Yesu ge'luwon si mbellǝbisi ki golgota, (iki “Luga mbalǝn”).
15.23: Alǝbi sitaki' malki inabi kigushli nǝ mul in nge tleti.
15.24: Iki is tolti tǝn gadlǝnga. Is bwas lulǝgǝlwasi age' dlomwasǝn, is pǝl kuli a tǝn gaki sǝ'en ulnǝ tǝ kowon ngi mbi u.
15.25: Nǝ dom ki nǝtapsi ki nikyeukǝn si tolti tǝn gadlǝnnga.
15.26: Is lash shilǝn ki dagǝtlti aga ɗa'ka, “Tiki Guki Yahudawa.”
15.27: Is tol mǝgǝlsi lop tǝn gadlǝnnga ne'ti, gudǝl nǝm tǝn toh shimti, gudǝl nǝm tǝn tohna.
15.28: [Gukǝ njikǝ'ki nasi u nǝ' usu, “Sa ɓǝtlti ge'mi' pǝl byas lǝɓa.”]
15.29: Mi'ɓeuti is go'pitti du shilǝn du shilǝn ya' shuge mbalǝn, asi wuga, asi ussu, “Kiwunǝ kin batti libi ki Lya, a'kǝni ge'mutti makwa,
15.30: Pe'sutɗǝtǝn gǝdlǝnnga uɗa, a' Pe'kǝl gawa' ɗa!”
15.31: Nǝgu bas lǝɓasi ki Lya ne'mi' lashti zhil ki Musa is gob lakkittibi age' dlomwasǝn asi ussu, “Tapekǝl gen i', bǝtaman pekǝl gawa swai!
15.32: Almasihu u, guki isla'ila, tǝppe'sudɗǝ tǝn gǝdlǝnnga nǝgun ɗa, mima anyeni anla' mbatlɗa.” Ginǝs tloti ne'tu sima is gob byalti. Mǝshti ki Yesu
15.33: A bal dloncin, i dǝmshal idla atli, i dom maki ki su'pǝɗa.
15.34: Nǝ dom maki ki su'ti, i Yesu shilǝn nǝ ndǝlti i'usu, “Eloi, eloi, blama sabaktani?” (Iki, “Lya yini, Lya yini, ya lakiɗa i'lakǝntaka?”)
15.35: Nǝ ginǝ ki dlili alǝbi kumi nǝgu u, is usu, “In ngu, timbe' Iliya bi.”
15.36: Nǝ mwasǝn kitǝli, i lap soso ge'mbya mal ishimi tǝn kumbǝl It taki Yesu gaki tǝtle, i ussu, “Dlilni tǝn ya nini ko Iliya nǝn pekǝlti suɗi.”
15.37: I Yesu shilǝn nǝ ndǝlti, iki mǝshtwasi.
15.38: Iki labule kige libi ki Lya bwasi lǝbi lop, nǝ alya nǝ tli.
15.39: Mwani mul ndǝl ki mbalt, gunǝ ki dlǝlli akina ɗǝ Yesu u, nǝ' yen mǝshti, ki Yesu u i' usu, “Balini, mulu yakǝn ki Lya kǝni!”
15.40: Mudli yen is dlǝltel lolu ɗǝ yallu. Ge'si Malyamu Magadaliya, nǝ Malyamu dyaki Yakubu Yakǝni nǝ Yusupu, nǝ Salomi.
15.41: A te' Galili mudliyi bǝlti kali asi pǝlitti kyautǝn. Mudli yen ɗaɗanu diɓǝli nǝs mbǝne'ti a Ulshelima asi lǝbi. Agu Yesu I
15.42: A suti, ɗǝ mbǝtti tǝlu cillu cin ki shuti ki Yadudawa.
15.43: Yusupu mbǝ, mulki Almatiya, mul dlil shilǝn kǝni, mul pǝli'mbalǝn zo'lǝɓa, mul ɓutti gukki Lya u, tǝ mbǝ. Ippǝl ndǝlki mbadli illǝma'Bilatus, in ngemi sǝ'bǝlti dliki Yesu.
15.44: I Bilatus kum gagashinti nǝ'kumi Yesu a mǝccu. Imbe soja yibi in ngemti balima Yesu a mǝccuwa?
15.45: Nǝm mani nǝgu u abiɗi soja u, ibbǝl Yusupu dli i.
15.46: I Yusupu wul likkapani ki lilin. Nǝ'shi' Yesu u, illa'ti ge'li'kapani ki lili i, illa'ti ge'lu gum mbalǝn gunǝs ɗugi ge' zǝnga u, ibbǝdǝl zǝga i tǝn bishu gun mbalǝni.
15.47: Malyamu Magadaliya nǝ Malyamu dyaki Yusupu is yen lu u nǝs guti ɗa u.

16.1: Nǝ cin shuti ɓe u, Malyamu Magadaliya, nǝ Malyamu dya ki Yakubu, nǝ Salomi, is ul mil ki tukǝni dli mul tǝmti, gaki sǝlle' tukǝ dli ki Yesu.
16.2: Gas cin ki kina ki shuti, a bilucili petito' kǝccin is lǝge'lu u nǝs gutiɗa u.
16.3: Asi tǝn shitu is ngem yelsǝnisu, “Okǝn jakǝnimmin yegǝn u taka ɗǝbi shu ki gum mbalǝn u?”
16.4: Nǝs tlil ga lya u, is yeni, a jakǝn yegǝni taka malgǝni i, in ngu, balini.
16.5: Sisu'ge'lu gum mbalǝni, is yen yakǝn giɗǝnsiwon ki dǝmi tǝn toh shimti, ki dlili nǝ hwol lulǝgǝl. Is kum ɓanti.
16.6: Tine i'ulsisu, “Bǝ kumǝn ɓantwai. Yesu mul Nazalat kǝnki ngauhtiya? Gunǝs tolti tǝn gadlǝnngawa? Ta hilya tiɗawai. Yenǝn lu u nes la'ti ɗa u!
16.7: Nǝgun u zǝnga ki dlimi mil kushtiwasi, nǝ Bitlus, ‘Yesu yinǝn ngǝltikin nǝ mbǝkǝshti a Galili, tyaka ki yenǝnti kǝnǝ kan u nǝ' dlimikini u.’ ”
16.8: I mudliyi pe'nǝ kitǝl, uli a hwossi i asi nepti ki dli. Sa ul mulǝnsu ulǝnwai, gaki sikub ɓanti. I Yesu Mbǝl Gawas ma' Malyamu Magadaliya
16.9: Nǝ Yesu hilya ge' mi'mǝshtu nǝ kyeu gascin kǝkina ki shuti, im mbǝl gawas ma' Malyamu ki Magadala, kǝli u nǝ Yesu pe'kǝli' mi'gatli ningi u.
16.10: Tine is zǝga ille'dlǝmi mbalǝnyi nǝ, sine' Yesu teɗu, ginǝ si du mbadli, asi kulu.
16.11: Nǝs kumi Yesu a mǝci ta hilya u, tima kǝliyi i'enti, sine sala' mbatl nǝtiwai. Yesu Mbǝl Gawas ma' Mil kushtiwasi Lop
16.12: Kalki nǝgu i Yesu bǝ gedli kishoti Immbǝl gawasi ma' mbalǝn yen'lob age' mil kushtiwasi asi lǝti ge' ya'kǝn gatlon.
16.13: I lopi paltya is dlimi na yelsǝniyi nǝ sine' siyi, is nge nditi nǝ dlimtiwasǝn. Kyautǝn u nǝ Yesu Bǝl Mil kushtiwasu
16.14: Age' kale immbǝl gawas ma'kutl nǝ nǝmisi, sigawasǝn, nǝsi ɗamti u. Immatisi tǝn ngela'ti mbadlwasǝn nǝ ndilkǝ gawasǝn, sa ndi'nǝ ginǝ yen hillya wasuwai.
16.15: I'ulsisu, “Zǝnga ge'dǝplǝɓa, ki'dlǝmi mus mbalǝn shilǝn ki Lya.
16.16: Mus ginǝ ala'mbadlu, i pǝlisi baptisma u, sǝm mbi' pe'ti. Mulnǝ a nge la'ti mbadlu tǝkǝn mbi' pe'twai.
16.17: Nǝn ye' ulki gagashinti ma' mi'la'ti mbadli, nǝ shinyikǝn sǝppekkǝl mi'gatli, sǝn shilǝnti nǝ undi biyen,
16.18: Sǝmma' ka' uci nǝ toh, sǝmma' tle' byaslǝɓa, kǝn pǝlissi ulǝnwai, sǝmma'zǝ' mil gottoh as ndoki.” Akan Yesu Twa lyayi
16.19: Ge' kalki Yesu apa pissi shilǝn i, is kanti twalya, iddǝm tǝn toshipki Lya.
16.20: I mil kushtiwas peki, is go'dlǝb shilǝnki Lya, a Lya go' ɗǝtl isi, is mani bali shilǝn u nǝ' dlimisi u tu'tǝn ye'gagashintu nǝsi pǝli.

1.1: Age lwatbati ki nǝm, Tiyapolos, na laci atǝn mus unnǝ Yesu gop pǝlti nǝ kushti u,
1.2: i mbǝl cin u nǝs kanti twalya u, kal ki ta bǝl zhili tu'ma Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ma mi'shinkǝn u nǝ'shinsi u.
1.3: Kal ki tle bǝnawasi immbǝl gawasi masi tǝn sǝ' mani kami tiɗa nǝ ndǝlti mul nalti, ati mbǝ ma'si dlepdlep mutti kutl kutl lǝbi upsi, ati dlǝp shilǝn ki libi ki gu' ki Lya.
1.4: Age cin won, ati ɗap ulki ɗami nesi, immbǝlsi zhil gu “Bǝs zǝga ɗǝ Ulushelima pa wai, sǝ' mbu' njikǝ' ki shilǝn u nǝ mul ban pǝli u, gunǝ' kumin abi i u,
1.5: Yahaya ɓo, nǝ mal kǝn tǝ pǝli mbalǝn batisma, amma kal ki mutti ten nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya kǝn tǝ' pǝlikin batisma.” Akan Yesu Twa lya i
1.6: I mil shinkǝnwas domga ma'ti is gyemti, “Mulban, nǝgun u ki' palli Islaila gunta?”
1.7: I' ulsisu: “Mat cin ko hwon nǝ mulban guu Lya zi' tǝn ndǝltwasi gwakǝnkǝnwai.
1.8: Amma kǝn nje ndǝlti in Yal ki mbatl ki Lya a suikin suɗu; kǝn dǝmitǝn mi' yenti nǝ dwaɗi a Ulshelima, nǝ a Yahudiya nǝ Samaliya, nǝ pa'ti ki dǝp lǝɓa.”
1.9: Kal ki ta dlǝm gu i, i kanti twa lya atǝn dwaɗǝnwasǝn, i kukuti idlati, sa yenti nuwai.
1.10: Sǝge yallu twalya ati zǝ'ga, iki mbalǝn loppen kǝnngi ge' hwol luluti amalgunwasǝn.
1.11: Is ussu, “Mbalǝn ki Galili, yalakiɗa i' dlǝlni aki, aki ya'lu twalya ɗa? Nǝm Yesu u, nǝs kanti twalya u, tǝn palti kan u nǝs kanti taka ɗǝ ma'kini twalya u.” A ol Matiyes i Tǝ' njikǝn Shu ki Yahuza
1.12: Iki i mi'shinkǝn paltya Ulshelima nǝs palsud tǝn zǝnga gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki Zǝnga Zaitun, gunǝ nja nǝ gadl ki Ulshelima lǝ' ki mil nǝm.
1.13: Nǝs mbǝci' u, is toge' kǝpsi ki lya gunǝ si dǝp a giɓi u. Ginǝ mbǝyi siki Bitlus, Yahaya, Yakubu nǝ Andalawus, Pilibus, nǝ Toma, Baltholomawus nǝ Matiyu, Yakubu yakǝn ki Halpa nǝ Siman Zaloti, nǝ Yahuza yakǝn ki Yakubu ɗaɗanu.
1.14: Mus is dom ga nǝ mbatl nǝm asi shilǝn nǝ Lya, ne' mudli yen nǝ Maliyamu dya ki Yesu, nǝ yelsǝni ki Yesu.
1.15: Age muttiyi Bitlus hillya gal adlom ki mil bǝtl Yesu kal (dopga ki mbalǝni kutl cen nǝm nǝ kutl lǝbi lop)
1.16: Kini “Yelsǝni ini mwani nǝ mudli, hwel kǝn tǝn njikǝn lwatbatu gunǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya shilǝni tu' bi ɗǝ Dauda teɗi tǝn Yahuza, gunǝ nde mi' gopti Yesu kina u.
1.17: Tima nǝmkǝni ge'mini teɗi gunǝ olti tǝppǝl kyautǝn ki Lya ne'mini u.”
1.18: (Nǝ ulnǝs bǝlti ki bezǝn kyautǝnwasi, Yahuza ul lu ɗa; a kikǝn tǝ nda nǝ ga, i tugwas mbutli, i mus o'twas bena.
1.19: I kowonngi a Ulushalima kumgu, iki is mbe lǝbisi nǝ biwasǝn Akaldama, iki, lu ki hwula.)
1.20: Bitlus usu, “Tǝn gaki ki laci ɗa ge' lwatbati ki Zabula: “ ‘Libi wasi nǝn dǝmti ko'ni, bǝ mulǝn dǝmgiɓiwai.’ ‘Naltwasi tǝ mulǝn akami.’ ”
1.21: “Nǝguɗa, hwel kǝni tǝn ollǝn mulǝn age' mbalǝn i nǝ ne'mini u, mus cin u nǝ Mulban inǝn Yesu ɗǝ dǝp ne'mini u,
1.22: Gopi tǝn batisma unǝ Yahaya pǝli u, i mbǝl cin u nǝs kan Yesu ɗǝma'mini u. Hwel kǝni nǝm age' mbalǝn gi, ti' pǝl yenti nǝ dwaɗǝn ki hillya ki Yesu ge' mi'mǝshti, ne'mini.”
1.23: Is mbo' tohtǝn mbalǝn lop: Yusupu gunǝ si mbeti ki Balsaba (si mbeti ɗaɗanu ki Yustus) nǝ Matiyes.
1.24: Iki is shilǝn nǝ Lya, is usu, “Mulban inǝn ki mul ma' mbalt ki mus mbalǝn. Age' mbalǝn lopi mbokimi tohtǝn gunǝ' oltu,
1.25: tǝ' dǝp mulshinkǝn ki kyautǝn gunǝ Yahuza zaki is zǝga ge'lu unǝ mbunnitu.”
1.26: Iki is pǝl olti, i ndatǝn Matiyes; i mbǝltǝn kutl nǝ nǝm mi.

2.1: Nǝ cinkǝ penticos mbǝ u, kummwasǝn mi'kushti asi gelu kǝnǝmi.
2.2: Sige nǝgu i kum otiluwon sullya, kǝnǝ mbǝ' ki bal yetǝl, i mbǝ i ikǝn libi u nǝ siki dǝmi giɓi u.
2.3: I uliyen kǝnǝ lǝga ki bǝlǝn utu i bwasi tya tǝn gawasǝn.
2.4: Kummwasǝn is ikǝn nǝ Yal ki batl ki Lya is gop shilǝn nǝ unndi biyen nǝ Yal ki batl ki Lya bǝlsi u.
2.5: Yahudawa yen ɗa mi' bǝtl zhil ki Musa, asi ki dǝmi a Ulushelima, nǝs pete'ge atlen ki dǝplǝɓa.
2.6: Nǝs kum o'tilu u, i dopga ki mbalǝn mani, ilu hwodǝli, tǝngaki kowonngi ɗǝ kupsi asi shilǝn nǝ bishilǝnwasǝn.
2.7: Iki is kum gagashinti, asi usu, “Mi' Galili ɗǝ shilǝn u waiwa?
2.8: Ya lakiɗa musinǝn mi kupsi ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ bi inǝn?
2.9: Mingu paltiyawani nǝ Madiyana nǝ Elamawa, mi' dǝp ki atl ki Bagadaza, nǝ ki Yahudiya nǝ ki Kapadokiya, nǝ ki Pantas nǝ ki Asiya,
2.10: nǝ ki Pilijiya, nǝ ki Bampiliya, nǝ ki Masal, nǝ kuma yanki Kulane ki atl ki Libiya nǝ sǝmbǝlsi te' Loma, wato mi ginǝ zǝmi ge' bǝtl Lya ki Yahudawa, nǝ mbalǝnyi nǝ tege' bǝtl Lya undi ki Yahudawa u,
2.11: nǝ Kalitawa nǝ Lalabawa, mus mi kupsi ɗǝ shilǝn ki bas lǝɓa ki Lya nǝ bi kige' gatlinǝn.”
2.12: Mus is kum gagashinti, is hwoɗǝli, is gop gyep yelsǝni, “Yakǝn ngu?”
2.13: I gyen, ngayisi shilǝn is usu, “Mal ki innabi si tle iye.” I Bitlus Shilǝn nǝ Mbalǝn Diɓǝli
2.14: Iki i Bitlus hilya nǝ kutl nǝ nǝm mi, i' tlǝl Yal i' shilǝn nǝ diɓǝl mbalǝn, i' usu, “Yelsǝni ini Yahudawa nǝ mus mi' dǝp a Ulshelima, hwe ta pikin shilǝn u; gakǝn kǝm ki zeki tǝn ulnǝ ta dlǝmi u.
2.15: Mbalǝn yi sǝ tle mal ki innabiwai, kan u nǝki zitini uwai, nǝgun dom ki nǝtapsi katl kinǝkyau!
2.16: Guki ulnǝ Joyel mul nje shinkǝn ki Lya shilǝn tǝnki u ti usu:
2.17: “ ‘Age pa'ti ki dǝp lǝɓa, Lya usu, anbine' mus mbalǝn Yal ki mbatl ki Lya suɗi. Millwakǝn mwani nǝ mudli sǝn shilǝnti nǝ ndǝtl ki Lya, tlu'ti nǝn mbi mil giɗǝnsiwakǝn, kolsiwakǝn sǝn tlu'ti.
2.18: Nǝguɗa, ge' muttu zhelsi ini mwani nǝ mudli anbine'si Yal ki mbatl ki Lya suɗi sǝn shilǝnti nǝ ndǝtl ki Lya ɗaɗanu.
2.19: Anpǝli'si ulki gagashinti a lya, nǝ lwaɗi su'atli, iki hwula, nǝ utu, nǝ hillya ki cil.
2.20: Kapǝn mbǝ ki Mulban balcin mul naltu, cin nǝ patl dǝpshal lyi nǝn patl hwula.
2.21: Age' cin u nǝn dǝmti mus mulnǝ mbe' shin ki Lya u tǝn mbi pe'ti.’ ”
2.22: “Kini yelsǝni ini Isla'ilawa gakǝn kǝm tǝn shilǝn u: Yesu mul Nazalat gunǝ Lya kǝni ma'kini tu tǝn, pǝl ulki ki gagashinti, nǝ ulki ngaptibi nǝ lwaɗi, gunǝ Lya pǝli ge' kini tumati, gunǝn yeninini nǝ dwaɗǝwakǝn u.
2.23: Mul gu, Lya nǝ gawasi ti bǝlkinti a toh wakǝn nǝ kan u nǝs zi nǝ mantiwasi nǝ ndǝ'twasi, kini nǝ ɗǝlki mil bezǝn lǝɓa, ki tolinti tǝn gadlǝnnga i' tloti.
2.24: Ngonǝ nǝgu i Lya tlǝlti ɗǝ ge' mi'mǝshti, tǝngaki mushti aman ngaptiwai. Lya tlǝlti ɗǝ ge' mi'mǝshti, tǝngaki mushti aman ngaptiwai.
2.25: Dauda shilǝn tǝnti i' usu: “ ‘Ko gaswukǝni Mulban akina ini, ti tǝn toh shimtini, tǝn gaki ɓa wuni.
2.26: Tǝngaki nǝgu mbatlini ɗǝ hwoltugi, lǝga ini ɗǝ utl ulki hwoltugi, dli ini nǝn dǝmti nǝ lati mbatli,
2.27: tǝngaki nǝgu tikǝn zati dli ini age zuɗiwai, ki kǝn zati mulguntwagi apɓoswai.
2.28: Tǝn la'ti aman shitu ki mbadli. Tǝn ikǝntǝn nǝ hwoltugi akinawasi.’
2.29: “Yelsǝni ini Isla'ila, amma' pi'kin shilǝn bǝnǝ catl mbadlwai atǝn bwas ki bwasinǝn Dawuda. Dawuda ta mǝci, akupti. Zuɗiwasi ama'mini hal nǝguni.
2.30: Amma ti mul njeshinkǝn ki Lya kǝni timanini Lya apǝli' ndǝ'ti nǝ ndaltannaca, tǝn zǝ'nǝm ge' gǝswasi tǝn guntwasi.
2.31: Tun teɗi Dawuda a yenini, i' shilǝni tǝn hillya ki Almasihu ɗǝ ge' mi' mǝshti, tǝkǝn zatiti age zuɗiwai, dliwas kǝn ɓostwai.
2.32: I Lya tlilti Yesu ɗǝ ge mi' mǝshti, mussinǝn ɗaɗanu mi' yenti nǝ dwaɗǝn kǝni.
