2.33: Ngo nǝnǝgu a nalti tǝn tohship ki Lya i, ta nje Yal ki mbatl ki zoki mul gunti ma bwasi, kan u nǝppǝl ndǝ'ti, tin bina' Yal ki mbatl ki Lya tǝn ga inǝn, i mbǝl ulnǝ yenini u nǝ ulnǝ kumini u.
2.34: Dawuda tolyawai, tinǝ gawasi, i' usu, “ ‘Mulban ul mulban isu, “dǝm a tohshimtini,
2.35: Sai nǝ ala' mi'ngeki agǝs asǝn wagi.” ’
2.36: Tǝn gaki nǝgu, mus Isla'ila sǝnmanica Yesu u nǝ' tolti tǝn gadlǝnnga u, Lya apalti mulban nǝ Almasihu.”
2.37: Nǝ mbalǝn kumi nǝgu u, i shilǝnisi tǝnisi mbadli, is ul Bitlus nǝ na mi'shinkǝn usu, “Yelsǝni, yakǝn tǝn pǝlini?”
2.38: I Bitlus pisi, “Zakǝn pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa a pǝlikin Batisma, kowonngi, ge' shinki Yesu Almasihu tǝn ti' paci kin bezǝn lǝɓawakǝnɗa. Kǝn mbi bǝlti ki Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ki zoki.
2.39: Ndǝ'tu kini pǝli kini nǝ milwakǝn nǝ ginǝ lolu, nǝ mus ginǝ mulban Lya nǝn mbessibi u.”
2.40: Nǝ shilǝn mul diɓǝtl kǝn ti dǝlisi kǝm; i' matisi, “Pekǝlǝn gawakǝn ɗǝge' besǝn hwon ki nǝguni.”
2.41: Ginǝ kum shilǝn u ipǝlisi Batisma, ge'cin u mbalǝn zangu maki mbǝltǝnsi. Dǝp ki mi'bǝtl Yesu kal
2.42: Is ga'kǝm, tǝn kushti ki mi' shinkǝn ɗǝ pǝlti u, asi ma'ga nǝ yelsǝni, asi ɗamti gelu kǝnǝmi, asi shilǝn nǝ Lya.
2.43: Is kum ɓanti, nǝ ulki gagashin nǝ lwaɗi nǝ Lya pǝli ma mi' shinkǝn u.
2.44: Mus mi'bǝtl Yesu si ge'lu kǝnǝmi mus lǝɓawasǝn ge'lu kǝnǝmi.
2.45: Is ul lǝɓawasǝn taka nǝ nisiɗa u asi bwasi' yelsǝni wasǝn ulpisi ginǝ bǝnisi ɗawai u tǝn lyamtiwasǝn.
2.46: Ko gasiwukǝni si dopga age' libi ki Lya nǝ mbatl nǝm. Asi ɗap ulki ɗami a libiwasǝn ge'lu kǝnǝmi, si ɗapti asi tleti nǝ hwoltugi, nǝ ndǝti ki mbatli.
2.47: Is dǝmshot si ngep Lya asi mbi hwol hwula ma mbalǝn. Ko cin u kǝni a Lya ɗǝ mbǝl diɓǝltwasǝn tǝnki ginǝs pe'tu.

3.1: Gasiwon Bitlus nǝ Yahaya silǝ' libi ki Lya cin ki shilǝn nǝ Lya, dom ki maki ki cin su'ti.
3.2: I ki mulǝn kǝn ngu gunǝs zǝ'ti dakǝl, si mbǝtlti a bidlabi libi ki Lya guni ɗǝ mbe'ti zeki, alǝbi si zǝ'ti ko anǝmi ɗǝ ngeplu ma' ginǝ ɗǝ te'ge libi ki Lya u.
3.3: Nǝ'yen ki Bitlus nǝ Yahaya u ɗǝ te' libi ki Lya u. I' ngemsi ɗǝ ulpi.
3.4: I Bitlus utti' dwaɗǝn, isi Yahaya. I Bitlus usu, “Yami!”
3.5: I mus i' ga'kisi kǝm, nǝ lati mbatli ki mbi ulǝn ma'si.
3.6: I Bitlus usu, “Upɓo ni ɗawai, tǝn gaki nǝgu ulnǝ ni ɗa u ita bǝlki. Ge shinki Yesu ki Nazalat, ɗaki lǝ.”
3.7: I ki i Bitlus ngap tohwasi ki tohshmti, i' tliltilya, nǝ dleuti asǝnwasi nǝ Yal asǝnwasi i ndǝli.
3.8: Nǝ dleuti ippe'lya tǝn asǝnwasi i' gop lǝti. Illǝ libi ki Lya ne'si, ati lǝti nǝ pe'ti lya ɗǝ natl Lya.
3.9: Nǝ mus mbalǝn yenti ɗǝ lǝti ati natl Lya u,
3.10: Is manti tikuɗǝ dǝb abidlabi libi ki Lya ɗǝ ngeplu, is ikǝn nǝ ulki ngaptibi nǝ ulki gagashinti atǝn ndo'twasi. Shilǝn ki Bitlus a ge'libi ki Lya
3.11: Amuli ɗǝ bǝtl ki Bitlus kal nǝ Yohanna, Mus mbalǝn mbǝ nǝ kitǝl ma'si age' libi ki Lya gunǝ si mbettikǝ lu shu'ti ki Sulemanu u, asi ngapti bi.
3.12: Nǝ Bitlus yen gu u, i' ulsisu: “Yelsǝni ini Isla'ilawa, yalakiɗa ullu ɗǝ bǝtlkin ngaptibiɗa? Tǝngaki yakǝn ki ya'miɗa nǝgu, ki yenti ndǝltinǝn ko bǝtl Lya inǝn kǝn laki i mulu lǝ'ɗaya?
3.13: Lya ki Iblahim, nǝ Ishaku, nǝ Yakubu, Lya ki mi'zǝ mi'zǝ'mini, innal zheliwasi Yesu. I ngeti a kina ki Bilatus, nǝl lyami tǝs za'tu, gunǝ' bǝlǝnti is tloti.
3.14: I' ngeti mulguntu nǝ zo'mbatlu i' ngemini sǝ' zakikin mul tlo mbalǝn u.
3.15: I' tlo gǝs ki mbadli, iki i Lya tlǝlti ɗǝ ge' mi' mǝshti. Nǝgu mi yeni ndatǝn dwaɗǝn inǝn.
3.16: Nǝ la'ti mbatl ge' shin ki Yesu, mulu nǝ' yenintu, nǝ' manǝntu, mulnǝ bǝlti ndǝltu tiki Yesu, nǝ la'ti mbatl nǝ shinwasi tu'mati tǝmbi ndokǝl ti mul gu nǝ muswakǝn ki yetti u.
3.17: “Nǝgun, yelsǝnǝ ini Isla'ila amani ge' lǝshi ma' ulǝnkǝn ki tloti ɗa kan u nǝ mi'kina wakǝn pǝli u.
3.18: Ngonǝ nǝgu Lya a ikǝn ulnǝ' dlǝmi tun te'ɗu abi ki mus mi'nje shikǝn ki Lya, ɗǝ usu Almasihu wasi tǝn tle' bǝna.
3.19: Zakǝn pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa, a' palnitai ma Lya, tǝngaki tǝ' santikin bezǝn lǝɓawakǝnɗa, an ndǝllikin mbadli,
3.20: i'shin Almasihu, gunǝ' olikini u tun te'ɗi, tiki Yesu.
3.21: Hwelkǝn tǝ Yesu dǝm twa lya hal gasi u nǝtǝ Lya patl mus usi pyale u, nǝ Lya dlǝl shilǝn tun te'ɗigi abi ɗǝ mi'nje shinkǝnwasu.
3.22: Musa usu, ‘Mulban Lya wakǝn nǝn tlǝli' kin mul njeshinkǝn ki Lya won kǝnǝ ami age mbalǝn wakǝn; hwelkǝn ki gakǝn kǝm tǝn mus ulnǝ ti' pikini u
3.23: Mulnǝ a nge gakitti kǝmu nǝn pe'kǝtlti ɗǝ ge' mbalǝnwasi.’
3.24: “Nǝguɗa, i gopi tun tǝn Sama'ila, i lǝtǝn ginǝ mbǝ kali is shilǝn tǝn mutti.
3.25: Kini ki gǝskǝ mi'njeshinkǝn, kini ki mi'nje ndǝti nǝ Lya pǝli mi'zǝ'mi'zǝ'kini. I' ul Iblahim su, ‘Tu'ma'gǝs ki mbalǝn wa'kǝn mus mbalǝn mi'dǝp lǝɓa nǝn mbin nalti.’
3.26: Nǝ Lya a tlǝl zheli was suɗu, makini tishinti pa, tǝ zikin toh ki patl kowonngi tet taka ɗǝ tǝn shitu ki ɗashti ki tugi.”

4.1: Lǝɓasi, nǝ mi'kina ki ɓutti dlabi ki libi ki Lya nǝ Sadukiyawa is mbǝ ma' Bitlus nǝ Yahaya asi ge' shilǝn nǝ mbalǝn.
4.2: Is lyau mbadli nǝ mi' kushti ki Yesu tǝngaki si kulci' mbalǝn, tǝn hillya ki Yesu ge' mi' mǝshti.
4.3: Is gop ki Bitlus nǝ Yahaya is idlasi sai nǝ lu acili tǝngaki su' kǝn ɓali.
4.4: Amma ginǝ kum shilǝn ki Bitlus is ndǝ'nǝnali u; diɓǝltwasǝn sa tǝla zangu nantam.
4.5: Lu cilisi mi'kinawasǝn nǝ kolsiwasǝn nǝ mi'bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa is ma a Ulshelima.
4.6: Nǝ Hanana bal lǝɓa ki Lya ti alǝbi nǝ Kayapa nǝ Yahaya nǝ Iskandali nǝ mus gǝskǝ ki bali ki bas lǝɓasi ki Lya,
4.7: Nǝs mbǝl ki Bitlus nǝ Yahaya akina u is gop ngepsi: “Nǝ ndǝltu kǝni ko nǝ shin u kǝn, ki pǝltin nǝgu?”
4.8: Bitlus, ki ikǝni nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya, i' ulsisu: “Kini gumsisi nǝ kolsi!
4.9: Ki takimibi asǝti tǝn ki ngepmǝnmi tǝn ze' ulnǝ pǝli dakǝl mulu nǝ tu' imi kǝnti ndoɗa,
4.10: manǝnngu, kinǝ mus mbalǝn ki Isla'ila: Mul gu nǝ ki dlǝli kinawakǝn ki ndoki u nǝ shin ki Yesu almasihu Mulnazalat, gunǝ tolǝnti tǝn gadlǝnnga u guni Lya tlǝlti ɗǝ ge' mi'mǝshtu,
4.11: Yesu tiki, “ ‘Zǝnnga gunǝ kini mi'kǝpbi nge u, iddǝm zǝnnga ki zoki ki kǝpbi.’
4.12: Peti kǝn mbidli ma mulunwai, kuma shinwonɗawai guni bǝldli a lya nǝ atli nǝ ge' mbalǝn adǝplǝɓa hwel ma'ti tǝnmbi peti.”
4.13: Nǝs yen ndǝtl ki mbatl ki Bitlus nǝ Yahaya u, is mani sa pǝl lashtiwai, mi'lǝshi usun kǝni ɗaɗanu, is kum ngaptibi is mansi mbalǝn gi teɗi ne' Yesu siɗa.
4.14: Amma nǝs yen mulnǝs ndokǝltu ki dlǝli nesi u, is hwol ulki dlǝmi.
4.15: Ngo' nǝnǝgu is bǝlsi zhil ki sǝ'peki ɗǝ bidla nǝ sǝ'shilǝn nǝ yelsǝni u,
4.16: is usu, “yakǝn tǝn pǝlin nǝ mbalǝnyi? Mus mi'dǝp a Ulshelima sǝ mani sa pǝlin ulki gagashinti, tu'imi kǝntǝn pǝlin nǝ mbalǝn i u mǝkǝn ma'ussu sa pǝl ulǝn wai.
4.17: Amma tǝngagi ɓa ulisi mbǝl du'tǝnki ge' mbalǝn, tǝn dǝlǝsi kǝm bǝs shilǝn nǝ mulin a ge' shin u nuwai.”
4.18: Iki is takisi bi te' ɗaɗanu is dǝlisi kǝm bǝs shilǝn ko kushti ge' shin ki Yesu nuwai.
4.19: Amma Bitlus nǝ Yahaya is pallisi shilǝn is usu, “Shilǝn ki Lya kǝn tǝn bǝliya ko gwakǝn? Dambǝlǝn kini.
4.20: Miɓo, mǝkǝn ma'dǝb shot tǝn ulnǝn yeni u nǝ ulnǝn kumi uwai.”
4.21: Kal ki samatisi i, is za'si, tǝngaki sahwol kan u nǝ si'hwotisi ishɗa u i tǝngaki mbalǝn, mus malǝn si natl Lya tǝngaki ulnǝ nda u.
4.22: Mul gu nǝ pǝli' ulki gagashinti ki ndokǝltu ta bǝl hwon kutl lǝbi upsi kali. I mi' bǝtl Yesu kal Shilǝn nǝ Lya
4.23: Nǝs za'ki Bitlus nǝ Yahaya u, is lǝma' mbalǝnwasǝn, is palisi shilǝn u nǝ lǝɓasi ne' mi'kina pisi u.
4.24: Si ɗaɗanu nǝ kumti nǝgu, is tlǝl yali musswasǝn nǝ mbatl nǝm asi shilǝn nǝ Lya, is usu, “Lya mulnalti,” ki pǝl lya nǝ atli nǝ bal mali, nǝ mus ulnǝ giɓi u.
4.25: Ki shilǝn tu'ma' Yal ki mbatl ki Lya nǝ tubi ki zheliwagi, bwasinǝn Dauda “ ‘Yalakiɗa ginǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u imbatl lewisi? Mbalǝn ɗaɗanu is dambǝl ulnǝ ɗa baliwai u?
4.26: Gumsi ki dǝp lǝɓa is kǝndǝ gǝski dlati, Mi'kǝndǝdlom is maga, is nge Lya, nǝ Almasihuwasi ɗaɗanu.’
4.27: “Bali nǝguɗa Hilidus nǝ Buntus Bilatus sa maga i age' gatlu ne' ginǝ ba Yahudawai u nǝ mbalǝn ki Isla'ila si dutu' nǝ Yesu zheli wagi mul guunti, gunǝ' palti Almasihu u.
4.28: Sa domga i tǝngaki sǝppǝl mus ulnǝ kǝndǝ tǝn ndǝltwagi nǝ lyamtiwagi tǝnda u.
4.29: Nǝguni, Lya, yani si lyap hane'mi kyautǝn, bǝtl zhelisiwagi ndǝtl ki mbadli ki dlǝp shilǝnwagi nǝ ndǝtl ki mbatli,
4.30: ta' tohwagi ki ndokǝtl mbalǝn, apǝl ulki gagashinti nǝ lwaɗi tu'ma' shinki zheliwagi guu Yesu.”
4.31: Kalki sa shilǝn nǝ Lya i, lu u nǝs domga u igo' nyapti. I mus is ikǝnsi nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya, is gop dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya bǝ nǝ ɓantwai. Mi'bǝtl Yesu kal la' Koyanngi wasǝn idǝm Nǝm
4.32: Mus dopga ginǝ ɗǝ duk nǝ Yesu u, ko yangiwasǝn nǝm kǝnǝ, mbadlwasǝn nǝm, mulǝn ɗa tǝ' usu ulkǝ tohwasi gwaskǝn nǝ gwaswai, koyangni mus gwasǝn kǝni.
4.33: I mi'shinkǝn ndakina nǝ dlǝmi'mbalǝn ɗaɗanu tǝnpatl ki Yesu kami ndǝ'ti ki shilǝn mul ndǝlti tǝn hillya ki mulban Yesu ge' mi'mǝshti. Ulkǝ zo'ki mul nalti tǝn kowon ngi ge'si,
4.34: hal ma mul hwol ulǝn ɗa ge'siwai, tǝngaki mus mi'gu ko libi sa ulitaka i, is mbǝl ulpisi,
4.35: is zi' akina ɗǝ mi'shikǝn, i bwasi kowonngi nda'ce nǝ ulkipǝliwasi.
4.36: Age nǝgu iki Yusupu, mul Balawiye, gǝswasi mul ki tsibilin Kublus, gunǝ mi'shinkǝn ɗǝ mbetti ki Balnaba, (ikǝ mul ndǝtl mbadli),
4.37: i' ul guwastaka, immbǝl ulpisi i'zi akina ɗǝ mi'shikǝn.

5.1: Amma mulǝn mul shin Hananiya, nǝ kǝliwasi Sapilatu, i' ul ulǝn ginǝ nidɗa u taka.
5.2: Isǝ' kǝliwasi is hwundǝl nami age' ulpisi, iki is mbǝl na ulpisi akina ɗǝ milshinkǝn.
5.3: I Bitlus usu, “Ki, Hananiya, tu' imi kǝn Shaiɗa ikkǝn mbatlwagi, hal i lǝge Yal ki mbatl ki Lya, i' hwundǝl na up ki gu wa'ɗa?
5.4: Nǝ'uli taka u ɓo gu i ɓo gwa'kǝn waiya? Kal ki ka uli taka i ɗaɗanu, ulpisi gwakǝn waya? Yalaki i' dambǝlki i' pǝl unndi uluɗa? Mbalǝn kǝn ki ligesiwai Lya kǝn ki ligeti.”
5.5: Nǝ Hananiya kum gu u, i' nda atli alǝbi alǝbi immǝci. Mus ginǝ kumi u, i bal ɓa' gopsi.
5.6: I giɗǝnsiyen tlǝte'ɗi, is kan hwuni is lati ge' lumutti is gadǝlti, is kanti is pekǝlti taka, is le' guti.
5.7: Kal ki cimbǝlti ki dom maki i kǝliwasi teteɗi, bǝnǝ ma' ulnǝ nda uwai.
5.8: I Bitlus ul kǝli su, “Dlǝmini, nǝgu ki ulǝn gu u takawa?” Iki i' usu, “e nǝguni.”
5.9: I Bitlus ultisu, “Tu' imi kǝn ki manǝn bi ki cimbǝlǝn Yal ki mbatl ki mulban ɗa? Kum lǝ' ki ginǝ gwu' mwaniwagu, hal sambǝci dlabi i, sǝn ka'ki, as pe'nǝ hwunwagi.”
5.10: Alǝbi alǝbi in nda a kinawasi immǝci. Nǝ milgiɗǝsi i teteɗu, is mbiti mǝci, is kanti is pekǝlti taka, is guti ma'mwaniwasi.
5.11: Iki i bal ɓa' gop Ikilisiya musswasǝn, nǝ mus ginǝ kum shilǝn ki usi nǝ nda u. Milshinkǝn ndokǝl mbalǝn diɓǝli
5.12: Milshikǝn pǝl lwaɗi nǝ ulki gagashinti mul diɓǝlti age' mbalǝn. Mi'bǝtl Yesu kal musswasǝn nǝ mbatl nǝm kǝn si mati age lu shu'ti ki Sulemanu.
5.13: Amma age' na mbalǝn gon apǝl ndǝtl ki mbatl ki te' ge'siwai, ngonǝnǝgu mbalǝn ɗǝ natlsi.
5.14: Mus nǝnǝgu mi' ndǝ'ti nǝti mwani nǝ mudli mbǝtltin ki siɗa ngǝtl ki kali.
5.15: Hal atala gunǝ si pekǝtl mi'gonti tǝn bishitu ɗǝ latisi tǝn lumutti ki dom nǝ lumutti tǝngaki Bitlus ɓal ɓeutu ko gwasǝnwas ma abǝli tǝn nami wasǝn.
5.16: Mbalǝn ɓo is gop dopga te'ge' gatlen nǝ ki gandǝli nǝ Ulshelima u, is gop mbǝtl mi'gonti nǝ ginǝ dumi'gatdli ɗǝ hwottisi u, musswasǝn is ndoki. Milshinkǝn ɗǝ tle'bǝna
5.17: Iki i bal lǝɓa ki Lya tlǝte' lya, nǝ musginǝ ne'tu, nǝ mi' ɗalika ki Sadukiyawa, si kub dutu' iye,
5.18: is gop milshinkǝn yi, is la'si gelu kǝndǝ'mbalǝn.
5.19: Amma age' gasi iki mul nje shinkǝn ki Lya kǝn ngu i' ɓub'ɓul dlabi ki lu kǝndǝ' mbalinisi, i' pekǝlsi toɗi, i' ulsisu,
5.20: “Zǝn ga, a' dlǝlni age' libi ki Lya, adlǝmi mus mbalǝn pyal shitu ki Lya.”
5.21: Nǝs kumi nǝgu u, is tege' libi ki Lya nǝ kyau, is go' kulci mbalǝn. Nǝ bal lǝɓa ki Lya ne' ginǝ si ne'tu mbǝ u, is taki mi' dlǝl shilǝn bi, nǝ mus mi'kina ki Isla'ilawa, is ta shinkǝn tya ge'lu kǝndǝ'mbalǝn sǝm mbǝlsi.
5.22: Amma nǝ mi' kǝnndǝ dlom mbǝkǝci ge'lu kǝndǝ'mbalǝn nisi u, sa mbisi lǝbiwai. Iki is palteɗi' is palsi shinkǝn,
5.23: Illǝ illembi lu kǝndǝ'mbalǝn nisi ki idle, mi' ɓutti dlabi sikǝ dlili abi dlabi, amma nǝn ɓuli u, ma mbi mulǝn agiɓiwai.”
5.24: Nǝ mi' kina ki ɓutti dlabi ki libi ki Lya nǝ bas laɓasi nǝs kumi nǝgu u, is hwodǝli iye tǝn gawasǝn, yakǝn tǝ ulu mbǝlli.
5.25: Iki i' mulǝn mbǝ i' usu, “Yanini! Mulu nǝ' lakǝnti gelu kǝndǝ'mbalǝn u si ngi ki dlǝli a libi ki Lya, si kulci' mbalǝn.”
5.26: Iki i mul kina ki mi'kǝndǝ'dlom nǝ mil kyautǝn wasi is lǝ is mbǝl milshikǝn nisi. Sa shimsi nǝ ngeswai gaki si ɓulti ɓa mbalǝn la'si nǝ zǝnnga.
5.27: Nǝs mbǝl milshinkǝn isi abidla shilǝn u, is dlǝlsi akina ɗǝ mi' dlǝlshilǝn. Iki i bal lǝɓa ngemsi,
5.28: i' usu, “Ma ndǝlinkin kǝm bǝ kulcin ge' shin u waiwa, in ngu kushtiwakǝn a dutya Ulshelima i, hal kilyamti ki zimi alhaki ki hwula ki mulu aga inǝn.”
5.29: I Bitlus ne' mi'kina is pallisi is usu, “Hwelkǝn tǝn kumi Lya bi ngǝtl mbalǝn.
5.30: Lya ki kolsisi inǝn ta tlǝl Yesu i, gunǝ tǝn gadlǝnnga ki tlwotu.
5.31: Ti Lya nalti a toh shimtwasi, mul kina nǝ mul pe'kǝtl mbalǝn, tǝngaki tǝ' ɓuli Isla'ila dlabi ki pe'ti ɗǝ ge bezǝn lǝɓa i, as mbi pashti ki bezǝn lǝɓawasǝn ɗa ɗaɗanu.
5.32: Mi ɓo mi'yenti nǝ dwuɗǝnwas kǝni atǝn usi, nǝgu ɗaɗanu Yal ki mbatl ki Lya, gunǝ Lya bǝl ginǝ ɗǝ pǝlitti kubbi u.”
5.33: Nǝs kumi nǝgu u, iki i mbatl lyewisi iye, asi lyamti kǝnǝ sǝ' tlosi.
5.34: Amma mul Palise won mul shin Gamaliyal, mul kushti zhil ki Musa, gunǝ mus mbalǝn ɗǝ natlti, i' hilya age' ludlǝtl shilǝn, ibbǝl zhil ki sǝ' pyakǝl mbalǝnisi swadla pa.
5.35: Aki kǝn tǝ usu, “Kini mil Isla'ilawa, pǝn ɗemɗem tǝn ulnǝ ki lyamti ki' pǝli mbalǝn gi u.
5.36: Hwon u nǝ ɓew u i mulun mbǝ, kise ti Tudas, ti patl gawasi ulǝn, mbalǝn kutl cen kutl lǝbi upsi ɗǝ bǝtlti, amma i tloti, i mi' bǝtlti dla'ga, is koni.
5.37: Kalwasi ɗaɗanu, imulǝn mul Galili mul shin Yahuza mbǝ age' hwon ki ɓǝtl mbalǝn, illa diɓǝl mbalǝn ɗǝ bǝtlti. Tima is tloti, mil bǝtlti mus is dla'ga.
5.38: Tǝngaki nǝgu, ulu tǝn ki ami pi'kin shilǝn, zakǝn mbalǝn sǝ zǝga, in ulnǝ si lyap pǝlti u ko kyautǝn wasǝn ki mbalǝn u, nǝn dlatiga.
5.39: Amma in ki Lya kǝn u, kikǝn ma'dlǝl mbalǝn iwai. Seko ki' dǝmni mi'nge'ulnǝ Lya pǝli u.”
5.40: Iki is bǝlshilǝn ki Gamaliyal, is taki milshinkǝn nisi bi is te' giɓi is li'si. Is matisi bǝs saka shilǝn ge' shin ki Yesu u nuwai, is za'si is zǝga.
5.41: I' milshinkǝn nisi hilya is peki a kina ki mi'dlǝlshilǝn, nǝ hol tugi tǝngaki sayeni i sakǝmi sǝ' tle bǝna tǝngaki shin ki Yesu i.
5.42: Hu cin u kǝni, a libi ki Lya nǝ a libi nǝ libi, saza' kulci' mbalǝn shilǝn ki Lya wai, si ussu Yesu tiki Almasihu.

6.1: A ge' muttu nǝ mi'kushti ɗǝ mbǝtltǝnki u, iki Yahudawa mi' kup Helinanci is gob nalǝn tǝn Iblaniyawa tǝngaki sǝɗa bǝtl mudli ginǝ mwani mǝcisi u ulki ɗami wai, kǝnǝ ngen wai, a ge' lu bwasti ulki ɗami ki ko cin u kǝni.
6.2: Iki kutl nǝ lopi is taki mus mbalǝn mi'bǝtl Yesu kal bi, is usu, “Ambuni, tǝnza' dlǝb shilǝn ki Lya wai tǝndǝm tǝn shilǝn ki ulki ɗami katla wai.
6.3: Yelsǝni mwani nǝ mudli, olǝn mbalǝn nǝnngi a ge' kini ginǝ' manǝnsi u sǝkǝ njikǝn nǝ Yal ki batl ki Lya nǝ ma' ulǝn, ginǝ tǝn bǝlǝnsi kyautǝn u.
6.4: Mini an bǝlǝn mba dlinǝn tǝn shilǝn nǝ Lya nǝ kushti shilǝn ki Yesu.”
6.5: Ulnǝs dlǝmi u i mus tǝmi mbalǝn bi, iki is ol Istipanus, mulnǝ ki ikǝni nǝ la'ti mbatl u nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya mul gunti nǝ Pilibus, nǝ Bulokolas, nǝ Nikanal, nǝ Timan, nǝ Balminas, nǝ Nikolas mulkǝ Antakiya gunǝ teɗǝ ittege' atdini ki Yahudawa u.
6.6: Gi kǝn si mbǝlsi kina ki milshinkǝn. Kal ki sa shilǝn nǝ Lya i, is zisi toh.
6.7: Shilǝn ki Lya mbǝl tǝnki ɗa, dǝɓǝtl ki mi'bǝtl Lya ge' gatl ki Ulshelima mbǝtl tinki ɗa iye, lǝɓasi mi'diɓǝlti iye is ndǝ nǝ la'ti mbadl tǝn Yesu. Agop Istipanus si
6.8: Lya bǝl Istapanus, ze'lǝɓa wasi nǝ ndǝlti, ki pǝl ulki gagashinti mul nalti nǝ lwaɗi a ge' mbalǝn.
6.9: I genge' ginǝ pe'to' ge' ginǝ mbi gawsǝn. Sǝ pe'to' ge' gatl ki Yahudawa ki Sayilin nǝ Aleszandaliya, nǝ atl ki Silisiya nǝ Asiya, is gob shotibi ne' Istipanas,
6.10: Amma ko ten sa mbǝ'ci sǝ'sho' bi ne'twai tǝngaki ta pǝl shilǝn nǝ mallǝɓa i, nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ɗǝ dlotiti.
6.11: Is hom mbalǝn ki hwundǝli, si usu, “Mǝ kumi Istipanus ɗǝ byatl' Musa ati konnǝ shinkǝ Lya.”
6.12: Nǝnǝgu is tlǝli mbalǝn mbadli nǝ kolsi, nǝ mi'bǝtl lashti zhil ki Musa, sine is nde' ga, is gopti, is mbǝlti a kina ɗǝ mi' dlǝtl shilǝn.
6.13: Iki is mbǝl mi' dlǝb ulnǝ bǝ sayeniwai u, is usu, “Mulu tǝɗa bwastiti nǝ dlǝp du shilǝn tǝn libi ki Lya u wai, nǝ kushti ki Musa,
6.14: tǝn gaki mǝ kum Istipanus ti ussu Yesu mulnazalat nǝn batti lu u, at shot ulnǝ Musa zaki mini u.”
6.15: I mus mbalǝn ki bidla i is uti' Istipanus dwaɗǝn, is yen kinawasi kǝnǝ ki mul shinkǝn ki Lya.

7.1: I bal lǝɓa ki Lya ngem Istipanas, “Gu nǝgu ɗaya?”
7.2: Istipanas usu: “Yelsǝni ini nǝ mi'kina, gaki nǝn kǝm. Lya mul nalti i' mbǝlgawasi ma' mul zǝmini Iblahim, age muttu nǝ ti a Bagadaza u, bǝ ta dǝm a Halan uwai,
7.3: i' Lya ultisu, ‘Hilya ɗǝ ge' atlwakǝn, nǝ ɗǝge' yelsǝniwagi, ki lǝge' atlu nǝ ta mboki toh tǝnki u.’
7.4: Iki i' hilya ɗǝ ge' atl ki Kaldiyawa, i' dǝm a Halam. Tyaka ɗaɗanu, kal ki mǝshti ki bwasi, i Lya bǝlti atlu nǝ nǝgun kini ki dǝmi alǝbi u.
7.5: Amma Lya a bǝlti, na' atl ko ki zi' asǝn wai aki, iki i Lya pǝlli' ndǝti ge' kalwasi tǝn bǝtlti atlisi ɗǝ gwasi, ge' cinisi amma Ibilahim yakǝn ni' ɗawai.
7.6: I Lya shilǝn nǝ Ibilahim: ‘Gǝswasi sǝn dǝmti sǝmbǝlsi ge' gatlu nǝ bǝ gwasǝn kǝn wai u, mbalǝn kige' gatli nǝn patlsi zheli as hwotisi bǝna hal hwon kutl cetl upsi.’
7.7: I Lya usu, ‘amma an hwoti atlu nǝ palkin zhelu u bezǝn lǝɓa,’ kalki nǝgu sǝn pe'ti ɗǝ ge' gatlu as nallǝn agelu u.’
7.8: Ta pǝli Ibilahim ndǝti ki sǝlkǝn. Nǝ Ibilahim zǝ' Ishayaku u mutti usǝpsi nǝ zǝ'ti is sǝlti. I Ishiyaku zǝ' Yakubu, i Yakubu zǝ mi'zǝ'mini kutl nǝ lopi.
7.9: “Mi'zǝ'miniyi ne, tǝngaki si dutugi nǝ Yusupu, is ulti taka, i talati Masal. Amma Lya nǝ ti,
7.10: i Lya pe'kǝlti ɗǝ ge' mus bǝnawasi. I' bǝl Yusupu ma'lǝɓa nǝ hwol hwula ma pil'auna Gu ki Masal. Ti Pil'auna ne i' palti mul gunti ki Masal, i kan mus mbalǝn ki libiwasi.
7.11: “Iki, i kuzǝn nde mus atl ki Masal nǝ Kan'ana, tǝngaki bezǝn bǝna u, hal mi'zǝ' mi'zǝ'mini is hol ulki ɗami.
7.12: Amma nǝ Yakubu kumi alkama ɗa a Masal u, lǝ'ki nǝn i' shin mi'zǝ' mi'zǝmini.
7.13: Ɗǝ lǝtwasǝn ki lop, i Yusupu ɓulisi gawasi ma' yelsǝnwasi, i Pil'auna man mbalǝn ki Yusupu.
7.14: Iki i Yusupu shinshinkǝn tǝn Yakubu bwasi tǝn mbǝ, nǝ mus yelsǝniwasi, mbalǝn kutl kutl lǝbi ningi nǝ namtam.
7.15: Iki i Yakubu lǝ Masal. Ti ne' mi'zǝ' mi'zǝmini a tya ka si mǝci.
7.16: Iki is yem hwun wasǝn te'ɗi is palsi tya Shekem, i la'si ge zǝɗi u nǝ Iblahim uli nǝ upki azulpa ama' mil ki Hamol aki a Shekem.
7.17: “Nǝ cin ɓalli Lya nja tǝ' ikǝni Iblahim pǝtl ndǝtwasu, dǝbǝtl ki mbalǝn nisi a Masal a mbǝltǝnkiyi iye.
7.18: I ki i pǝl pyal guu won a Masal, gunǝ bǝ'man wokǝn ki Yusupu wai u.’
7.19: Guu u ta tlǝ dlǝ' mbalǝnyinǝn i', ati hwoti' mi'zǝmini ishi ati la'tisi sǝ' la' hwal mil gunǝ zǝsi u taka.
7.20: “Age' muttisi sǝ zǝ Musa, yakǝni mbunini. Lii maki a ɗǝ ngaptiti a libi ɗǝ bwasi.
7.21: Nǝ zǝti a dla u, yakǝn ki Pil'auna yakǝnkǝli it kanti it kyetǝlti kǝni yakuwasi.
7.22: Iki i kulci Musa mus ma' lǝɓa ki Masalawa, ti kuma mul ndǝtl kǝni age' shilǝn nǝ kautǝnwasi.
7.23: “Nǝ Musa pǝl hwon kutl lǝbi upsi u, i' kǝndi a mbatlwasi tǝ le' ya mbalǝnwasi, Isla'ilawa.
7.24: Nǝ' eni si hwoti yelsewas ishu, iki illǝ ɗǝ dǝtlti i' li' mul masali im mǝci.
7.25: Musa ɗǝ ziti mbalǝnwas mani tu mati tǝ Lya pǝl kautǝn ki pekǝtlsi, amma sima niwai.
7.26: Lu cili nǝ Musa mbǝ ma'lu u nǝ mi' Isla'ilawa lop ɗǝ dlatu. Il lyami tǝ masi tǝn shitu ki ussu, ‘Kini mbalǝn kǝnǝmini yalaki ki lyap kumi' yelsǝni ciwo ɗa?’
7.27: “Amma mulnǝ kumi yelsewas ciwo u i' jakǝn Musa i' ussu, ‘Wokǝn laki ɗǝ gunti nǝ pǝtl shilǝn tǝnmi?
7.28: Lyamti kiɗa ki tloni kǝnǝ gunǝ tlo mulmasal a hwuɗwa?’
7.29: Nǝ Musa kumi nǝgu u, i' kitǝli ippǝl dǝpki sǝmbǝl tya Madayana, ge'lu u tǝ zǝ mil mwani lop.
7.30: Kalki hwon kutl kutl lǝbi upsi, i mul nje shinkǝn ki Lya mbǝ ma Musa ge bǝlǝn utu, ge dǝlgǝn nja nǝ zǝnga Sinai.
7.31: Nǝ Musa yen gu u, i' kum gagashinti nǝ unnǝ yeni u. Nǝ' sha'tya ɗǝ yati u, i' kum yalki Lya ɗǝ usu,
7.32: ‘Ami ki Lya ki mul zǝ' mulzǝ' ki, Lya ki Iblahim nǝ Ishayaku nǝ Yakubu.’ Iki i dli ki Musa gop nyapti, ta pǝtl ndǝtl ki mbatl ki yatiwai.
7.33: Iki i' Lya ultisu, ‘Tus kapptilanwagi lu u nǝ kiɗa ki dlǝli u, lu mul gu'kǝni.
7.34: Balini, a en bezǝn lǝɓa u nǝ si pǝli' mbalǝn i'ni ki Masal u i, a kum kuluwasǝn i ki kup dli, a pe'sul lya i tǝngaki ta pekǝlsi. Nǝguni, mbǝ ta shinki tya Masal.’
7.35: “Ti Musa u nǝs ngetu asi ussu, ‘Okǝn laki ɗǝ mul kina inǝn nǝ mul pǝtl shilǝn?’ Ti Lya nǝ gawaskǝn shinti suɗi tǝ dǝm mul kina, nǝ mul pekǝtl mbalǝn, tuma' mul shikǝn ki Lya u nǝ mbǝ mati age dǝlgǝn ge' bǝlǝn utu.
7.36: Ti pekǝlsi ɗǝ Masal, kalki pǝtl ulki gagashinti nǝ lwaɗi a ge' atl ki Masal, nǝ ɗakǝshti gǝu dlǝlka, nǝ hwon kutl kutl lǝbi upsi a ge dǝlgǝn.
7.37: Guki Musa u nǝ ul Isla'ilawa usu, ‘Lya nǝn tlǝli'kin mul nje' shinkǝn ki Lya ge' yelsǝniwakǝn kǝni ami.’
7.38: Ti ne'kini u age dǝlgǝn, nǝ mul nje shinkǝn ki Lya u nǝ shilǝn nǝti, tǝn zǝnnga Sinai u, ne' mi'zǝ'mi'zǝ'mini ɗaɗanu. Ti kan shilǝn mul bǝtl mbatli summa Lya im mbǝlli mini.
7.39: “Amma mi'zǝmi'zǝmini nge bǝli'ti, is ngeti i mbatlwasǝn pal tya Masal.
7.40: Is ul Haluna usu, ‘Pǝlimi lya gunǝ tǝn ndemi kina u. Tǝn gaki Musa u, nǝ' pekǝlmi te' Masal u, mǝman unnǝ ndanǝtiwuwai.’
7.41: Age' cinisi iki is kǝn yakǝn tla. Is mbǝli' haɗaya is pǝl hwoltuki nǝ kautǝn u nǝs pǝli nǝ tohwasǝn u.
7.42: Tǝngaki nǝ gu i Lya bǝlsi kal, is zasi ɗǝ bǝtl cin nǝ lyi nǝ cadlǝl. Kan u nǝɗa ki laci ge' lwat bati ki mi'njeshinkǝn ki Lya u, i' usu, “ ‘Kini Mbalǝn ki Isla'ila ami ki mbǝllinǝn haɗaya ki tlu ki ban hwon kutl kutl lǝbǝ upsi ge' dǝlgǝnya?
7.43: Ai, du'ni nǝ kǝs ki Molek nǝ lwa' cadlǝl ki Lapan, lya unǝ pǝlini aki ngepti u. Ami ne am patlkin tya kina ɗǝ Babila.’
7.44: “Mi'zǝmi'zǝmini si nǝ libi ki Lya amasi age' dǝlgǝn. Gunǝ pǝltli kan u nǝ Lya pi Musa u, kǝnǝ kan u nǝ' eni u.
7.45: Kal ki nje libi ki Lya, mi'zǝmi'zǝmini mbi is mbǝ nǝnali ge' atlu ge' hwon ki Joshuwa, kalki sa kan atlisi i mbalǝn ginǝ Lya katsi tǝn duwaɗǝnwasǝn u. Libi ki Lya u ɗa i mbǝl hwon ki Dawuda,
7.46: gunǝ mbi holhwula ma' Lya u i' gyemi tǝ pǝlli Lya ki Yakubu libi.
7.47: Amma Sulemanu kǝn kǝni' libi nisi.
7.48: Mus nǝ nǝgu mul nalti tǝn ɗa dǝp ge' libi i nǝ yakǝn mbalǝn kǝni nǝ tohwai. Kan u nǝ mul nje shikǝn ki Lya dlǝmi u:
7.49: Lya usu, “ ‘Twa lya kǝn ki lu dǝptini ki guntini, a atl kǝn ki luzǝ' asǝn ini. Unndi libi u kǝn ki kǝninǝni? Ko kuma awu kǝn ki lushutini?
7.50: Ami nǝ gayikǝn a pǝl usi wai ya?’
7.51: “Kini mbalǝn mil ndǝtl ki ga, nǝ ndǝtl ki kǝm. Kǝnǝ mi'zǝmi'zǝkini kini ɗa: ko anǝmi ki pǝli Yal ki mbatl ki Lya natl ki ga.
7.52: Age' mi' nje shinkǝn ki Lya gukǝn mi'zǝmi'zǝkini a hwotisi bezǝn lǝbawai? Kuma is tlo ginǝ dlǝm shilǝn atǝn mbǝ ki mul ze' mbatlu, nǝ ngeti i tloti,
7.53: kini kamǝn zhil ma' mi' shinkǝn ki Lya, amma ka bǝliniwai.” A la' Istipanus nǝ Zǝnga i
7.54: Nǝ mil dlǝl shilǝn kumi nǝgu u, is kum du tuki hal is ash bi ki hwoɗi tǝn gaki kup du tugi tǝnti.
7.55: Amma Istipanus, ki ikǝni nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ki gunti, i ut duwa ɗǝn twa lya, i' en natl ki Lya, a Yesu ki dlǝli tǝn toh shipti ki Lya.
7.56: I' usu, “Yanini, a en lya ki ɓuliyi yakǝn mbalǝn ki dlǝli atǝn tohship ki Lya.”
7.57: Amma is ca kǝmwasǝn, is tlǝl yali, is nde ga nǝ mbatl nǝm,
7.58: is pekǝlti tya kal gatli is gop lalati nǝ zǝnga. Kuma, mil enti nǝ dwaɗǝn is zi lulutuwasǝn ma yakǝn giɗǝn siwon shinwasi Shawulu.
7.59: Asi lalatiti nǝ zǝnga, a Istipanus ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya, “Mulban Yesu, kan mbadlini.”
7.60: Iki i' ngus nǝ ga hwulǝn i' tlil Yal nǝ dǝlti, i' usu, “Mul ban, bǝ zisi bezǝn lǝɓa u agawasǝnwai.” Nǝ usu nǝgu u, i' nde yenmbuɗi.

8.1: Shawulu ɗǝ bǝtlkal ki tlo' istipanus. Agasisi, i bal bǝna mbi Ikilisiya ki Ulshelima mus is dla'ga tyage' atl ki Yahudiya nǝ Samaliya, sai milshikǝn kǝn katl.
8.2: I mi'bǝtl Lya kalen gu Istipanus is kuli gawasi.
8.3: Amma i Shawulu go' pǝli' Ikilisiya bezǝn pǝlti. A ti bǝtl libi libi, ti dǝdl mwani nǝ mudli a ti la'tisi ge'lu kǝndǝ' mbalǝn. A dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya a Samaliya i
8.4: Ginǝs dlakisi gayi is go' dlib shilǝn ki Lya mus lu unǝs lǝɗa u.
8.5: I Pilibus su ge' gatl ki Samaliya ti dlǝb shilǝn ki Almasihu.
8.6: Nǝ hwu' mbalǝn kumi is yen gagashintu nǝ Pilibus ɗǝ pǝlti u, i mus sǝpǝ ɗemɗem nǝ ulnǝ' dlǝmi u
8.7: Nǝ la'ti Yal i du mi'gatli pe' ɗǝge' mbalǝn diɓǝli, mi'tle ki dli ne' dakkǝlsi diɓǝli is mbi ndo'ti
8.8: I hwoltu' pǝldli bali a ge' gatli. Saminu mul Yal lu
8.9: Mulǝnɗa mulshin Saminu, teɗi ti pǝtl gonti age' gatli, hal ɗǝ bǝtl mus mbalǝn ki Samaliyawa gagashinti. Ti ɗagagga ti usu ti bal mbalǝn kǝni,
8.10: Mus mbalǝn, bazi ni mil, is gakki' kǝm asi usu, “Mulu ɗǝ mbettiki dǝtl ki Lya mul nalti.”
8.11: Si bǝlti kal tǝngaki ta lǝndǝp ɗǝ pǝlisi gagashiti nǝ pǝltl gontwasu i.
8.12: Amma nǝs la'mbatl nǝ dlǝb shilǝn ki gu' ki Lya nǝ shin ki Yesu ki Pilibus, i pǝlisi baptisma mudli nǝ mwani.
8.13: Saminu gawasi illa' badli i pǝli' baptisma. Iki ibbǝl Pilibus kali, i' kup ɓanti nǝ ye' bal ulki gagashintu.
8.14: Nǝ milshikǝn ki Ulshelima kumi mi' Samaliya a ndǝ'nǝ shilǝn ki Lya u, is shin Bitlus nǝ Yahaya tya Samaliya.
8.15: Nǝs mbǝkǝci u, is shilǝn nǝ Lya gaki mi'pyal bǝtl Yesu kal gaki sǝmmbi Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ɗa,
8.16: Gaki Yal ki mbatl ki Lya a mbi gon wasǝn uwai; a pǝlisi baptisma i katl ge'shinki Yesu.
8.17: I Bitlus nǝ Yahaya zǝsi toh, is mbi Yal ki mbatl ki Lya.
8.18: Nǝ Saminu eni zǝttoh ki milshinkǝn ɗǝ bǝtl Yal ki mbatl ki Lya u, ibbǝlsi ulpi.
8.19: I' usu, “Amima bǝlǝnnǝn manti u gaki mus mulnǝ a zǝttoh u ammbi Yal mbatl ki Lya ɗa.”
8.20: I Bitlus ndǝgi i' usu: “Mǝshnǝ ulpwagi, gaki ki enti kǝn ma'ultl bǝlti ki Lya nǝ ulpa!
8.21: Ulǝn a lakki nǝ uluwai, gaki mbadlwa'ɗa nǝm akina ɗǝ Lya wai.
8.22: Gaki nǝgu za'pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa a' ngem Lya ɗǝgon a' okǝlki ɗǝ ge' ulnǝ' ngapi ge' mbadlwa gu.
8.23: Gaki a eni i ka njikǝn nǝ ɗashti nǝ ngapti bezǝn lǝɓa i.”
8.24: I Saminu ndǝgi, “Ngemǝn Lya gayini gaki ulnǝ' dlimini u ɓa ndanǝ ami.”
8.25: Kalkǝ dlib shilǝn ki Lya wasǝn nǝ ndǝ'twasǝn nǝ Yesu, Bitlus nǝ Yahaya is paltya Ulshelima, si dlib shilǝn ki Lya ge' mil gatl ki Samaliya dǝɓili. Pilibus isǝ mul Habasha
8.26: I mul shinkǝn ki Lya ul Pilibus su, “Lǝ tu'tǝn tona ki shitu dǝlgǝn gunǝ pe'te' Ulshelima ɗǝlǝ Gaza u.”
8.27: I' hilya ippeki, tǝn shitu wasi imma isǝ mul Habasha Ndami bal mbalǝn mul nalti, gu' ni'ɗa ge' gu' ki Kandakatu, tikǝ mul zi' lǝɓa (Kǝ “Salauniya ki Habasha”). Muli mbǝ Ulshelima ɗǝ ngep Lya,
8.28: Ti patl tya libi tiki dǝmi ge' Bǝsdomwasi, ti dlib lashti kǝge' lwabbat ki Ishaya.
8.29: I Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ul Pilibus su, “Sha'tya ma' Bǝsdomu.”
8.30: I Pilibus kitǝl tyage' Bǝsdomi, i' kum muli ɗǝ dlib lashti kǝge' lwabbat ki Ishaya. “Kimanǝn ulnǝ ki dlimti ge' lashti uwa?” Pilibus usu.
8.31: “A mani una,” i' usu, “Ai se nǝ mulǝn adlimini.” Immbe Pilibus bi sǝddǝm siti.
8.32: Gukǝ shilǝn ki Lya unǝ ti dlimti u: “A dǝlti kǝnǝ mbila ge' lu poshtiti, kǝnǝ kan unǝ bǝgǝmdla ɗa atoh ɗǝ mul swattiti u, nǝgu ta ɓulbiwai.
8.33: A ge' shidǝtlgawasi is nge bǝtlti baliwasi. Wokǝn matl dlib gǝs ki mbalǝnwasi? Akan dliwas taka ɗǝtǝn dǝb lǝɓa i.”
8.34: I bali i ngem Pilibus, “Dlimini, mul nje'shinkǝn ki Lya u, shilǝn ki o ti dlimti, gwasa ko ki mulǝn?”
8.35: I pilibus gob dlib shilǝn ki Lya itl dlimi' shilǝn ki Yesu.
8.36: Si ge' lǝti is mbǝkǝci ma' bal malon i bali i usu, “Ya mal kǝn ngu. Ya la'tiɗa bǝ kǝkkǝn pǝlitǝn baptisma wai?”
8.37: I pilibus usu, inka la'mbatlu, nǝ mbatl nǝm mu, nǝn pǝliki batisma.” I bali i ndǝgiti i' usu, “A ndǝgi Yesu yakǝn ki Lya kǝni.”
8.38: Ibbǝl zhil tǝ dlil bǝsdomi. Ndǝn wasǝn Pilibus isǝ Bali i is suge' mali i Pilibus pǝli' baptima.
8.39: Nǝs pe'todɗǝ ge' mali u, i Yal ki mbatl ki Lya kan Pilibus, Bali i a yenti nuwai. Izzǝga ati pǝtl hwoltugi.
8.40: Ngonǝnǝ gu i Pilibus lǝ' mbi gawasi a Azontus. Ibbǝl gatl tyai, a ti dlib shilǝn ki Lya mus ge' gatli hal immbǝcci Kaisaliya ɗa.

9.1: Shawulu ɗǝ ngalcik mi'bǝlt Lya kali, ti usu tǝn ti tlosi, i' lǝ ma' bali ki bas lǝɓasi,
9.2: i' gyebti ndǝgini ki laci lwabati ki gǝlu dopga ki yahudawa ki Dimaskus, gaki nǝgu in a mbi mil bǝlt shitu u mwani nǝ mudli, a mbǝlsi ge' galt ki Ulshelima a kǝndǝsi.
9.3: Ti lǝk kǝn ngu, nǝ' ɓal nja ma' Dimasku u, bǝnǝ man tiwasau swai chilton kǝn ngu sul lya ki ga ndǝli nǝti.
9.4: I' nda atli i' kum yalon ɗǝ usu “Shawulu, Shawulu ya lakiɗa ki ngalci tǝnɗa?”
9.5: Ti kuma i' usu, “Kiwokǝni Mulnalti?” I usu, “Amiki Yesu u nǝ ki ngalcitǝ u.
9.6: Amma hilya kǝlǝ ge' gatli, tya ka sǝ dlǝmi' ulnǝ ki pǝli u.”
9.7: Ellǝnsi u nǝ si lǝ ne'tu is hol ulki dlǝmi, si kup yali sayen mullan wai.
9.8: I Shawulu hilya, nǝ bul dwaɗǝn u taman yeluwai. Is nde' kina is sulti Dimasku.
9.9: Muttu maki bǝti ɗa yelluwai, bǝtiɗa ɗamtiwai bǝtiɗa tletiwai.
9.10: Mulan ɗa mul bǝlti a Dimasku shinwasi Hananiya. I Mulban shilniti age' dluti i' usu “Hananiya.” I' ndǝgi amingu Mulban.”
9.11: I mulban ultisu, “Hilya ki bǝl shitu u nǝ ɗǝ mbeti kitaki, a gyemi a libi ɗǝ Yahuza ko mul Talsus nǝn ki, mul shin Shawulu, ti ngu ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya.
9.12: A ge' tlu'ti i' en mullǝn mul shin Hananiya i' zi' toh ga gaki tǝ' yelluɗa.”
9.13: Ngonǝnǝgu i Hananiya ndǝgi i'usu, “Mulban, a lǝm mutti ɗǝ kub shilǝn ki muluyi ma' mbalǝn di mbǝli, ti pǝli' mi'bǝtl Lya besǝn lǝɓa a Ulshelima.
9.14: In ngu bas lǝɓasi sa bǝlti ndǝti tǝ' gob mus mi' mbe shinwagi.”
9.15: Ngonǝnagu mulban i' ul Hananiya su, lǝma' mulna oltu tǝ'dlǝm shin ini ma' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u nǝ gumsi nǝ mbalǝn ki Isla'ila.
9.16: Ami nǝ ga ini an mbokiti toh tǝn mbǝna u nǝtǝ' tle u gaki shin ini.”
9.17: Iki Hananiya lǝ i' tege' libini i'zi shawulu toh ga, “Yelse ini Shawulu, mulban kǝn shinǝni, Yesu unǝ peki tǝn shitu u nǝ bǝli u, ti shinǝni gawagi ki yellu ɗa ɗaɗanu, a' nji kǝn nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ki gunti.”
9.18: Alǝbi alǝbi i ulǝn pekki Shawulu ɗǝ dwaɗǝn kǝnǝ kal pǝti, i'go' yellu ɗaɗanu. Iki i' hilya i pǝli' baptisma,
9.19: kal ki nǝ' ɗami u, i ndǝltwas pallǝbi. Shawulu a Damasku nǝ Ulshelima Shawulu lǝm mutti a Damasku ne' mi'bǝdl Yesu kal.
9.20: Alǝbi alǝbi i' gop dlǝb shilǝn ki Lya age' lu dobga ki Yahudawa, tǝn Yesu yakǝn ki Lya kǝni.
9.21: Mus mi' ginǝ kumti is kum gagashinti is ngemi, “Tikǝ mul nǝ dlaki mi' shilǝn nǝ Lya ga nǝ shin u, a Ulshelima u waiwa? Tǝ mbǝnki gaki tǝ' tǝlasi akina ɗǝ bal lǝɓa ki kǝndi.”
9.22: I Shawulu mbǝl ndǝtl tǝnki, ti hwotti mbatl ki Yahudawa yi nǝ ɗǝ dǝb a Damasku, ti ussu Yesu tikǝ Almasihu.
9.23: Kal ki lǝb mutti i Yahudawa kǝndǝ bi tǝn sǝ' tloti.
9.24: Amma i Shawulu kum ulnǝs kǝndǝ u. Gasi nǝ dloncin asi ɓutti dlabi gatli gaki sǝ' tloti ɗa.
9.25: Amma a gasi i mil kushtiwas kanti is shimti ge' dǝsi is shimti swage' dlabiwon tǝn dli gatl bi. Shawulu a Ulshelima
9.26: Nǝm mbǝ Ulshelima u i' hilya ɗǝ te'ge' mi' bǝtl Yesu kal, amma mus is kum ɓantwasi gaki sa la'mbatl nǝ ti mul bǝtl Yesu kal kǝn wai.
9.27: I Balnaba kanti it tǝlati ma' mi'shinkǝn. Ippisi kan unǝ Shawulu yen Lya tǝn shitu u, i Lya shilǝn nǝti, nǝ kan unǝ' dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya ge' shin ki Yesu bǝni ɓatwai a Damasku u.
9.28: I Shawulu dǝm ne'si ati du' ne'si a Ulshelima, a ti dlǝb shilǝn ki Lya nǝ mbatl nǝm age' shin ki Yesu.
9.29: Ti shilǝn ne' Yahudawa mil kup bi ki Helinawa, ti shotti bi ne'si, amma is gob ngau shitu ki tlotti.
9.30: Nǝ mi' bǝtl Yesu kal mani nǝgu u, is mbǝlti a Kaisaliya is shinti tya Talsus.
9.31: Iki i mus dobga ki mi' bǝtl Yesu kal ki atl ki Yahudiya, nǝkǝ Galili nǝkǝ Samaliya i mbi dǝb ki zoki, si pǝtl lǝɓawasǝn nǝ ɓanti Lya, a yal kǝ mbatl ki Lya ɗǝ ɗǝtlsi, is mbǝl tǝnki ɗa. I dokǝl Iniyasu
9.32: To nǝ Bitlus gandǝl atli mussu, illǝ ɗǝ shini' mbalǝn ki Lya mi'dǝb a Lidda.
9.33: Alǝbi tǝ mbi mulǝn mul shin Iniyasu, tinǝ tle' ki dli hwon usǝpsi tǝn lumutti.
9.34: I Bitlus ultisu “Iniyasu, Yesu Almasihu a ndokǝlki. Hilya ki gadǝl lumut twagi.” Alǝbi it hilya.
9.35: I mus mbalǝn ki Lidda nǝ ki atl ki Salona nǝs yentu, is pal temma Lya. Bitlus tlil Tabita lya ge' mi'mǝshti
9.36: A Yapa mul bǝtl Yesu kalon ɗa mul shin Tabita gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti kǝ Dokas ɗaɗanu, ti pǝtl ulkǝ zoki ati ɗǝtl mi'gini bǝ ulǝn nisi ɗawai u.
9.37: I' goni immǝci, nǝs uti' malu, is zǝti twage' kǝps ki lya.
9.38: Lidda nja nǝ Yapa ɗa; Nǝ mi' bǝtl Yesu kal ki Lidda kumi Bitlus a Lidda u, is shin mbalǝn lop tya ma'ti, sǝ' ngemti, tǝtl dlewti tem ma'si.
9.39: I Bitlus zǝga ne'si, nǝm mbǝkǝci u is tolti twage' kǝps ki lya ni. Mudli i nǝ mwani wasǝn mǝci is dlil nja nǝti, asi kulu, asi mbo'ti toh tǝn lu'lǝgǝl gini Dokas pǝlisi teɗi nǝsi ne'tu.
9.40: Amma i Bitlus pyakǝlsi mus swadla, in ngus atli in ngem Lya. It juyati temma hwunisi, i' usu, “Tabita, hilya.” Ibɓul dwaɗǝn, i' en Bitlus, ih hilya iddǝm nǝ gǝsi.
9.41: It takit toh itl tlǝlti lya. Im mbe mi' ki Lya bi ne' mudli gini mwani wasǝn mǝcu ibbǝlsiti kami.
9.42: I gu mandli mus a Yapa, i mbalǝn diɓǝli la'mbatl nǝ Lya.
9.43: Illǝm mutti diɓǝli a Yapa a libi ɗǝ mul pǝtl bati mul shin Saminu.

10.1: A Kaisaliya i pǝl mulǝn mul shin Kaliniyas, mul kumti nǝ gawasi age' mi' dobga ki sojoji gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki dobga ki Ataliya.
10.2: Ti mulbǝlt Lya kǝni nǝ ɓulti Lya nǝ mbalǝn ki libiwasi ti bǝlt mbalǝn ulkǝ toh wasi nǝ mbalt nǝm, ati shilǝn ngwash ngwash nǝ Lya.
10.3: Gason dom maki ki su'ti, i' en mul shinkǝn ki Lya age' tluti, immbǝ i' ultisu, ki “Kaliniyas!”
10.4: Kaliniyas utti dwaɗǝn nǝ ɓanti, i' usu mulban yakǝni? I mul shinkǝn ki Lya ultisu, shilǝn nǝ Lya nǝ bǝlti wagi a mbǝ kina ɗǝ Lya i.
10.5: Nǝ gun u pǝl shinkǝn swa Yapa sǝ' taki Saminu bi gunǝ si mbetti ki Bitlus su.
10.6: Ishiti ma' Saminu mul motti bati guna libi was nja ma' bal malu.”
10.7: Nǝ mul shinkǝn ki Lya nǝ shin nitu zǝga u, i Kaniliyas taki zheli was lob bi, nǝ mul kǝndǝtl dlomon mul bǝtl shilǝn ki Lya ge' ginǝ ɗǝ pǝlliti kyautǝn hu gasi u kǝni.
10.8: Nǝdl dlimisi mus ulnǝ nda u is shinsi tya Yapa.
10.9: Lucili a dloncin ɓal nja i, sǝ ɓal nja nǝ gatlu ngu, i Bitlus toge' kǝpsi ki lya ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya.
10.10: Kuzǝn a gobti, ti lyap ɗamti, amma ɗǝ pǝtl ulki ɗami i, i tluti mbiti.
10.11: I'en lya a ɓuli, ulǝn ɗǝ sussuɗi kǝnǝ bal ul idlam mbalǝn, ɗǝ shitti su' atli ge' zheltwas upsi.
10.12: A giɓi mus lǝɓa ki dǝlgǝn nǝki ban, nǝmi' dǝtl tugi, nǝ gala'sa nǝ yadli.
10.13: I yalon ultisu, “Bitlus hilya, ki' poci a' ɗami.”
10.14: Amma i Bitlus usu o o, a ɗam bezǝn ulǝn gason wai ko ulnǝ bǝ mbunwai u.
10.15: I' kum yali ɗaɗanu, ki lop, usu, “Ulnǝ Lya a li'ni' u, bǝ palli besniwai.”
10.16: I gu pǝ asǝn maki, alǝbǝ alǝbǝ i dǝl ulisi twalya.
10.17: Uli ɗǝ hwotti Bitlus kǝn ngu tǝn tlutu nǝs pǝlitu, iki i mbalǝn i nǝ Kaliniyas shinsi teɗu, tǝn dlabi, sa lǝge sa ngem libi ki Saminu i.
10.18: Is tabi is ngemi Saminu gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki Bitlus nǝn ɗawa.
10.19: Tun a Bitlus ɗǝ dambǝtlti tǝn tlutu, i Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ultisu, “I ngu mbalǝn maki ɗǝ ngauki.
10.20: Hilya ki' pe'swai, ki bǝlsi kali. Bǝkum ɓantwai, gaki ami shinsi teɗi.
10.21: I Bitlus pe'swa ma' mbalǝni, i' ulsisu, “Ami ki ngautǝma. Ya mbǝlkini?”
10.22: Mbalǝni usu, “Mǝ mbǝni te'ma' ndǝl mulǝn mul kina ki mil kǝndǝ dlom gǝni ɗǝ mbetti ki Kaliniyas, mul zo' mbadli, mul ɓanti Lya, gunǝ mus mbalǝn ki Yahudawa ɗǝ ndwa'titi, mul shinkǝn ki Lya mul gunti ultisu, ti ta shinkǝn, ki lǝ libi ɗakka, tǝ' kum ulnǝ ki' dlimi u.”
10.23: I Bitlus mbǝlsi a libini. Nǝ lucilu i' hilya is zǝga ne'si is dǝm sǝmbǝlswasi, ge' mi' bǝtl Yesu kal ki Yapa is la'ti shitu.
10.24: Lucili im mbǝkǝci a Kaisaliya. Kaliniyas ɗǝ la'ti mbatl ki mbǝ twasǝn, im mbe yelsǝni bi nǝ yelǝnsi wasi.
10.25: Bitlus ɗǝ te' libi ni ngu, i Kaliniyas njeti in nda kina ɗa'ka, in nalti.
10.26: Amma i Bitlus tlǝlti lya, i' usu, “Hilya, amima yakǝn mbalǝn kǝni.”
10.27: Nǝ Bitlus ɗǝ shilǝn situ, it te' giɓi in mbi mbalǝn diɓǝli a domga i.
10.28: I' ulsisu, “Kini nǝ gawakǝn ki manini, a mbunwai tǝ mul Yahudiya maga ko sǝl le' shinni mulnǝ bǝ biwas kǝn wai u. Amma Lya a mboki toh ba ul mulǝnsu mul bezǝn mbadlwai, ko mul ulkǝ ci'zhentwai.
10.29: Gaki nǝgu, nǝs ta shinkǝn ta mbǝ u, a ngewai. To nǝgun ami lyamti ta kumi ya laki i' takinǝn biɗa.”
10.30: I Kaliniyas usu, “Asǝti mutti maki ngu, lu nǝguni, ami shilǝn nǝ Lya ki dom maki ki su'ti a libi ɗa ka, bǝnǝ mantiwai sai mulǝn kǝn ngu ki dlili nǝ hwol lulǝgǝl akina ɗa ka.
10.31: I muli usu, Kaliniyas, Lya akum shilǝn nǝtiwagi, bǝlti wagi a dǝm ulki dambǝlti akina ɗǝ Lya.
10.32: Gaki nǝgu a' shin shinkǝ tya Yapa ti taki Saminu bi, gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki Bitlus su, am mbǝ a libi ɗǝ Saminu mul pǝtl bati abi bal mal.’
10.33: Alǝbi alǝbi ya taki' shinkǝn, a mbuni ni' mbǝ u, to nǝguni i ngu mus ma mbǝ a kina ɗǝ Lya i, gaki tǝn kum undi zhili u nǝ Lya piku.”
10.34: I Bitlus pisi i' usu “Nǝgun amani balini Lya ɗa nge mbalǝnwai.
10.35: Amma mus mbalǝn milɓantiti nǝ mul pǝl ulki zoki ulkǝ kamini amatti.
10.36: Lya ta shinkǝn tu'ma' mbalǝn ki Isilaila, asi pitsi shilǝn multǝmti ki holtugi tu'ma' Yesu Almasihu, tikǝ Lya kǝ kowagi.
10.37: Kǝmanǝn shilǝn u nǝ dla'ga age' alt ki Yahudiya, tun te' Galili kal ki pǝli' mbalǝn batisma ki Yahaya atipi' mbalǝn shilǝn ki Lya
10.38: mǝkum shilǝn ki Yesu Banazalat gunǝ Lya swati nǝ Yal ki mbalt ki Lya kǝ zoki mul ndǝltti, i' gobduti ati pǝtl ulkǝ zoki, ati ndokǝl mus ginǝ sheɗan ɗǝ bǝlsi kalu gaki Lya matti.
10.39: Mine mi'enti nǝ dwaɗǝkǝni ki Yesu nǝ mus ulnǝ pǝli age' alt ki Yahudiya nǝ Ulshelima u. Iki is tlotti atǝn gadlǝtga,
10.40: Amma i Lya tlǝti age' mutti maki i' mbǝlgawas ge' mbalǝn.
10.41: Ma' mbalǝn mus kǝn tǝ mbǝlgawa swai, se mami' enti nǝ dwaɗǝnwasi ginǝ Lya oli tun te'ɗi wato mini u nǝn ɗamini i' tle ne' tu kal ki hilyawas ge' mi'mǝshti.
10.42: Ippimini tǝn dlǝmi mbalǝn shilǝn ki Lya, mini ne mi'enti nǝ dwaɗǝnwaskǝni tǝn ti Lya latti mul pǝli' mbalǝn mi'dli nǝ mi'mǝshti shilǝn.
10.43: Mus milnjeshinkǝn is pǝl enti nǝ dwaɗǝn ɗǝ ussu tu' ma shin wasi mus mulnǝ alambatl tu' ma'tu tǝn mbi' pekǝlti.”
10.44: Bitlus age' shilǝn kǝngu, i Yal ki mbatl ki Lya i nde mus mi' kubti suɗi.
10.45: I Yahudawa mi' ndǝti nǝ sǝlkǝn is mbǝ ne' Bitlus su is kub gagashiti hal ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u is mbi bǝlti ki Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ki gunti.
10.46: Ama is kubmi si shilǝn nǝ bi diɓǝli asi natl Lya. I Bitlus usu,
10.47: “Mul ma' hana pǝlit mbalǝn i baptisma nǝ mal nǝn ɗaya? Sima sa mbi Yal ki mbalt ki Lya i kan u nǝn mbini u.”
10.48: I Bitlus bǝlsi zhil sǝpǝlisi Baptisma age' shin ki Yesu Almasihu is ngemti tǝdǝm kǝ mutti lob ne' si.

11.1: Mi'shinkǝn ne' yelsǝni gini ge' atl ki Yahudiya nǝs kumi, mi' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawai u sa ndǝ' nǝ shilǝn ki Lya i.
11.2: Nǝ Bitlus mbǝ Ulshelima u, ginǝs ndǝ' nǝ sǝlkǝn u is shimi' shilǝn,
11.3: is usu, “I ngu ka te libi ɗǝ min ginǝ bǝ sa sǝlsiwai u i, i' ɗami ne'si.”
11.4: I Bitlus gop dlǝmissi mus shilǝn nisi,
11.5: “Ami, a ge' gatl ki Yapa ami shilǝn nǝ Lya, i tlu'ti mbi ni, yayen ulǝn sul lya ɗǝ sussuɗi kǝnǝ bal ul idla mbalǝn, tuge' malgǝn upsi, i mbǝ ma'kǝni.
11.6: Na wutti' dwaɗǝn u, yayen tlu ki dǝlgǝn nǝ ki ban mi' asǝn upsi ki ge dǝp lǝɓa, ne' mi'dǝl tugi, ne' yadlǝ a giɓi.
11.7: Ya kum yalon ah ulǝnsu i', ‘Bitlus. Hilya, ki' poci, aɗami.’
11.8: Ya' usu, a nge i, mulban, gaki bezǝn lǝɓawon a tee bi gasonwai.’
11.9: I Yal shilǝn sullya ki lop, i' usu, ‘Ulnǝ Lya a li'ni' u, bǝ mbe besniwai.’
11.10: I pǝlgu asǝn maki, iki i dǝl uli twalya ɗaɗanu.
11.11: Bǝnǝ mantiwai he mbalǝn maki ngi ki dlǝli abidlabi u nǝ amiɗa u, sǝ shinǝnsi ma'kǝni te' Kaisaliya.
11.12: I Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ulǝnsu ta zǝga ne'si, bǝnǝ cetl mbadlwai. Yelsǝni gi mǝkka i is zǝga ne' kǝni, illǝ libi ɗǝ muli.
11.13: Itl dlǝmimi kan unǝ en mul shinkǝn ki Lya mbǝl gawasi a libi ɗakka u, ti ussu, ‘Pǝshinkǝn swa Yapa sǝttaki Saminu bi, gunǝ simbetti ki Bitlus,
11.14: Tǝh dlǝmikkin shilǝn u, nǝ ki nǝ mus libi wagi ki mbi pekǝtl ɗa.’
11.15: “Nǝ gopti shilǝn ini, i Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ndesi suɗi, kan unǝ ndemi suɗi te' kalu.
11.16: Ya dambǝl shilǝn ki mulban, kan u' nǝ' usu, ‘Yahaya ɓo, nǝ mal kǝn ti pǝli' mbalǝn batisma, kini ɓo nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya kǝn sǝppǝlikini.’
11.17: Kan u nǝ Lya bǝlsi manti u ndace nǝ gunǝ bǝlǝnmini u, nǝ la'ti mbatl nǝ mulban Yesu Almasihu u, ami ki wongi ta dlǝli nǝ Lya!”
11.18: Nǝs kumi nǝgu u, is hol ulnǝ sǝdlǝmi u, is nal Lya is usu, “Ai, ginǝ' bǝ Yahudawa wai u Lya a bǝlsi pe'ti ɗǝ ge' bezǝn lǝɓa nǝ mbim mbatldli.” Milbǝtl Lya a Antakiya ki Suliya
11.19: Ginǝ dla' ga tǝn gaki bǝna u nǝ nda gunǝ mbǝl tlo Istipanǝs su, is lǝ tyage' atl ki pinikiya, nǝ calgatl ki Kubulus, nǝ gatl ki Antakiya, sǝɗa dlǝmi' mulǝn shilǝn ki Lya wai Yahudawa katl.
11.20: Genwasǝn, mbalǝn ki Kubulus ne' ki Kulane, is lǝ Antikiya is go' dlǝmi' mi' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u, zo' shilǝn tǝn Yesu.
11.21: Toh ki Lya tǝnsi, i mbalǝn dǝɓǝli la'mbadli is pal temma' mulban.
11.22: I shilǝni mbǝ'ci ge'lu libi ki mi' bǝtl Lya kal ki Ulshelima, iki is shin Balnabas tya Antakiya.
11.23: Nǝn mbǝkǝci u i' en ulki zoki u nǝ Lya pǝlisi u, ippǝl hwol tugi, in ndǝllisi mbadli sǝ'dlil nǝ bali tǝn Lya nǝ mus mbadlwasǝn.
11.24: Ti mul zo' mbatl kǝni, ki njǝkǝni nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya nǝ la'ti mbadli, i dǝɓǝl mbalǝn mbǝ ma' Mulban.
11.25: Iki i Balnabas lǝ tya Talsus ɗǝ ngau Shawulu,
11.26: Iki nǝm mbitu, im mbǝlti Antakiya, i hwon njikǝn ɗa Balnabas isi Shawulu asi ma'ga ge' libi ki Lya asi kulci' dǝɓǝl mbalǝn a Antakiya sǝ go' mbe' mi' bǝdl Yesu kal ki Kilista.
11.27: To a hwonisi mi'nje shikǝn kǝ Lya en pe'te' Ulshelima is mbǝ Antakiya.
11.28: Nǝm age' si, mul shin Agabus, i' hilya il dlǝmi nǝ ndǝl ki Yal ki mbatl ki Lya nǝn pǝtl bal kuzǝn won ge' atl ki gu' kǝ Lomawa. (Pǝlǝn dli ge' hwon ci' gu' ki Kalaudiyas.)
11.29: I milkushti dlilli, hu wonngi tǝn ndǝl twasi, tǝnma' ɗǝtl yelsǝni ginǝ ɗǝ dǝb a Yahudiya u.
11.30: Nǝgu sǝpǝli, is shin bǝltiwasǝn gaki ɗǝtl mi'kina tu'ma' Balnabas isi shawulu.

12.1: Age' cini i Guu Hilidus gop mil bǝtl Yesu kal tǝngaki tǝ' hwotisi bǝnaɗa.
12.2: Il laki i tlo Yakubu yelse ki Yahaya nǝ bal pǝga.
12.3: Nǝ' en gu a mbuni Yahudawa u, i' gob Bitlus ɗaɗanu. Gu ndani ge' hwon ki dobga ki daddaɓǝl ki ulki ɗami u nǝbǝ yis nidɗawai u.
12.4: Kal ki gobtiti, illa'ti ge'lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn, ibbǝl sojoji upsi upsi lǝbi upsi sǝ' ɓutti, lyamti ki Hilidus tǝm mbilti kina ɗǝ mbalǝn, kal ki daddaɓǝl ki ɗakǝshti.
12.5: Iki is zǝ Bitlus a ge'lu kǝndǝ' mbalǝn, dobga ki mi' bǝtl Yesu kal is go' shilǝn nǝ Lya gawasi.
12.6: A ge' gasu nǝ ǝnlu a cilu nǝ Hilidus ti lyabti tǝ pekǝlti kina dǝ mbalǝn, Bitlus ati nde'emmbuɗi ge' dlom ki mi' kǝndǝ dlom lop, ki kǝndǝ nǝ zhimdom lop, ami' ɓutti dlabi atǝn bidlabi.
12.7: I mul shinkǝn ki Lya won mbǝ i lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn ni cili. Illi' Bitlus tǝn malgǝn itl tlilti lya, i' usu, “Dleuki, ɗǝ tlǝl lya!” Iki zhim domi waki Bitlus ɗǝ toh.
12.8: I mul shinkǝn ki Lya ni ultisu, “La' lu'lǝgǝl a shim kaptalanwagi.” I Bitlus pǝli nǝgu. “Dla' ul idlakiwagi a' bǝlǝnkal,”
12.9: I Bitlus bǝlti kal is pe' ɗǝge' lu kǝndǝ mbalǝni, amma tǝman ulnǝ mul shinkǝn ki Lya ɗǝ pǝlti u kǝnǝ baliwai; enti tiɗa kǝnǝ tlu'ti.
12.10: Is ɗakǝsh mi' ɓutti ki nǝm nǝ ki lop is mbǝ tǝn dlabi ki dom ki te' ge' gatli. I dlabini ɓulisi nigawasi, is petya giɓi. Nǝs gollǝtu is mbǝkǝci lu unǝ bal shitu i pa'ɗa u, a lǝbi a lǝbi i mul shinkǝn ki Lya ni za'ti.
12.11: Nǝ Bitlus pal ge' dliwasu i' usu, “Nǝguni amani i, bǝnǝ bwasti mbadlwai Lya kǝn shin mul shinkǝn was suɗi tǝppe'kǝlǝn te' toh ɗǝ Hilidus nǝ mus ulnǝ Yahudawa ɗǝ la'ti mbatl ki ndatwa su.”
12.12: Nǝgu ndanǝti u, illǝ libi ɗǝ Maliyamu dyaki Yahaya, gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki Malkus ɗaɗanu, lu u'nǝ mbalǝn domga ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya ɗa u.
12.13: I Bitlus du dlalabi ki dla, i zheli won mul shin Loda lǝte' ɗǝ ya' woki mul du' dlabi ni.
12.14: Nǝm mani yal ki Bitlus kǝn u, ta ɓul dlabi niwai i' kum hwoltugi ippal tya nǝ kal nǝ kitǝl itl dlǝmi, “Bitlus tǝn dlabi.
12.15: Is ultisu “Ama ga niki ɗawa. Nǝ'go' dlǝmissi nǝgu ɗa u, is usu, mul shinkǝnki Lya was kǝni.”
12.16: Amma i Bitlus go' du' dlabi ni, nǝs ɓul dlabi ni u is enti, is kum gagashinti.
12.17: I Bitlus u nisi toh sǝddǝm shot itl dlǝmisi kan unǝ Lya pekkǝlti ɗǝge' lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn u. I' usu, “Dlǝmi Yakubu ne' yelsǝni mwani nǝ mudli tǝn ulu,” is za'si illǝ ge' kundu lu.
12.18: Nǝ lu cilu i bal dlatl nda ge dlom ki mi' kǝndǝ dlom tǝn ulnǝ nda nǝ Bitlus su.
12.19: Kal ki nǝ Hilidus ngauti ta mbitwai u, i' gop pǝtl mi' ɓuttiti i nǝ shilǝn il laki tǝ tlosi. Iki i Hilidus za' Yahudiya illǝ Kaisaliya iddǝm tyaka. Mǝshti ki Hilidus
12.20: Hilidus ɗǝ leuwi mbatl tǝn mbalǝn ki Taya nǝ Sidon; is maga is mbǝmati nǝ mbatl nǝm, kal ki ngau ɗǝtl ma' Bilastasa, zheli ki guu is ngau dǝp ki zoki, gaki tǝn atl ki guu nisi ɗǝ ga'tisi si mbǝ' ulki ɗami ɗa.
12.21: A tǝn cin unǝ zǝdli, i Hilidus la'lu'lǝgǝl guntwasi, it dǝmtǝn lu dǝmti ki gunti ippǝli mbalǝn shilǝn.
12.22: Is la'yali, “Guki Yal ki lya, ki mbalǝnwai.”
12.23: Alǝbi alǝbi, gaki Hilidus a nal Lya wai, imul shinkǝn ki Lya li'ti atli, i zhǝɓǝl gob ɗapti in mǝtci.
12.24: Amma iki shilǝn ki Lya gop mbǝtl tǝnki a ɗǝ ɓulti. Balnabas nǝ Shawulu
12.25: Balnabas nǝ Shawulu nǝs ngatl kautǝn wasǝn u, is palsu' Ulshelima, is mbǝ ne' Yahaya, gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki Malkus ɗaɗanu u.

13.1: Age' lu dobga ki mi'bǝtl Yesu kal ki Antakiya, mi'nje'shinkǝn ki Lya en ɗa nǝ mi'lashti: Balnabas, nǝ Saminu guni ɗǝ mbetti ki Baki, nǝ Lukiyas ki Kulane, nǝ Manayan gunǝs nal to'ɗi isǝ Guu Hilidus nǝ Shawulu.
13.2: Nǝsi natl Lya nǝ ngaptibi ɗaɗanu u, i Yal ki batl ki Lya ki gunti usu, “A'wolinǝn Balnabas nǝ Shawulu gaki kyautǝn u na mbesibi ɗa u.”
13.3: Kalki ngaptibi nǝ ngep Lya wasǝn, is zǝsi toh, is pallisi bi. Shilǝn ki Lya a Kubulus
13.4: Si lopi, tǝn shitu wasǝn nǝ Yal ki batl ki Lya shinsi u, is lǝ Salukiya tyaka is tege' kundǝlǝn ki mal is lǝ Kubulus.
13.5: Nǝs mbǝkǝci a Salami u, is dlǝmisi shilǝn ki Lya ge'lu lu dobga ki Yahudawa, Yahaya ne'si ti ɗǝtlsi.
13.6: Is gadǝl cal gatli hal is mbǝ a Bapusa. A tyaka is mah ne' mul Yahude won mul pǝtl gonti, mul nje'shinkǝn ki lǝgati, mul shin Balyashuwa’
13.7: gunǝ isǝ mukaddas Saljiyas Baulus, mul mallǝɓa, it taki ki Balnabas bi isǝ shawulu gaki ti lyap kup shilǝn ki Lya.
13.8: Amma Alimas mul idlatl dwaɗǝn u (gu iki shinwasi) in nge' shilǝnwasǝn, in ngayi tǝb bwas mukaddasiyi ɗǝ tǝn la'ti mbadlwasi nǝ Lya.
13.9: Iki Shawulu, gunǝ ɗǝ mbettiki Bulus ɗaɗanu u, ki njikǝnǝ, nǝ Yal ki batl ki Lya, i'uti Alimas dwaɗǝn i' usu,
13.10: “Ki yakan ki shedan kǝnǝ, mul dutuki, nǝ lǝɓa kizoki! Ka njikǝn i nǝ gǝdl mbalǝn nǝ shiptotugi. Kikǝn za'ti jitti shitu ki Lya waya?
13.11: In ngu toh ki Lya ɗǝ leuh mbatl nǝki. Kǝn dǝmti dwa ki lǝpdǝmti, ki kǝn ma'etcitl ki cinwai.” Alǝbi alǝbi i wolkǝnndi nǝ dǝmshal idlati, i'go' ngauti, tǝ mulǝn dǝllit toh.
13.12: Nǝmul mukaddasi yen ulnǝ nda u, illa' mbadlǝ, i' kum ngapti bi tǝn shilǝn ki Mulban. Bulus nǝ Balnabas a Antakiya ki Bisidiya
13.13: A te' Basusa, Bulus ne' yelǝnsi wasi is tege' kundǝlǝn ki mali is mbǝkǝci Baliyata ki Bampiliya, alǝbi Yahaya za'si ippal tya Ulshelima.
13.14: A te' Baliyata is lǝ tya Bisidiya ge' atl ki Antakiya. Gas cinshu'ti is tege' ludopga ki Yahudawa is dǝm atli.
13.15: Kal ki dlǝmissi lashti zhil ki Musa nǝ lwatbat ki mi'nje' shinkǝn ki Lya, mi'kina ki lu dobga ki Yahudawa shin shinkǝn tǝnsi, is usu, “Yelsǝni, in shilǝn nikinɗa ki ndǝlli' mbalǝn mbadlu a' dlǝmini.”
13.16: I Bulus hilya i' unisi toh, i' usu kumǝnnǝni, “Kini Yelsǝni Isla'ilawa nǝ kini mi' bǝtl Lya ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa u.
13.17: Lya ki mi' Isla'ila i' ol mi'zǝ' mi'zinmini; in nal mbalǝn wasi nǝs dǝm a Masallu; nǝ ndǝtl ki naltwaskǝn tǝ pekkǝlsi ɗǝ ge'atli;
13.18: Hwon kutl kutl lǝbi upsi ati ngashtibi nǝsi age' dǝlgǝn;
13.19: Itl tlwa mbalǝn gatl ninngi a Kan'ana, ibbǝl mbalǝnwas atlwasǝn ɗǝ gwasǝn.
13.20: Musgi akan hwon kutl cen upsi nǝ kutl lǝbi nantam (450). “Kal kigu, i Lya bǝlsi mi'pǝtl shilǝn hal cin ki mbǝ ki Sama ila mul nje'shinkǝn ki Lya.
13.21: I mbalǝn ngawi tǝ bǝlsi gunti, Ibbǝlsi Saul yakǝn ki Kish, mulisi ge' bi ki Bilyaminu, ippǝl gunti ki hwon kutl kutl lǝbi upsi.
13.22: Kalki tusti Saul taka, ippal Dauda ɗǝ guu wasǝn. I Lya ndǝ'nǝti, i' usu, ‘A mbi Dauda i, yakǝn ki Jessi, mulnǝ ami lyapti ge' mbadli u; tǝn pǝtl mus ulnǝ ami lyamti tǝppǝli u.’
13.23: Age' gǝskǝ mulgu Lya mbilli Isla ila mul pekkǝtl si Yesu, kan u nǝ dlǝlli u.
13.24: Kapǝn mbǝ' ki Yesu,Yahaya a dlǝmi Isla ilawa sǝ'za'pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa appǝlisi baptisma muswasǝn.
13.25: Nǝ Yahaya ɓal nja ki ngwatlti kyautǝn wasu, i' usu: ‘Wokǝn ki paltǝni? Ami ki gunǝ ki ɓuttǝn uwa. Amma mulǝn ɗa ti mbǝ' ge' kalini gunǝ zhim kaptǝlan wasi akǝn mat tǝngǝltiwai.’
13.26: “Kini mil ki Iblahim nǝ na mi'ɓantil Lya age' kini, mini shinimin shinkǝn ki pekkǝltu suɗi.
13.27: Mbalǝn ki Ulshelima ne' guumsisi wasǝn saman Yesu wai, ngo'nǝ konnǝtti u is njikǝn dlǝmti ki mi'nje'shinkǝn gunǝ ɗǝ dlipdli huh gas cin shu'tu.
13.28: Ko nǝbǝ sa mbiti nǝ bezǝn lǝɓa ki tlotwai u, is ngem Bilatus tǝtl tloti.
13.29: Nǝs njikǝn mus ulnǝ lashdli tǝntu, is shitti suɗɗǝ tǝn gǝdlǝnnga is la'ti ge' zuɗi.
13.30: Amma i Lya tlǝlti ɗǝge' mǝshti,
13.31: Mutti diɓǝli ati ɓǝtl gawasi ma' ginǝ mbǝ ne'ti a Ulshelima te Galili nǝguni siki mi' yenti nǝ dwaɗǝnwasi ma' mbǝlǝn i nǝn.
13.32: Mi dlǝmikin zo'shilǝn: Ki ndǝtu nǝ Lya pǝli' mi'zǝ'mi'zinmini u.
13.33: Ta njikǝnimini i, mini milwasi, tǝn tlǝtl Yesu lya. Kan unǝ ɗa ki laci u ge' Zabula ki lop: “ ‘Ki yakuyi kǝni; Asǝti adǝm bwagi.
13.34: Lya tlǝlti ge' mi'mǝshti tǝngaki tǝkǝn patl ge' shukǝ ɓostinuwai, Lya usu, “ ‘An bǝtlkin albalka kizoki u na pǝli Dauda dlǝliti u.’
13.35: Tǝn gaki Zabula won a dlǝmini: “ ‘Kikǝn za'ti mul guntwagi tǝb ɓoswai.’
13.36: Dauda ɓo, i' pǝl ulnǝ Lya pitu age' hwonwasi, in nde yemmbuɗi; i guti ne'mi'ziǝ'mi'zitti i dliwas ɓosi.
13.37: Amma gu nǝ Lya tlǝlti ɗǝ ge' mi' mǝshtuwai ta ɓoswai.
13.38: “Gaki nugu yelǝnsiyini, ami lyamti ki'manini tu'ma' Yesu dlimi kini pashti bezǝn lǝɓa.
13.39: Tu' ma'ti mus mulnǝ ala' mbadlu ta mbi pekǝltu ngu ɗǝge' mus byaslǝɓa, gunǝ bǝ kushti ki Musa taman pekǝtl kiniwai u.
13.40: A' yanǝn lu gaki ɓa ulnǝ mi'nje'shinkǝn dlimi u ndanǝ kini.
13.41: “ ‘Ya nini, kini mi'mbǝtl lǝɓa. Kǝn pǝtl ga gashinti a gǝlni, an pǝtl ulǝn ge' hwonwakǝn gunǝ kǝkkǝn la'ti mbatl nǝ nali wai u, ko tǝ mulǝn dlimi kini.’ ”
13.42: Nǝki Bulus isǝ Balnabas ɗǝ pe'ti ɗǝge' lu dopga ki Yahudawa u, i mbalǝn mbesi bi sǝmmbil dlǝmisi shilǝn tǝn usi gas cin shuti mul mbǝti.
13.43: Nǝ dopga ki mbalǝn zǝgga u, Yahudawa dǝɓǝli ne' mi' ginǝ te'ge' undi bǝlti ki Yahudawa is bǝl ki Bulus kal isǝ Balnabas, sine is pisi shilǝn asi ndǝllisi mbadlǝ sǝcci kina ɗa, ge'alheli ki Lya.
13.44: Nǝ cin shuti mbǝ ɗaɗanu u kǝnǝ mus mbalǝn kige' gatli domga tǝngaki sǝ'kum shilǝn ki Lya.
13.45: Nǝ Yahudawa en hwu' mbalǝn u, is kum dutugi, is gob nge' ulnǝ Bulus ɗǝ dlǝmti u asi byatlti.
13.46: I Bulus isǝ Balnabas is ndǝgisi nǝ ndǝtl ki mbadli: “Kini mi' dlǝmikin shilǝn ki Lya pa. Amma tun nǝ' ka ngeni u, adǝmi ki ɗa lyap mbatl mul lǝshi pa'twai, mǝnpalti tya ma'gini bǝ Yahudawa wai u.
13.47: Tǝn gu Lya zimi zhil: “ ‘A la'ki, cili ge' mi'ginǝ bǝs man Lya wai u, gaki ki dǝm shitu mbi pe'kǝtl ki mbǝlǝn ɗa hal pa'ti ki dǝp lǝɓaɗa.
13.48: Nǝ ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u kumgu u, is kum hwoltugi is nal shilǝn ki Lya; i mus mi'mbi dli unǝ bǝ kǝn mǝshtwai u is la'mbadli.
13.49: I shilǝn ki Lya mbǝl lǝllolu' tǝnki mus age' atli.
13.50: Amma Yahudawa gob hotti na mudli en mi'ɓantil Lya mi'bas lu kyautǝn ne' mi'kina kige' gatli. Is tlǝl ngashti tǝn Bulus isǝ Balnabas, is katsi ɗǝge' atlwasǝn.
13.51: Sine is bǝkǝt kushka ki asǝn wasǝn taka tǝ dǝm dǝtlkǝmɗa tǝnsi is lǝ tya Ikoniya.
13.52: Milkushtiwas njikǝn nǝ hwol tugi nǝ Yal ki batl ki Lya.

14.1: A Ikoniya Bulus isǝ Balnabas is tege' lu dobga ki Yahudawa kan u nǝs kuɗa u is dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya hal i hwu' Yahudawa ne' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u la'mbadli.
14.2: Amma Yahudawa ginǝ nge la'ti mbadli is ho' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u is kon nǝ dlomwasǝn ne' yelsǝniwasǝn.
14.3: I ki Bulus nǝ Balnabas is lǝmdǝp tyaka, si dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya nǝ ndǝtl ki mbadli, i' pǝl enti nǝ dwaɗǝn tǝn shilǝn ki alheli wasi gunǝ la'si ɗǝ pǝtl ulki gagashintu.
14.4: I mbalǝn ki ge' gatli bwassi; nami tǝn Yahudawa, genne si tǝn kal ki mi'shinkǝn.
14.5: I ki gyen ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u nǝ Yahudawa ne' mi'kinawasǝn, is kǝndi sǝl la'si ge' sha as la'si nǝ zǝnga.
14.6: Amma nǝs kum shilǝn nǝ u, is kitǝl tyage' gatl ki Likoniya ki Listila nǝ Dalba, nǝ atl ki malgǝni.
14.7: Alǝbǝ sǝ mbǝl dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya tǝnki. A Listila nǝ Dalba
14.8: A Listila mulǝn ɗa ki dǝmi atli dakǝlkǝni, nǝgu sǝ'zǝtti ta lǝm lǝ' gason wai.
14.9: Ti ga'ki' shilǝn ki Bulus kǝm, i Bulus uti' dwaɗǝn, i' en la'ti mbatl ni'ɗa akǝm ki ndo'twasi,
14.10: it ultisu nǝ ndǝlti, “Hilya tǝn asǝnwagi!” Gaki nǝgu, i muli pe' lya i' gob lǝti.
14.11: Nǝ hwu' mbalǝn yen ulnǝ Bulus pǝli u, is la' yali nǝbi ki Likoniya is usu, “Inngu lya yen a ndemin suɗǝ kǝnǝ mbalǝn!”
14.12: Balnabas is mbekki Zapsa, tine Bulus is mbekki Hamisa gaki tikǝ mulkina ki shilǝn.
14.13: Iki i laɓa ki zapsa, gunǝ libi pǝtl gontwas a kal gatlu, immbǝl bas tla nǝ dwaɗǝn ki buzha pǝtti abidlabi gatli, gaki ti ne' mbalǝn si lyap pǝli'si hadaya.
14.14: Amma ki Balnabas isǝ Bulus, nǝs kumgu' u, is kyash lu'lǝgǝlwasǝn is te'ge' mbalǝni nǝ kitǝl, asi tlǝlyal:
14.15: “Yelǝnsi, ya laki i' pǝlǝn nǝ guɗa? Mima mbalǝnni, kǝnǝ kini. Shilǝn ki Lya kǝn mi mbǝlli' kini, ɗǝ utlkinsu ki' zakǝn ulnǝ bǝ mbunwai u, a' palni ma' Lya mul mbadli, gunǝ pǝl lya nǝ atlu, nǝ basmal, nǝ mus ulnǝ ge'si u.
14.16: Tini tun teɗi is za' mbalǝn sǝ' bǝl shitu u nǝ si lyamti u.
14.17: Ngo nǝnǝgu taza' gawas ba mi' enti nǝ dwaɗǝwai, tǝn gaki ti pǝli' alheli, ti gunǝ ɗǝ pǝli'kin mal ki lya ne' lǝɓa ki ge' gu ki watlin; ti bǝtlkin ulki ɗami iye, ti njǝkǝnkin nǝ hwoltugi.”
14.18: Mus nǝ shilǝngi, nǝ ngeskǝn sǝ hane mbalǝn hadaya gawasǝn.
14.19: I Yahudawa yen pe'te' Antakiya nǝ Ikoniya is shel mbalǝni. Is lalla' Bulus is dǝlti kal gatli, si yenti kǝnǝ ta mǝcci.
14.20: Amma i mi' bǝtl Yesu kal is dopga is gadǝlti, i' hilya ippaltya ge' gatli. Lucili is lǝ Dalba isǝ Balnabas. Patl te' Antakiya age' Suliya
14.21: Is dlim shilǝn ki Lya a ge gatli is mbi mi' bǝtl Yesu kal diɓǝli. Iki is paltya Listila nǝ Ikoniya nǝ kuma Antakiya,
14.22: Si ndǝlli' mi' bǝtl Yesu kal mbadli, si dǝlissi kǝm sǝ' dlil tǝn la'ti mbalwasǝn. “Nǝ bǝna mul diɓǝtl kǝn tǝn ten ge' gu' ki Lya,” Is usu.
14.23: Bulus nǝ Balnabas is ollisi mi'kina hu lu dobga ki mi' bǝtl Yesu kalu kǝni, nǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya nǝ ngap tibi, is za'si a toh ɗǝ Lya, gunǝ tǝnti sǝ la' mbadlu.
14.24: Nǝs pa' du' a Bisidiya u, is mbǝ a Bampiliya.
14.25: Nǝs dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya a Baliyata u, is su Ataliya.
14.26: Te' Ataliya is paltya Antakiya ge' kudǝlǝn ki mal, ge' lu' u nǝ teɗi shilǝn nǝ Lya gawasǝn ɗa u is mbi alheli ki pa'ti kyautǝn ɗa.
14.27: Mbǝkǝshtiwasǝn tyaka, is domi mi' bǝtl Yesu kal ga is dlǝm mus ulnǝ Lya pǝli tu' ma'si u, nǝ kan unǝ' ɓuldlabi imi' gǝnǝ bǝ Yahudawai u mbi pe'tu.
14.28: Is lǝm dǝp tya ka ne' mi' bǝtl Yesu kal.

15.1: I mbalǝn yen pe'te' Yahudiya is mbǝ Antakiya si kulci' mi'bǝtl Yesu kal: si usu “In a sǝlkin kan u nǝ mbidli ma' Musa u wai u, kikǝn mbi' pe'kǝltwai.”
15.2: Tǝn shilǝn gu mbǝlli ki Bulus nǝ Balnabas shotti bi mul ndǝlti ne' si. Is la'ki tǝkǝ Bulus nǝ Balnabas, ne' mi'bǝtl Yesu kalen, sǝtto Ulushelima ma' milshinkǝn ne' kolsi tǝn shilǝ ni.
15.3: A si tǝn shitu wasǝn, kǝlǝ' tya pinikiya nǝ Samaliya, i Ikilisiya la'si shitu, asi dlib kan unǝ ginǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u bǝl Yesu kal. Shilǝn gu i laki mus mi'bǝtl Yesu kal is kum hwoltugi.
15.4: Nǝs mbǝkǝci Ulshelima u, i mil Ikilisiya nǝ mil shinkǝn nǝ kolsi ulisi ɗem, sine is dlimisi mus ulnǝ Lya pǝli tu'ma'si u.
15.5: Na mi'bǝtl Yesu kalen, mi'bǝtl ɗalika ki Palisiyawa is hilya is usu, “Ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u nǝn sǝtlsi la'si nǝ ngesi amus sǝbbǝl zhil ki Musa.”
15.6: I milshikǝn ne' Kolsi is maga sǝ'ya shilǝn u.
15.7: Kal ki shotti bi wasǝn mul ndǝlti, i Bitlus hilya idlǝmisi shilǝn: “Yelsǝni, kimanini te' ge' cinyen te' ka Lya a wolin nǝn ge' kini, abi ɗaka ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u sǝ'kum shilǝn ki Lya as la' mbadli.
15.8: Lya mul ma' mbadli, ta mbo toh i ta ndǝ'nǝsi i, hal ibbǝlsi Yal ki mbatl ki Lya mul gunti, kan unǝ' bǝlmi u.
15.9: Ta bwas dlominǝn ne'siwai, gaki ta okǝl mbadlwasǝn taka i gaki la'ti mbadlwasǝn.
15.10: Gaki nǝgu, ya lakiɗa iki lyap cimbǝtl Lya ɗa, ka zi mi'bǝtl Yesu kali kaya unnǝ mini ne' mi'zǝ' mi'zǝ'mini ma, mamanǝn kanti wai u?
15.11: Ma la' mbatli tǝn alheli ki Yesu mǝ mbi pe'kǝtl ɗa, kǝnǝ kan u nǝs mbi u.”
15.12: I mus hwu' mbalǝn i dǝm shot, si gakki' Balnabas isi Bulus kǝm, nǝsi dlǝmissi gagashintu nǝ Lya pǝli ge' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u tu'ma'si.
15.13: Nǝs paki u, i Yakubu shilǝni. “Kini yelsǝni,” Kumǝnnǝni.
15.14: Bitlus dlimmimmi kan unǝ Lya gob likǝnti i otl mbalǝn ge'shin wasi te'ge' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u.
15.15: Shilǝn ki mi'nje shinkǝn nda'ce kǝnɗa nǝgu, kan unǝ ɗaki laci' u:
15.16: “ ‘Kal ki gu an palti, ɗaɗanu akǝn libi ki Dauda gunǝ nda u. Ankǝnti a dlilli lǝbi.
15.17: Gaki tǝ mbalǝnyi nǝ sa' i, sǝ ngau Lya ɗa, hal ne' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u nǝɗǝ mbe' shin i u, Lya usu, mulnǝ pǝl usi u.’
15.18: Lǝɓa ki Lya ki maniɗa mati tun teɗi.
15.19: “Gaki nǝgu, yenti ini, ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u, a mbunwai tǝn zisi bal ulǝngawai mi'patl te'ma' Lya i.
15.20: Age' shuki nǝgu tǝn laccisi an dlimisi bǝs ɗam ulki ɗami ki lya ki mi'pǝtlgontwai, nǝ pǝtl kontwai, nǝ ɗab tlu'unǝ bǝ apocwai u, nǝ ɗab hwula.
15.21: Gaki shilǝn ki zhil ki Musa a dlimǝn dli mus ge'gatli tun teɗi, ɗǝ dlǝp lashti ge' lu dopga ki Yahudawa hwu gas cin shutu kǝnǝ.” Shin kǝn ki mi'dlitl shilǝn
15.22: I milshinkǝn, nǝ kolsi nǝ mus mi' Ikilisiya mus is kǝndǝ sǝppekǝl gen age' si as shinsi tya Antakiya nǝ Bulus isǝ Balnabas. Is pekkǝl Yahuza (gunǝɗǝ mbettiki Balsaba u) nǝ Sila, si mi'kinani ge' mi'bǝtl Yesu kal.
15.23: Is bǝlsi shinkǝn ki lwatbati mul ussu, Ma' yelsini wakǝn milshinkǝn nǝ kolsi, mil bǝtl Yesu kal, ma' yelsǝni inǝn ginǝ bǝ Yahudawawai u ki Antakiya, nǝ Suliya nǝ Kilikiya: shinniti.
15.24: Mǝ kumi gen pekki ɗǝ ge'mi bǝ nǝ ndǝtinǝnwai, si tlǝlinkin kin mbadli, ulnǝs dlimi u a ɗǝ hwoti kini.
15.25: In ndǝgi musinǝn tǝn pekkǝl gen inǝn an shinsi tya ma'kini nǝ yelǝnsi inǝn ki Balnabas nǝ Bulus,
15.26: mbalǝn ginǝ bǝlgawasǝn gaki shinkǝ Yesu Almasihu u.
15.27: Gaki nǝgu, mashin Yahuza nǝ Silas sǝ' dlimikin ulnǝn laci u nǝ biwasǝn.
15.28: Gaki a mbuni Yal ki mbatl ki Lya i nǝ mi, bǝn zikin ulǝn mul diɓǝtl aga tǝ ngǝtl ginǝ ɗǝ lyapdli u wai.
15.29: Bǝ ɗamǝn ulnǝs poci lya ki mi'pǝtlgontwai, nǝ ɗap tlu nǝ hwula giɓi, nǝ ɗap tlu u nǝs modǝli' yalu nǝ pǝttya ne' mbalǝn. Kǝn dǝmti lau ǝn ka zakǝn pǝtl undi gi u. Se agason.
15.30: Sine nǝs pallisi bi u, is su swa Antakiya, alǝbi is dom mi' Ikilisiya is bǝlsi lwabbati.
15.31: Nǝ mbalǝn dlǝm lashti u is kum hwol tu' nǝ shikǝn ki ndǝlli' si mbatlu.
15.32: Yahuza nǝ Silas, si ma gawasǝn mi'nje'shinkǝn kǝni, is dlǝm shilǝn ki ndǝlli' si mbadli iye.
15.33: Kal ki lǝp muttwasǝn tyaka, i mi'bǝtl Yesu kal pallisi bi nǝ hwoltugi, is paltwa ma'ginǝ shinsi suɗi.
15.35: Amma Bulus nǝ Balnabas is dlil a Antakiya, alǝbi si ne' gen diɓǝli asi kulci'si shilǝn ki Lya. Bulus bwassi isǝ Balnabas
15.36: Kal ki lǝpmutti i Bulus ul Balnabas usu, “Tǝn paltyai ma' mi'bǝtl Yesu kal ki ge'gatlu nǝ mus nǝn dlǝm shilǝn ki Lya ɗa u an ya kan unǝ si ɗa u.”
15.37: Balnabas ɗǝ lyamti sǝ' zǝga nǝ Yahaya, gunǝ ɗǝ mbetti ki Malkus, ne'si.
15.38: Amma Bulus yeni a mbuni sǝ' zǝga ne'twai, gaki ta za'si a Bampiliya i, ta ɓeukina ne'si ɗǝ kyautǝni wai.
15.39: I lǝshi manti tegge' dlomwasǝn, Hal is bwassi. I Balnabas kan Malkus is te'ge' kundǝlǝn ki mal is lǝ tya Kublus.
15.40: Amma i Bulus wol silas is zǝga, mi'bǝtl Yesu kal is shilǝn nǝ Lya gawasi tǝ alheli ki Lya bǝli nǝti.
15.41: Is du tya ge' atl ki Suliya nǝ ki Kilikiya, ti ndǝlli' Ikilisiya i mbadli.

16.1: Bulus mbǝ a Dalba nǝ a Listila. Mul kushti wonɗa mul shin Timothy, dyawasi mul Yehudiya ni, ti mul bǝtl Yesu kal kǝnǝ amma bwasi mul Helinawa ni.
16.2: Mi' bǝtl Yesu kal ki Listila nǝ ki Ikoniya si dlǝb zo' shilǝn tǝnti.
16.3: Bulus ɗǝ lyamti sǝ' zǝga siti, is zǝga siti i' sǝlti ɗa gaki Yahudawa yi nǝɗǝ dǝb a lǝbi u, mus simani bwasi mul Helinawani.
16.4: Nǝsi bǝtl gatl nǝ gatl tya u, is gob dlimi' mbalǝn zhilu nǝ mi'kina ne' kolso ki Ikilisiya kǝndǝ a Ulshelima u, gaki tǝ mbalǝn shindǝl ga ɗa.
16.5: Nǝnǝgu i mi'bǝtl Yesu kal ndǝndǝl ge' la'ti mbadlwasǝn ɗa, hu gasi ukǝni si mbil tǝnki. Tlu'ti ki Bulus tǝn mul ki Makidoniya
16.6: Bulus nǝ mbalǝnwasi is gadǝl atl ki Pilijiya nǝ Galatiya, gaki Yal ki mbatl ki Lya a ndǝgisi i sǝ'dlǝm shilǝn ki mulban age' atl ki Asiya wai.
16.7: Nǝsbǝ tǝn bisi ki atl ki Misiya u, is lyami sǝttege' atl ki Bitiniya, amma Yal ki mbatl ki Yesu a ndǝgisiwai.
16.8: Is bǝli malgǝn Misiya, is ɓeu swa Talwasa.
16.9: A gasi i Bulus tlu ki tǝn mul Makidoniya tikǝ dlǝlli ti ngepti, “Mbǝ a Makidoniya ki ɗǝlmi.”
16.10: Kal ki tlu'ti ki Bulus, in hilya ɗǝ lǝ' Makidoniya, ma mani i Lya kǝn taki mibi tǝn dlimisi shǝlǝn wasi. Lidiya ta Ndǝnǝ Lya i
16.11: In hilya ɗǝ Taluwasa in tege' kundǝlǝn ki mal illǝ tya Samutalas, lucili illǝ Niyabolis.
16.12: Te' lǝbi in zǝga tya Pilibi, gatlu nǝ Lomawa pǝlisi gunti bal gatl kǝnǝ Macidoniya. Illǝm mutti tyaka.
16.13: Gas cin shuti in pe' abidlabi gatli in su dlǝlka, ge'lu' u nǝmi la'ti mbadli mǝn mbi' lu shilǝn nǝ Lya u. In dǝm atli in gob dlǝmi' mudlǝ i nǝ domga lǝbi i shilǝn.
16.14: Nǝm ge' mi'gaki'mi kǝm kǝli ki ge' gatl ki Tayatila mul shin Lidiya, mul utl gou lulut taka, mul bǝtl Lya kǝni. I Lya ɓul mbadlwasi i' ga'kǝm tǝn shilǝn ki Bulus.
16.15: Kal ki pǝli' kǝliyi baptisma ne' mi' libiwasu, im mbemi bi a libi ɗa'ka. I' usu “Ən ka ndǝ' ni ami mul bǝtl Lya kal kǝn u,” “Nganni ki' dǝmni libi ɗaka.” I' shelmi. Kǝndǝ Mi'kina a Ge'lu Kǝnd Mbalǝn ki Pilibi
16.16: Gason mi zǝ'ga ge'lu shilǝn nǝ Lya, in ma ne' zheli yakǝn kǝli mul yallu, ti domi' mulbanwas lǝɓa nǝ yalluwasu.
16.17: Ibbǝl Bulus kal ne' mi, a ti la'ti Yal, “Mbalǝn gi mi' ki Lya kǝni, si dlimi' kin shitu ki pe'ti.”
16.18: Ip pǝtl gu mutti diɓǝli. Il le'ci Bulus lo'si i' yalu kal i' ul mul yallu isu, “Ge' shin ki Yesu ami bǝtl ki zhil pe' ɗǝge'ti!” Alǝbi i mi'gatli za'ti.
16.19: Nǝ mulban yeni shitu mbi' ulpwasǝn a caku, is gob Bulus nǝ Sila is dǝlsi swa bi lu dobga ki utl lǝɓa taka akina ɗǝ mi' pǝtl shilǝn.
16.20: Is tǝlasi kina ɗǝ mi'pǝtl shilǝn is usu, “Mbalǝngi Yahudawani, ko animi si tlǝli'mi gatl lya.
16.21: Si kulci' mi shilǝn u nǝ bǝ ambuni tǝn bǝliwai u tǝngaki mi Lomawa ni.”
16.22: I hwu mbalǝn dopga tǝn ki Bulus isǝ Silas, i mul pǝtl shilǝni laki tǝ tusisi lu' lǝgǝl a li'si nǝ kumbǝl ki dom.
16.23: Kal ki li'tisi iye, is la'si age'lu kǝndǝ' mbalǝn, i la'mul kǝndǝ' mbalǝni tǝp ɓu'si ki zoki.
16.24: Nǝ' kan zhilu u, is sulsi swa giɓi i' ki ndǝsi tǝn ancin ki ngapti asǝn.
16.25: Age' dlom gasi Bulus nǝ silas si shilǝn nǝ Lya asi utl ul ki natl Lya, nami' ki ge'lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn ɗǝ gakisi kǝm.
16.26: Nǝgu katl, i pǝl bal ukkǝ atli sai nǝ gǝsbi ki lu kǝndǝ mbalǝni uni. Alǝbi alǝbi i dlabi ki lu kǝndǝ mbalǝni ɓuli, i mus zhim dom ki kǝndǝ mi'ki kǝndǝyi ɓaɓatli.
16.27: Nǝ mul kǝndǝ' mbalǝni hilya u, nǝ' en dlabi ni ki ɓuli u, ittus bal pǝga tǝtl tlogawasi, gaki ti yenti mi'kǝ kǝndǝ i sa kitǝli.
16.28: I Bulus tlǝl Yal i usu, “Bǝ kumi gawa'! Ciwowai musinǝn miɗa!”
16.29: I mul kǝndǝ mbalǝni ta' bi tǝ mbǝlli' cilti, is su giɓi in nda kina ɗǝ Bulus nǝ Silas nǝ nepti ki dli.
16.30: I ki ippekkǝlsi totldla i' usu, “Mi'kina, ya tapǝli ta mbi pe'ti ɗa u?”
16.31: Is ndǝgi, “La'mbatl nǝ Yesu, kǝn mbi' pe'ti ki nǝ libiwagi.”
16.32: Iki is dlǝmi' shilǝn ki Lya ti mus ne' mi'libi wasi.
16.33: Age' gasu imul kǝndǝ mballǝni yemsi i' okkǝlisi usuwasǝn taka; Alǝbi ti mus ne' libiwasi i pǝlisi baptisma.
16.34: Im mbǝlsi libi ɗakka im mbǝllisi ulki ɗami; in njǝkǝn nǝ hwol mbadli gaki ta la'mbatl nǝ Lya i mus nǝ mi' libiwasi.
16.35: Nǝlu cilu, i mi' pǝtl shilǝni shin mil shinkǝn ki guu, summa mul kǝndǝ mbalǝni nǝ zhil: “Tǝ za' mbalǝn i.”
16.36: I mul kǝndǝ' mbalǝni ul Bulus su, “Mi'pǝtl shilǝn a bil zhili ki tǝ zakkini ki zǝnga. Nǝ guni kǝn ma'zǝgga. Zǝnga nǝ hwol tugi.”
16.37: Amma i Bulus ul mi'kina i su: “Age' mbalǝn kǝn sǝ li'mi bǝma pǝlisi ulǝnwai, mus nǝ mima Lomawa u, is la'mi ge'lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn. Nǝgun si lyap pe'kǝtl mi shota? Hwe sǝm mbǝ nǝgawasǝn sǝppekkǝlmi.
16.38: I mi' kǝndǝ dlom mi dlimi mi'pǝtl shilǝni, nǝs kumi Bulus nǝ Silas mi' Lomawa u, is kum ɓanti.
16.39: Is mbǝ ɗǝ ngep pashti ma'si, is pekǝlsi ɗǝ ge'lu kǝndǝ mbalǝni, ɗǝ ngepsi sǝ'za'gatli.
16.40: Kalki pe'ti ki Bulus nǝ Silas ɗǝge' lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn u, is lǝ libi ɗǝ Lidiya, lu unǝs ma ne' yelsǝni mil bǝtl Lya mwani nǝ mudli is ndillisi mbadli. Is zǝga.

17.1: Bulus nǝ Sila is ɓeu tya Ampibolis nǝ Apolloniya, is mbǝ Tasalonika, lu u' nǝ lu dobga ki Yahudawa ɗa.
17.2: Kan unǝ kuɗa u, i Bulus te'ge' lu dobga, gas cin shuti maki ati shoti bi ne'si ge' lwabbati,
17.3: Ti dlimissi nǝ ndǝlti tǝn Almasihu nǝn tlebbǝna atl hiliya ɗǝge' mi'mǝshti. I' usu, “Yesu u nǝ ami dlǝmikini u tikǝ Almasihu.”
17.4: Genge' Yahudawa is dǝgi is maga nǝ Bulus isǝ Sila, nǝgu hwu' mi' Helinawa mi'ɓanti' Lya ne' bas mudli bǝ tengulen wai.
17.5: Amma na Yahudawa yen kum dutugi; is yem mi' ndǝtl ki ga tye' ge'lu utl lǝɓa taka, is dom mbalǝn is tlǝl dlati age' gatli. Is lǝ libi ki Yason, si ngau Bulus isǝ Silas gaki sǝppekkǝlsi to' kina ɗǝ hwu' mbalǝn.
17.6: Ama nǝbǝ sa mbisi wai u, is dǝl Yason ne' na mi'bǝdl Yesu kal te' akina ɗǝ mi'kǝndǝ' dlom kige' gatli, asi la'ti Yal si usu: “Mbalǝn i nǝ ɗǝ tlǝl gatllya i sinngi sa mbǝki i,
17.7: i Yason njesi libi ɗa'ka. Muswasǝn si nge' bǝtl zhil ki Kaisal, si usu, gu wonɗa, si mbeti ki Yesu.”
17.8: Nǝs kum gu u, i hwu' mbalǝn ne' mi' kǝndǝ' dlom kige gatli i mbadlwasǝn tlǝh.
17.9: Sa za'si pa is zǝgawai sai nǝs kan up ɓatlti ma' Yason ne' yelsǝniwasi. Mi' kina a Biliya
17.10: Nǝ gas pǝ u, i mi'bǝdl Yesu kal shin Bulus nǝ Silas Tya Biliya. Nǝs mbǝkǝci tya ka u, is tege' lu dobga ki Yahudawa.
17.11: Yahudawa ki Biliya ngǝtl ki Tasalonika nǝ zo' mbadli, gaki sa kan shilǝni nǝ lyamti, asi ya' lwabbati hu anǝmi sǝ' eni ko ulnǝ Bulus dlimi u balini.
17.12: Gaki gu, dǝɓǝli ge'si is la'mbadli, hal ne' bas mudli ki Helinawa ne' mwani Helinawa diɓǝli.
17.13: Amma nǝ Yahudawa ki Tasalonika kum Bulus ɗǝ dlib shilǝn ki Lya a Biliya u, i gen lǝ tyaka asi co'tisi asi tlǝl mbadlwasǝn.
17.14: Alǝbi alǝbi i mi'bǝtl Yesu kal shin Bulus tya dlǝlka, amma Silas nǝ Timoty is dlil a Biliya.
17.15: Gini la' Bulus shitu i is mbilti a Atina, i Bulus za'si nǝ zhil sǝppi Silas nǝ Timothy sǝ'su mbǝti. Bulus a Atina
17.16: Nǝ Bulus ɗǝ ɓuttisi a Atina u, i'kum dutugi gaki gatli a njikǝn i nǝ lya ki mi' pǝtl gonti.
17.17: I' gob shotti bi ne' Yahudawa nǝ Helinawa mi'ɓanti' Lya age' lu dobga ki Yahudawa, nǝ ge'lu dobga ki ulti nǝ ulti taka hu cin u kǝnǝ ginǝ ta mbisi lǝbi u.
17.18: I dobga ki Abikuliyawa nǝ Sitokiyawa mi' ma' lǝɓa is gob shotti bi ne'ti. Nami ge'si ngemi, “Ya mul shilǝn hutu ɗǝ lyap dlǝmti ngu?” I gen usu, “Ɗǝ yedli mul bǝtl lya ki Atlen kǝni.” Sǝ dlǝmǝn gu u gaki Bulus ɗǝ dlǝp shilǝn mul tǝmti tǝn Yesu nǝ hillya was ge' mi'mǝshti.
17.19: Is kanti is tolti tǝn ɗani ki Alasa, lu unǝ mil dlǝtl shilǝn ɗǝ dopga ɗa u alǝbi is ultisu, “Kǝn dlimimi yakǝn pyal kushti u ɗǝ mbillitiya?
17.20: Ki mbǝllimi sǝmbǝl shilǝn a kǝm ɗami, mi' lyamti tǝn man ulnǝ ɗǝ dlǝmti u.”
17.21: (Mus Atinawa ne' sǝmbǝlsi ginǝ ɗǝ dǝb Atina u, si dǝb katl ba pǝtl ulǝn, amma sai kub sǝmbǝl shilǝn, nǝ mbǝlti tǝnki.)
17.22: I Bulus hilya a dlom ki mi' dlǝtl shilǝn i' usu: “Mbalǝn ki Atina! Ayeni i hu tǝn shitu u kǝni kini mi' ngau ma' Lya kǝni.
17.23: Nǝ ami duttya u, ami ya' ulnǝ ki pǝli' mi'bǝtl Lya u, hal ya mbi bagadi ki kyetl lǝɓa nǝ lashti tǝnki ɗǝ usu: Tǝn Lya u nǝ bǝ mantwai u. To ulnǝ ki bǝtlti kalu ki manǝntwai gu a mbǝ ta dlimi kini.
17.24: “Lya unǝ pǝl dǝb lǝɓa nǝ mus ulnǝ giɓi u tikǝ Lya ki lya nǝ atli tiɗa dǝbge' lu dobga u nǝ mbalǝn kǝni nǝ toh uwai.
17.25: Nǝgu ni tiɗa ngau ɗǝtl ma' mbalǝnwai. Amma t inǝ gawas kǝn tibǝl mus mbalǝn dli nǝ shu'ti nǝ mus lǝɓa.
17.26: Tǝn mul nǝm kǝn tǝpǝl mus mbalǝn, gaki sǝ dǝb hu una adǝp lǝɓa ɗa; idlillisi dǝmtwasǝn nǝ bisi ki atlwasǝn.
17.27: Lya pǝlǝn gu u gaki sǝn ngauti ɗa agon as mbiti, ko nǝ bǝ tiɗa lolu nǝ nǝmi nǝn wai u.
17.28: ‘Gaki tu' ma'ti mǝ mbi dli ɗa, ami mallǝd ɗa nǝ ndal lǝɓa inǝn ɗa.’ Kan unǝ na mi' utl ulwakǝn dlimi' u, ‘Mima u nduwas kǝni.’
17.29: “Gaki nǝgu tun nǝ mini gǝski Lya kǝn u, mǝkǝn usu kǝnǝ zinaliya ko azulpa, ko yegǝn wai, ulnǝ mulǝn pǝli' nǝ manti wasi.
17.30: A te'ɓo Lya a zakǝn mbalǝn ge' lǝshi matiwasǝn, amma nǝguni ti bǝl mbalǝn zhil hu a una sǝppal tem ma' Lya.
17.31: Tun nǝ ta zi dǝblǝɓa cin ki zǝ' ɓatlti ki ci'gontu, tu' ma' mulnǝ' la'tu. Tǝn tlǝlti mulu ɗǝ ge' mi'mǝshti ila mbalǝn ɗǝ ndǝti.”
17.32: Nǝs kum shilǝn ki mi'tlǝllya ge' mi'mǝshtu, i nami la'ki'bi, amma i nami usu, “Mi lyab kub ki ɗaɗanu tǝn shilǝn u.”
17.34: Nami ge' mbalǝni is bǝl Bulus kal is la'mbadli. Age' si hal ni Diyonisiya, yakǝn majelisa ki Alasa, nǝ kǝlion mul shin Damalisa, ne'gen.

18.1: Kalkǝ gu, i Bulus za' Atina illǝ Kolanti.
18.2: Tyaka is ma isǝ mul Yahudu won mul shin Akila, atl zǝtti ki Pantas, ta lǝndǝb patl su' Italiya uwai nǝ kǝli wasi Biliskila, gaki Kalaudiyas bǝl zhil mus Yahudawa sǝ'za' Loma. I Bulus lǝɗǝ yas si.
18.3: Gaki kyautǝn wasǝn nǝm kǝni ki tlotlti tanti ni, iddǝmi ati kyautǝn ne'si.
18.4: Mus cin shuti ati shotti bi nesi a ge'lu dobga ki Yahudawa, ati tle ga ki Yahudawa ne' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u.
18.5: Nǝki Sila nǝ Timothy pe'te' Makidoniya, i Bulus gob mbǝtl dlǝb shilǝn ki Lya tǝnki, ati mboki Yahudawa toh Yesu tikǝ Almasihu.
18.6: Amma is nge dlǝmti ki Bulus asi byatlti, ibba bat lulutwas taka i' ulsisu, “Hwula wakǝn a ga wakǝn! Ulǝn alakǝn wai. Nǝguni an lǝti ma' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawai u.
18.7: I Bulus za'lu dobga ki Yahudawa illǝtǝn dlabi libi ki Titus Yustus, mul bǝdl Lya libi wasi nja nǝ lu dopga ki Yahudawa.
18.8: I Kilibus, mul kina ki lu dobga, ne' mus libi wasi is la' mbatl nǝ Lya; Kolantiyawa dǝɓǝli mi' kub Bulus is la' mbadlǝ i pǝlisi baptisma.
18.9: A ge' gason i Lya shilǝn nǝ Bulus ge' tlu'ti: “Bǝkum ɓantwai; gob shilǝn ki Lya, bi dǝm shotwai.
18.10: Gaki ami miki, mulǝn kǝn tile' ki dlati a' kumi' ciwowai, ami nǝ mbalǝn diɓǝli age' gatlu.”
18.11: I Bulus dǝm a Kolanti ti kulcissi shilǝn ki Lya, hwon nǝm nǝ bwasti dlom.
18.12: Amma nǝ Galiyo ɗǝ mul kina ki atl ki Akaya u, i Yahudawa ki Kolinti is maga is tlih Bulus nǝ mbatl nǝm is mbǝlti akina ɗǝ mi'pǝlt shilǝn.
18.13: “Mulgu,” si usu, “Ti tle ga ki mbalǝn sǝbbǝl Lya tǝn shitu u nǝ bǝ zhil kǝn wai u.”
18.14: Nǝ Bulus ɗǝ lyap shilǝn u, i Galiyo ulsisu, “Kini Yahudawa ki shilǝn tǝn lati asǝn giɓi u, tǝ kapbi pǝldli ma u, da an gaki' kin kǝm.
18.15: Amma tun nǝ shoti bi katl ki lǝntu, nǝ shin nǝ zhil lwakǝn u likǝnin nǝ gawakǝn. Akǝn shilǝnti tǝn undǝ giwai.”
18.16: Iki i' katsi taka ɗǝ bidla pǝtl shilǝn.
18.17: I mbalǝn ki lǝbi is gop Sastanisu mul kina ki lu dobga is li'ti a kina ɗǝ lu pǝtl shilǝn; amma Galiyo ta pǝl ulǝn tǝn kiwai. I Bulus pal tya Antakiya ki Suliya
18.18: I Bulus lǝm mutti a Kolinti. Is za' yelsǝni mudli nǝ mwanǝ it tege' kundǝlǝn ki mal illǝ Siliya, nǝ Biliskila nǝ Akila. Kapin tǝzzaga, i' utl ga taka a Kakiliya gaki dlǝtlti u nǝ' pǝli u.
18.19: Is mbǝkǝci Apisa, alǝbi Bulus za' Biliskila nǝ Akila. Tinǝ gawasi it te'ge' lu dobga ti shotti bi ne' Yahudawa.
18.20: Nǝs ngemti tǝl lǝm dǝp ne' si u, in nge.
18.21: Amma nǝ' pal bi ne' si u, i' usu, “Anpalti teɗi in Lya a ndǝgu.” Iki is za' Apisa i' tege' kundǝlǝn ki mal.
18.22: Nǝm mbǝkǝci a Kaisaliya u, illǝ Ulshelima it shin ni Ikilisiya iki illǝ Antakiya.
18.23: Kalki lǝb muttwas tya Antakiya, i Bulus hiliya ɗǝlǝbi i' gob lǝt tya ge' lu nǝ lu ge' atl ki Galatiya nǝ Palijiya, ati ndǝlli' mi' bǝtl Yesu kal mbadli.
18.24: Iki i mul Yahudiya won mul shin Apolos, atl ki zǝtti ki Iskandaliya, immbǝ Apisa. Mul mallǝɓa ni, tǝ man shilǝn ki Lya ki lwabbati iye.
18.25: A kulci' shitu ki mal Lya yi, ti shilǝn ki Lya nǝ mbotlti, ti dlib lǝɓa tin Yesu kǝnǝ kan unǝ ɗa u, amma baptisma ki Yahaya tǝ mani katl.
18.26: Iki gob dlib shilǝn ki Lya bǝ nǝ ɓultwai age' lu dobga ki yahudawa. Amma nǝki Bilkisu nǝ Akila kumtu, is mbebbi a libi ɗasi ka is mbǝl dlimitti shitu ki mal Lya ɗa iye.
18.27: Nǝ Apolos lyam ɗakǝshti tya Akaya u, i yalsǝni ɗǝlti is laci mi'bǝtl Yesu kal sǝn njeti in ta mbǝ u, Mbǝkǝshtwasi ma ginǝ lambatl nǝ Yesu tu tǝn zo' lǝɓa ki mulban i dǝm nǝ dǝlti iye tǝnsi.
18.28: Gaki ta la' Yahudawa nǝ shotti bi mul ndǝlti iye ge' mbalǝn i, ti dlimissi tu' ge' lwabbati Yesu tikǝ Almasihu.

19.1: Apolos a Kolanti, i Bulus gandǝli ge'atli immbǝkǝci Apisa. Alǝbi immbi mil kushti yen.
19.2: I' ul sisu, “Nǝ' lakǝn mbadlu ka mbi Yal ki mbatl ki Lya wa?” Is ndǝgi, “Is ultisu, ma kum mbǝkǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya wai.”
19.3: I Bulus ngemi, “To unndǝ baptisma ukǝn ki mbini?” Baptisma ki Yahaya ni is usu.
19.4: I Bulus usu, “Baptisma ki Yahaya ɓo baptisma ki za'ti bezǝn lǝɓa ti pǝlti. Ti dlǝmi' mbalǝn sǝlla' mbatl nǝ mul mbǝ ge' kalwasi, tiki Yesu.”
19.5: Nǝs kumi nǝ gu u, i pǝlisi baptisma ge' shin ki mulban Yesu.
19.6: Nǝ Bulus zisi toh u, i Yal ki mbatl ki Lya mbisi, is gob shilǝn nǝ biyen, asi dlǝb shilǝn tǝn lǝɓa ki Lya.
19.7: Si mus mbalǝn kutl nǝ lop kǝn katl.
19.8: I Bulus tegge lu dobga ki Yahudawa ti' dlǝb shilǝn ki Lya bǝnǝ ɓantwai lii maki, ati shotti bi ne' si ati patlsi tettǝn shitu guk ki Lya.
19.9: Amma i nami pǝl ndǝtl ki ga is nge la'ti mbadli, si byatl shitu i akina ɗǝ mbalǝn. I Bulus za'si. I' emmi' bǝtl Yesu kal ati shilǝn ne' si hu cin ukǝni age' lu kushti ki lashti a Tilanas.
19.10: Hwon lob aɗǝ pǝtl gu, hal i mus Yahudawa ne' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u, ginǝ ɗǝ dǝb ge' atl ki Asiya u, is kum shilǝn ki Lya.
19.11: Tu' ma' Bulus, i Lya pǝl gagashin gunǝ bǝ a ki ɗǝ pǝtl dliwai u
19.12: Hal hankicin ko lulutwasi in sa tile mi' gontu, as ndoki a du mi' gatli za'si.
19.13: Na Yahudawa yen ginǝ ɗǝ duti ɗǝ katti du mi' gatli is lyap pǝtl shilǝn nǝ shin ki Yesu tǝn mi' bǝna nǝ du mi' gatli. Si ussu, “Ge'shin ki Yesu unǝ Bulus ɗǝ dlib shilǝn wasu, ami bǝtl kin zhil ki pe' ni.”
19.14: Mil nin ngi ki Siba, bal lǝɓa ki Yahudawa, siɗǝ pǝtl gu.
19.15: Gason i du mi'gatli ulsisu, “Aman Yesu, a man Bulus, amma kini ki wokǝni?”
19.16: I mul du mi' gatli pe' lya inndesi ga inngǝtl si nǝ ndǝlti mus. Ippǝlisi li'ton hal is pe'ɗǝ libini nǝ kitǝl bǝ nǝ lulutwai nǝ hwula adli.
19.17: Nǝgu, man dli ge' Yahudawa u, ne' Helinawa mi' dǝp Apisa, i kummwasǝn ɓutl gobsi, i shin ki Yesu mbi nalti.
19.18: Diɓǝli ge' mi' la'ti mbadli is mbǝ bǝ ki hwuniwai a si dlǝb ulnǝs pǝli u.
19.19: Mbalǝn diɓǝli mi' pǝtl gonti is mbil ulpǝtl gontwasǝn ge' lu kǝnǝmi i kwetldli a kina ɗǝ mbalǝn. Nǝs cimbǝl natl ki lwabbatu is en nǝn pǝt up ki azulpa zangu kutl lǝbi nantam.
19.20: Tu' nǝgu i shilǝn ki Lya mbǝl tǝnki nǝ ndilti.
19.21: Kalki ndakkǝ mus usi, i Bulus kǝndi ge' mbadlwasi tǝs su' Ulshelima, abbǝli tu' Makidoniya nǝ a Akaya. I' usu, kal ki alǝ tya ka, nǝ ngessi kǝn ta suti Loma.”
19.22: I' shin lop mi' ɗǝtlti, Timothy nǝ Alastas, swa Makidoniya, tine inna' lǝmdǝp ge' atl ki Asiya.
19.23: Age' cin u ndǝl dlakǝn pǝl dli a tǝn shitu ki bǝtl Yesu.
19.24: Mul guptishugupon ɗa ti gubti palpalu mul shin Dimitiliyas, mul pǝtl Azulpa ki lu dobga ki Altimas, ɗǝ mbǝlli' mi' pǝtl ulti nǝ ultitaka lǝkkina alǝbi.
19.25: Immbe sibi ge' lu kǝnǝmi, ne' mi' kyautǝn ginǝ ɗǝ pǝtl undi ulti nǝ ulti taka u, i' usu: “Kini yelǝnsi, ini ki manini ma mbi lǝkkinaki zoki i tǝn ulti nǝ ultita gu i.
19.26: Ki yenti a ki kumti kan unǝ mi' bǝtl Bulus kal ɗǝ tle ga ki mbalǝn aki a Apisa, nǝ mus Atlki Asiya. Ti usu lya unǝ pǝldli nǝ toh u lya kǝn wai.
19.27: I ngu kuma bǝna ɗa kina kǝni, bǝ ulti nǝ ultitaka u ti hwol zo'shin wai, amma hal nǝ bal libi ki lya ki Altimas nǝn dǝmti kǝnǝ baliwai; ginǝ ɗǝ bǝtl lya a Asiya nǝ tǝn dib lǝɓa u, nǝn bwastiti nǝ naltwasi.”
19.28: Nǝs kum gu u, i mbatl lewisi is tlǝl yal lya: “Natl tǝn Altimas ki Apisawa!”
19.29: Lǝbdǝb ten i gatli hwodǝli. Imbalǝn gob dǝtl Gayus nǝ Alistalkus, yelǝnsi dukkǝ Bulus su' Makidoniya, muswasǝn is dlewsi tya lu dopga.
19.30: Bulus lyam lǝ' kina ɗǝ hwu mbalǝn, amma imil kushtiwas haneti.
19.31: Hal ne' na bas mbalǝn ki atl ki Asiya, yelǝnsi ki Bulus, is taki' shinkǝn tǝn bǝga shelti tǝppe' dlawai.
19.32: Mbalǝn i nǝ dom ga u is hwodǝli: Nami ɗǝ tlǝl Yal ɗǝ dlǝb gwasǝn a gen ɗǝ dlǝb gwasǝn. Na mbalǝni sǝman ulnǝ lakiɗa is domga uwai.
19.33: I Yahudawa kǝge mbalǝni is jakǝn Iskanadali tya kina, is tlǝl Yal si pǝtl shilǝn tǝnti. I' uu toh tǝ dǝm shot gaki ɓulti' dlati.
19.34: Amma nǝs mani mul Yahudiya u, i mus sǝ tlǝl yel lya ki dom lop: asi usu, “Natl tǝn Altimas ki Apisawa!”
19.35: Nǝ mul kina ki Lashti lwabbat kǝge' gatli shel mbalǝn u, i' usu: “Kini Apisawa, okǝn mani ki gatl ki Apisawa ɗǝ ɓutti bal libi nǝ shishipti ki Altimas swai, nǝ yegǝn u nǝ nda sul lya uwaiya?
19.36: Tun nǝ bǝkǝn ma'shot tibi tǝn usi wai u, nǝn mbunti ki muɗǝlǝn mbadlwakǝn bǝ' pǝlǝn ulǝn nǝ kitilwai.
19.37: I ngu ka mbǝllǝn mbalǝn i ki i, si kuma sa mǝgǝl age' libi niwai bǝ sa pǝl bezǝn ulǝn alǝbi wai.
19.38: In Dimitiliyas ne' yelǝnsi ultitakawasi shilǝn nisiɗa ne' mulǝn u, lu pǝtl shilǝn kǝnngu ki ɓuli mi' dlǝtl shilǝn kǝnngi. A' tǝla dlǝmti.
19.39: Amma in ulǝn ki lyab mbǝlliti u, to a' telen kina ɗǝ mi' dlǝtl shilǝn.
19.40: Nǝguɗa mige' bǝna ki, pǝtl shilǝn ki nditl kiga ki ulnǝ nda sǝti u. Tǝn shilǝn gu mǝkǝn ma' dlib ulǝn tǝnkiwai, tun nǝ bǝ shutu was ɗawai u.”
19.41: Kal ki dlǝb gu, ippalli mbalǝn bi.

20.1: Kal ki mutti ki mbatl ki mbalǝn, i Bulus mbe milkushti was bi kal ki ndǝllissi mbadlǝ, ippallisi bi illǝ tya Makidoniya.
20.2: Iddu tya ge' lǝbǝ, ti dlǝmi' mbalǝn dǝɓǝli shilǝn ki ndǝtlki mbadlǝ, ngwaltwasi immbǝ'ci ge' atl ki Hellas,
20.3: akikǝn tǝ dǝmmi li maki. Nǝ na Yahudawa yen akǝndǝ biwasu, nǝ' ɓal nja ki tǝ' tege' kundǝlǝn ki malu tǝllǝ Suluya, i' kǝndi tǝ patl tya tu' Makidoniya.
20.4: Ti isǝ' Sopata yakǝnkǝ Palus te' Beleya, Alistalkus nǝ Sakundas mbalǝn ki Tasalonika, nǝ Gayus mul Dalbe, Timoti nǝ Tikikus nǝ Talopimas, mbalǝn ki atl ki Asiya.
20.5: Mbalǝn ginǝs zǝga kina u is ɓummi a Taluwasa.
20.6: Amma in za' Pilibi ge' kundǝlǝn ki mal kal daddaɓǝl gunǝ bǝ yisti nit ɗawai u, in mbisi a Taluwasa kalki mutti nantam. In dǝm lǝbi mutti ningi. Dopga ki patl bi a Taluwasa
20.7: Ge' cin ki nǝm ki mutti ningi in mbǝ ɗǝ ɗamti ki catl bǝledi. I Bulus dlǝmi mbalǝn shilǝn, gaki ti lyab zǝ'ga lucili, i' gob dlǝb shilǝni hal a dlom gasi.
20.8: Cilti ɗa dǝɓǝli ge' libi ki lya u nǝn domga ɗa u.
20.9: Yakǝn gidǝnsi won ti ki dǝmi tǝn dlabi ko' yetil mulshin Aptikos, i yemmbu' kanti nǝ Bulus lǝndǝp ɗǝ shilǝn u. Nǝ yemmbu' kantu, tikǝ dǝmi ge' kǝps ki lya mul lu tom maki innda su'atli i kanti hwuni.
20.10: I Bulus pe'su' atli, im muttwatǝn yakǝn giɗǝnsi isi it kucenti, i'usu. “Bǝ hwok kiniwai,” “Ti kami!”
20.11: I ki ippal twage' kǝps ki lya ni ɗaɗanu itcel biledi it ɗami. I' gob shilǝn halcitlkǝlu izza' lǝbǝ.
20.12: I mbalǝn kan yakǝn giɗinsi i tya libi kahmi, is kum hwoltugi iye. Bulus palli Kolsi ki Apisawa bi
20.13: Mine in ndakina in tege' kundǝlǝn ki mali illǝ tya Asus, ge'lu unǝ tǝn kan Bulus ɗa u. Nǝgu tǝ kǝndini tǝn tǝllǝ tyaka tǝn asǝn.
20.14: Nǝm mbimi a Asus u, inkanti ge' kundǝlǝn ki mal in mbǝ a Mitilini.
20.15: Lucili in tege' kundǝlǝn ki mal tekka in mbǝ'ci a Kiyos. Lucili ɗanu in ɗakǝci tya Samas, lucili ɗanu in mbǝkǝci a Militas.
20.16: Bulus kǝndi tǝd ɗakǝsh Apisa ge' kundǝlǝn ki mal gaki kitǝli' dlǝtl a Asiya, gaki ti dleuti tǝm mbǝkǝci Ulshelima ɗa, in nǝn pǝtu, tǝn cinkǝ pentikos.
20.17: Te' a Milita, i Bulus shinshin kǝn tya Apisa tǝn kolsi ki ge'lu dobga ki shilǝn ki Lya.
20.18: Nǝs mbǝci matu, i' ulsisu: “Ki manǝn kan u nadǝm ge' kini u, tun ga siu na mbǝ ge' atlki Asiya u.
20.19: Ami bǝtl' Lya nǝ zo' mbadli hal nǝ luu, nǝ bǝna diɓǝli na tle gaki ɗashti ki tu' ki na Yahudawa.
20.20: Ki manǝn kan u nǝ bǝ a kum ɓakkǝ dlib ulnǝ nǝn ɗǝtl kini uwai u, ya dlimikini ge' mbalǝn nǝ libi libi bǝkǝ hwuniwai.
20.21: Ami dlimi' Yahudawa ne' mi' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u sǝppal ma' Lya nǝ ngesi as dlim bezǝn lǝɓawasǝn as la'mbatl tǝn Yesu.
20.22: In ngu Yal ki mbatl ki Lya, ɗǝ tǝntǝni talǝ Ulshelima, aman ulnǝ tǝ ndani ami uwai.
20.23: Amani katl hu gatlu kǝni Yal ki mbatl ki Lya ɗǝ dlimitǝni kǝndǝti nǝ tle' bǝna ɗǝ ɓuttǝni.
20.24: Ngo' nǝnǝgu, a pal gayi ulǝnwai; Lyamti ki mbadlini iki ta pa' taltu a njikǝn ulnǝ Yesu bǝlǝn u, dlǝb zo shilǝn tǝmi ki Lya.
20.25: Nǝguni a mani muswakǝn kǝkǝn yentǝn nǝwai, kini u na bǝlkin tyai ɗǝ dlǝb shilǝn ki guk ki Lya u.
20.26: Gaki nǝgu, ami dlǝmikkin asǝti, ape' ɗǝge' alhaki ki hwula wakǝn i.
20.27: Gaki a kum ɓakkǝ dlimikkin mus ngati ki Lya wai.
20.28: Ɓutǝn gawakǝn, nǝ kuma mus hwu mbalǝn nǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya pǝli kini, dǝmni mi'zǝ' dwaɗǝn tǝnsi u, dǝmni mi' byatl mi'bǝtl Yesu kal ginǝ' ulsi nǝ hwulawasu.
20.29: Amani kal ki zǝgga ini, mi'ɗashti ki tugen nǝn teti ge' kini, sǝkǝn kub ciggokǝ hwu mbalan i wai.
20.30: Age' kini ma mbalǝn yen nǝn tlǝttoɗi, as gǝl bali gaki sǝddǝli gawasǝn mi'bǝtlsi kal ɗa.
