20.31: Gaki nǝgu dlilni gal! Dambilini, hwon maki ngu aza' pikkin shilǝn wai gasi nǝ dloncin, hal nǝ lu.
20.32: Nǝguni ami za'tikin toh ɗǝ Lya, nǝ zo shilǝn wasi, i likǝ' kini abbǝlkin gado ne' mus mi'zo' mbadli.
20.33: Azi dwaɗǝn tǝn upki ko lulut ki mulǝnwai.
20.34: Kini nǝgawakǝn ki manini toh i kǝn ɗǝ bǝltǝn ulnǝ ami lyamti u, nǝ ki mi'ginǝ ami ne'si u.
20.35: Age' mus ulna pǝli u, ami nune' kini, tu'tǝn ɓotlti kyautǝn hwel kǝn tǝ ɗǝlǝn mi'lǝshi ndǝtl ɗa, aki dambǝtl shilǝn ki Yesu nǝ usu: “Bǝlti ngǝtl kanti nǝ albalka.’ ”
20.36: Nǝ Bulus ngwatl shilǝn wasu, in ngus atl mus ne'si is shilǝn nǝ Lya.
20.37: I muswasǝn is go' kulu, is kucen Bulus asi swattiti.
20.38: Ulnǝ mbǝllisi du mbadlu iki shilǝn wasu nǝ' usu sǝkǝn yetti nuwai u. Iki is la'ti shitu tyama' kundǝlǝn ki mal.

21.1: Kal ki bwastimi ne'si, inte ge' kundǝlǝn inta'mi swa Kos, lucili insu Lodas nǝ Patala.
21.2: Nǝm mbi kundǝlǝn mul ɗakǝshti tya ge' atli ki Pinikiya u, inte giɓi inziga.
21.3: Nǝn yen Saipulus te'ka u inpalti tǝn tona, in ɓew kina ɗǝlǝ' ge atl ki Suliya, in shiti a Taya, alǝbi tǝ kundǝlǝn ki mali shi' kayawasi.
21.4: Nǝn mbi lu u nǝ milkushti ɗa u in dǝm ne'si mutti ningi. Tǝn ndǝtl ki Yal ki mbatl is pi Bulus bǝllǝ Ulshelima wai.
21.5: Amma nǝ cin tlǝti nǝn pǝ u, in hilya in ɓew kina ɗǝ lǝti. Muswasǝn, mudli nǝ mil, is la'mi shitu tya kal gatli, iki ingus a tǝn bǝgasi in shilǝn nǝ Lya.
21.6: Kal ki palli' yelsǝni bi inǝn, inte ge' kundǝlǝn, sine ispal tya libi.
21.7: In gop lǝti nǝn a Taya u in mbǝci Talamayas, inshinni yelsǝni, in mun nǝm ma'si.
21.8: Lucili in hilya inmbǝ Kaisaliya, in tye libi ki Pilibus mul dlǝp shilǝn ki Lya, gunǝ nǝmkǝni ge' ningi i' u.
21.9: Tinǝ mil mudli upsi, ginǝ bǝ apǝl ki nditi wai u ginǝ ɗǝ dlǝb lǝɓa ki Lya.
21.10: Kal ki mutti ten alǝbi, i mul njeshinkǝn ki Lya won mbǝ, shinwasi Agabus immbǝ te' atl Yahudiya.
21.11: Nǝmmbǝ ma'mi u, i' kan ul kǝndǝ dlom ki Bulus i' kǝndǝ toh nǝ asǝnwasi, i' usu “Ulnǝ Yal ki mbatl ki Lya dlǝmi u ngu, ‘Nǝgu Yahudawa ki Ulshelima sǝn kǝndǝ mul ul kǝndǝ dlom u a bǝtlti atoh ɗǝ ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u.’ ”
21.12: Nǝn kumi nǝgu u, mi ne' mbalǝn i nǝ lǝbi u in bǝl Bulus bi bǝ su Ulshelima wai.
21.13: I Bulus usu, I' usu “Yakǝn ki kulu aki calitǝn mbatl ɗa? A miɓo galkǝn aminɗa, amiɗa ɓultti' kǝndǝ twai sǝ lyami as tlo a Ulshelima tǝn shin ki mulban Yesu.”
21.14: Nǝ bǝta kum sheltwai u, indǝm shot, in usu “Tǝ Lya pǝl ulnǝ mbunitu.”
21.15: Kal ki gu, in kan shitu ki su' Ulshelima.
21.16: Na milkushti yen te' Kaisaliya is la'mi shitu is mbǝlmi libi ki mulshin Manason, lu unǝtǝn dlǝlɗa u. Mul ki Saipulus mul bǝl Lya hwon di ɓǝli. Bǝ'citi ki Bulu a Ulshelima
21.17: Nǝm mbǝ Ulshelima u, Yelsǝni inǝn njemi nǝ hwol tugi.
21.18: Nǝ cilt kǝlu i Bulus ziga ne'mi swa ma' Yakubu, kolsi Ki Ikilisiya mus asi ɗa.
21.19: Nǝ Bulus shinnissi u, itl' dlǝmisi shilǝn bi nǝ bi kǝ ulnǝ Lya pǝllitu age' mi'ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u atǝn kyautǝn wasi.
21.20: Nǝs kumi nǝgu u, is nalt Lya. Is ul Bulus su: “Yani, zangu nǝmi Yelsǝni, Yahudawa bǝl mbadlwasǝn, ma' Lya singu mi'ndǝtl kǝ'mbatl kǝni ge' bǝtl zhil ki Musa.
21.21: Mbalǝn tle kup su usu tǝnki ɗǝ kulci' mus Yahudwa ginǝ bǝɗa ge' mbalan ki Musa wai u sǝ'dlat zhil ki Musa taka, ki dlǝmmisi bǝst sǝl millwasǝn ko as bǝl Lǝɓa ki kolsi inǝn wai.
21.22: Yakǝn tǝm pǝlini ngǝ? Katlti ɗawai sǝn kub mbǝtwa gi.
21.23: Gaki nǝgu pǝl ulnǝ tǝn piku. Mbalǝn upsi ni miɗa ginǝ kan dlǝlliti u.
21.24: Kan mbalǝn i, a bǝlǝn zhil ki kushti ki zo'ki mus, a' ɓatl mus ulpi sǝmbi sǝ' utl gaɗa. Tu' tǝn shitu gu, mus nǝn ma'dli ulnǝs dlǝmisi tǝnku, bali ɗa giɓiwai, amma ki gawagi ki bǝtl zhil ki Musa.
21.25: Tǝn ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u mi'bǝtl Yesu kal, mashin lwabbat swai i tǝngaki bǝs ɗam ulki ɗami ki lya ki mi' pǝtl gontwai, bǝs pǝl kontwai bǝs ɗam tlu u nǝs ceti' yalu wai nǝ ɗap tlu nǝ hwula wai
21.26: Nǝlu cilu i Bulus kan mbalǝni asa likǝn gawasǝn i. I ki i' tege' libi ki Lya tǝ' dlǝmisi cin ngatlti ki likǝ' gawasǝn, nǝ bǝtl Lya lǝɓa ki ulkǝ okǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa ki ko wonngi wasǝn. A gop Bulus si
21.27: Nǝ mutti ningi ɓal nja nǝpa'tu, gen ge' Yahudawa te'ge atl ki Asiya is yen Bulus ge' libi ki Lya. Is cokǝl hwu mbalǝn is gobti,
21.28: asi dulle asi ussu Yelsǝni inǝn Isla'ilawa, ɗǝlǝn mi! Mulgu ti ɗǝ kushti mbalǝn sǝ mbǝl mbalǝn inǝn nǝ zhilin nǝn nǝ lu u ɗaɗanu, immbǝl Helenawa yen i kon nǝ lu bǝlt Lya.”
21.29: (Gaki teɗi sa yen Bulus isǝ Tulopimus, mul Apisa, age' gatli, is eni kǝnǝ Bulus mbǝllǝnti ge' libi ki Lya.)
21.30: Mus gatli is hwodǝli mbalǝn is tlǝlte' nǝ kitǝl is gob Bulus is dǝlti twa dla ɗǝ ge' libi ki Lya, is dleusi ɗǝ le'dlabiyi.
21.31: Si ge' ngau shitu ki tlotti gu' u, i shilǝn lǝkina ɗǝ bali ki mi' ki ndǝ dlom ki Loman kise mus gatl ki Ulshelima ɗǝ dlati.
21.32: Alǝbi i' em mi'kǝ ndǝ'dlom ki Loma nǝ na ki bazi ki mi'kǝ ndǝ'dlom is tlǝ swa ge' hwu mbalǝn. Nǝ mbalǝni yen ki bali ki mi'kǝ ndǝ dlom nǝ mi'kǝ ndǝ' dlomwasu, is za' liti Bulus.
21.33: I bal mulkina ki ndǝ dlomi hilya i' gobti, i' laki sǝ'kǝndǝti nǝ zhim dom lob. Iki in gyem mi tikǝ on ngi ya tǝ pǝli.
21.34: Nami ge' hwu mbalǝn ni si la'ti yali gi ɗǝ dlǝp shilǝnwasi gen ɗǝ dlǝb gwasǝn. Gaki o'tilu diɓǝli hal bali i' ambi gǝs ki bal shilǝni wai, il laki sǝ'tǝla Bulus ge'lu dǝb kǝmi' kǝndǝ'dlom.
21.35: Nǝ Bulus mbǝ tǝn lu dǝkǝsti u, sai nǝ mi'kǝndǝ'dlom kanti ki kami gaki tlǝl mi'gatl ki mbalǝn.
21.36: Dopga ki mbalǝn i nǝ bǝlsi teɗu asi la'ti yali asi ussu, “Mi tloti!” Bulus Shilǝn nǝ mbalǝn
21.37: Nǝ ɓal ki mi'kǝndǝ'dlom tǝla Bulus a ge'lu dǝb ki mi'kǝndǝ dlomu, i' ul mulkina ki mi'kǝndǝ'dlomi su, “Kǝn ndǝti ta shilǝn mika?” “Ki manǝn shilǝn “Nǝbi ki Hellenanci ɓo?”
21.38: “Kikǝ’ mul masal mulu wai wa? Gunǝ hwon ki te'kal nǝ ɓye u, i' tlǝlli mbalǝn ndǝlt Kǝga, hal it dǝl mbalǝn za'ngu upsi mi'tlwam mbalǝn a ge' delgǝn u”
21.39: I Bulus ndǝgi, Ami mul Yahudiya ni, te' Talsus age' atl Ki Kilikiya, ami Yakan gatl kǝni gatlu nǝ si kumti nǝ nali u. Mmi bǝtl ki bi zakǝni tapi Mbalǝn i shilǝn.”
21.40: Nǝmul kina ki mi'kǝndǝ dlom bǝlti shilǝn u, i Bulus dlǝltǝn gǝbsi i' ta'ki hwu' mbalǝn toh lya is dǝm shot, muswasǝn ishinnisi nǝ bikǝ Alamaya.

22.1: “Yelsǝni nemi' zǝ'mini, kumǝn nǝ ni ta dlǝmikin ulnǝ nda u, gaki ta pikini a pǝl bezǝn ulǝn wai.”
22.2: Nǝs kummi tashin nisi nǝ biki Alamaya u, is dǝmciw. I Bulus usu
22.3: “Ami mul Yahudiyani, zǝkkǝ Talsus ki Kilikiya, age' gatlu anali. Ami mul kushtini amalgǝn ɗǝ Gamaliel gunǝ kulci zhil ki mi'zǝ'mi'zǝm mini u. Ami nǝ ɓotlti ki bǝlt Lya kǝnǝ kan unǝ muswakǝn ki pǝltin sǝ'ti u.
22.4: Hal a la ki mbalǝn ɓutl ki bǝtl shitu u i, ami gobti mwani nǝ mudli a kǝndǝsi a atlosi.
22.5: Bal lǝɓa nǝ mus mi' dlǝtl shilǝnwasi nǝn ziti nǝ dwaɗǝn. Ama'si akan shinkǝn ki elsǝni ini Yahudawa yasuli swa Dimascus, Ya ɓeu ɗǝ gopti mbalǝn ta sulsi ge' lu kǝnndǝ' mbalǝn ki Ulshelima as pǝlisi bezǝn'lǝɓa. Bulus dlǝm u ndi patltem ma' Lya wasi
22.6: “Amige' lǝti a bal dloncin na ɓal nja nǝ Dimashku u, bǝnǝ mantiwai i bal ciltton pe'sul lya i ga ndǝlǝni.
22.7: Ya nda atli yakum ya lon ɗǝ ultǝnsu, Shawulu! Shawulu! Yaki pǝlitǝn bezǝn lǝɓaɗa?’
22.8: “Yandǝgi ‘Ki wokǝni, mul ban?’ I' ulǝnsu. ‘Amiki Yesu mul Nazaleh, mulnǝ ki pǝllitti ngashtu.’
22.9: To, ginǝ ne' kǝn i yen ciltisi, amma sakum yal ki mul shilǝn nǝ amiwai.
22.10: Ya usu ‘To, ya tapǝli, mulban?’ I mul ban ulǝnsu “ ‘hilya, ki'lǝ Dimascus, tyaka sǝ' dlǝmi' ulnǝ' ki' pǝli u.’
22.11: Na dǝm dwa u gaki ciltu. Mbalǝn i nǝ' ne' kǝn u is goppi toh is sullǝn swa Damascus,
22.12: “Mulǝn ɗa mulshin Hananiyi immbǝ makǝni. Ti mul bǝtl zhil ki musa mulnǝ mus Yahudawa ki dǝmi alǝbi ɗǝ ndwatiti u.
22.13: Nǝ' dlǝl malgǝn ɗa kǝn u, i' ulǝnsu, Yelse ini Shawulu, tǝ Yelluwa' pali!’ A lǝbi a lǝbi idwaɗǝn i ɓuli Ya yenti.
22.14: I' usu, ‘Lya ki kolsi inǝn a olki gaki ki man ulnǝ ge' mbadlwasu, Kin ye' mul zoki mbatlu, kǝn kub shilǝn abiwasi.
22.15: Kǝn dǝp mul pǝtl yenti ki dwaɗǝn wasi ma' mus mbalǝn tǝn ulnǝ' enini nǝ ulnǝ kumini u.
22.16: To nǝgun u yaki ɓutti? Hilya, tǝ pǝli' Baptisma a o'kǝli' Bezǝn lǝɓawa' taka, tu' ma' mbe' shinwasi.’
22.17: “Na patl te' Ulshelima a ami shilǝn nǝ Lya age' libi ki Lya, i tlu'ti mbini.
22.18: Ya yen mulban ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ ami. I' usu, dlewki! Ki'za' Ulshelima, gaki mbalǝn aki sǝkǝn ndǝ'ti nǝ pǝtl yenti ki dwaɗǝn u nǝ ki dlǝmti tǝn kǝn uwai.’
22.19: “ ‘Amine ya usu, mulban, ‘Sima gawasǝn sǝmani hu lu dobga ukǝni a kǝndǝ mbalǝn ginǝ la'mbatl tǝnku ya li'li'si.
22.20: Gasi unǝs bǝna hwula ki Istipanusu, mul pǝtl enti ki dwaɗinwagu, a ami lǝbi ki dlǝli, ami bǝlt kal ki ulnǝs pǝli u, amine ya ɓu' lulu' kǝmi' tlotti.’
22.21: “I mulban ulǝnsu, ‘Hilya; ta shinki tya lolu ma' ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u.’ ”
22.22: I mbalǝn dobga ɗǝ ga'ti kǝm tǝn shilǝn ki Bulus hal immbǝ tǝn shilǝn u ɗa, is tlǝl yal is usu “Tloti! Tǝ bwas undi mulu nǝ dǝb lǝɓa a mbuni tǝt dǝm tǝn lǝɓa wai!”
22.23: Asi matlti asi pe'ti lya nǝ dla'ti lulutwasǝn asi tlǝl kushka lya. Bulus a Loma
22.24: Imul kina wasǝn bǝl zhil ki sutl Bulus ge'lu dǝb ki mi'kǝndǝ' dlom. A gyemti nǝ dlamtǝl, gaki tǝn man shitu u nǝ laki i mbalǝn ɗǝ lakitti Yal ɗa nǝgu u.
22.25: Amma nǝ kǝndǝtti nǝ zhimu, i Bulus ul balmul kǝndǝ dlomu nǝ nja nǝti usu “A mbunni ki pǝli mul alt ki Loma dlamtǝlla, bǝka mbiti nǝ lati asǝn gimbi waiya?”
22.26: Nǝ bal mul kǝndǝ dlom ki Loma kumi nǝgu u, illǝmak mul bǝtl zhil ki kǝndǝ dlom i' ultisu, “Yaki lyab pǝltini? Mulu mul Loma ni.”
22.27: Imul bǝtl zhil ki kǝndǝ dlomi' ul Bulus su, “Dlǝmini ki mul Loma kǝma?” I' usu, “E.’’
22.28: Imul bǝtl zhil ki kǝndǝ dlom, i' usu, amiciɓo sai na ɓatl bal ulpi ya mbi dǝb yakǝn atlɗa.” I Bulus usu, amiɓo nǝ nali sǝ zǝnni.”
22.29: Gaki nǝgu, ginǝ ɗǝ lyab gyebti u, is mbǝ gi nǝ kali alǝbi alǝbi. Mul bǝtl zhil ki kǝndǝ dlomi nǝm mani, ti gawasi ta kǝndǝ Bulus mul Loma u, i bult gopti, in ngu talǝge ta kǝndǝti. Bulus akina dǝ mi'dlǝl Shilǝn
22.30: Nǝ lucilu mul bǝtl zhil ki kǝndǝ dlomi illyami tǝm man ulnǝ Yahudawa tǝla shilǝn tǝn Bulus ɗa u, ittǝngǝlti, idlǝllisi zhil nǝ bas lǝɓasi nǝ mik attli sǝddomga, apa immbǝl Bulus idl dlǝlti a kina wasǝn.

23.1: I Bulus uti mi'dlǝl shilǝn ki atl dwaɗǝn i' usu, “Yelsǝni ini, bǝtl Lya kǝn amiɗa nǝ mbatl ki zoki hal i mbǝl cin ki sǝti ɗa.”
23.2: Ananiya bal lǝɓa ki Lya ul ginǝ ki dlǝli nja ma' Bulus su sǝ'op biwasi.
23.3: I Bulus ultisu, “Ki mul ngashtu, “Lya nǝn litiki, ase, ki dǝmni ki u ɓo zitǝn zhil kǝn ki ɗaya, ki ngu ɗǝ usu tǝ duni, gu shot nǝ zhil ki Musa
23.4: Ginǝ ki dlǝli nja nǝ Bulus su is usu, “Bal lǝɓa ki Lya kǝn ki byel twa?”
23.5: I Bulus ulsisu, “Yelse ini, amani ti bal lǝɓa ki Lya kǝn wai, Ki laciɗa: ‘Bǝ'dlǝm bezen lǝɓa tǝn mul kina ki mbalǝn wai.’ ”
23.6: Nǝ Bulus yeni, nami Sadukiyawa ni nǝ gen Palisiyawa u, itltlǝl yal age' lu domga i' usu “Yelsǝni ini, A mi' mul palisiyawani, yakǝn Palisiyawa. Tǝn a dlil mbadli i tǝn tlǝl lya ki mi' mǝshti i ami tleb bǝna ɗa.”
23.7: Nǝ' dlǝmi nǝgu u, i dlan nda ge' dlom ki palisiyawa nǝ sadukiyawa, i dob gani bwǝsi.
23.8: (Amma Sadukiyawa sa ndǝ nǝ hillya gǝ' ki mi'mǝshti twai, bǝ mi'shinkǝn ki Lya ɗawai, bǝ yal ki mbatl ki Lya ɗawai, amma mus palisiyawa is ndǝ' nǝ nali.)
23.9: I bal dla' hillya, gen ge' mi'lashti ki ɗalika ki palisiyawa is tlǝlyal asi shottibi. Asi ussu “Miɓo mambi mulu nǝ bezen ulǝn wai,” is ussu. “Ko yalkǝ mbatl ki Lya ko mulshinkǝn ki Lya kǝn shilǝn nǝti u pa?”
23.10: Nǝ shotti bi i ndǝndǝlu i mul kǝndǝdlom kum mɓulti ɓas kyakkyash Bulus. I' bǝlsi zhil tǝ mi' kǝndǝdlom susuɗi sǝ' kanti ɗǝ ma'si nǝ ndǝlti sǝ' tǝlati ge'lu dobga ki mi' kǝndǝdlom.
23.11: Nǝ gas pǝ u i mulban dlǝl nja Nǝ Bulus i' ultisu, “Ndǝl mbadli kan u nǝ'pǝl enti nǝ dwaɗǝn a tǝnkǝn a Ulshelima u, nǝgu ki' pǝl enti nǝ dwaɗǝn ini ɗaɗanu a Loma.” Sa Kǝndǝ i sǝ' tlo Bulus
23.12: Nǝ lucilu i Yahudawa mabi is usu nǝ ndaltannaca sǝ' kǝn ɗamti nǝ tletiwai sai nǝ sa tlo Bulus.
23.13: Ginǝ kǝndǝ shilǝn u sǝ'ngǝtl mbalǝn kǝtl lǝbi upsi.
23.14: Is lǝ ma' bas lǝɓasi ki Lya nǝ mi'kina is usu, ma dlil bal tannaca i mǝkǝn ɗamtiwai nǝ tletiwai sai nǝ ma' tlo Bulus.
23.15: Gaki nǝgu kini nǝ mi'dlǝtl shilǝn dlǝmi mul'kina ki kǝndǝdlom sǝ' mbǝlli kinti, kǝnǝ ki' mbǝlǝn ngep gǝs ki shilǝn was tǝn kini iye mi kuma ki dlǝli tǝn asǝn kǝn mi'ɗa tǝn tloti nǝ mbǝtwasi.
23.16: Nǝ yakǝn ki yelse ki Bulus kumi nǝgu u i' suge' lukǝndǝ mbalǝnisi idlǝmi Bulus.
23.17: Iki Bulus taki bal mulkina ki kǝndǝ dlom gudǝl nǝm bi i' usu, “Kan yakǝn giɗǝnsi u ki tǝlati ma' mulkina; tinǝ shilǝn u nǝ tǝtl dlǝmi tu.”
23.18: I' kanti it tǝlati ma'mulkina, i' usu, “Bulus, ki lu ki kǝndǝn mbalǝn, shinǝni takami' yakǝn giɗǝsi u teɗi tǝn gaki ulki dlǝmi ni' ɗa.”
23.19: I mulkina ki kǝndǝ dlom goppi yakan giɗǝsi i' toh teɗi, amalgǝni in gyemti, “Yaki lyamti ki' dlǝmini?”
23.20: I usu: Yahudawa sa kǝndǝ i sǝ' gyemki ki mbǝlisi Bulus ma mi'dlǝl shilǝn akyau kǝnǝ sǝ' gyemti ki zokini tǝn shilǝnwasi.
23.21: Amma bǝ ndǝgisiwai, gaki mbalan ginǝ ngǝtl kutl lǝbi upsi siɓuttiti age' dǝlgǝn. Sa dlil bal ndaltannaca i sǝkǝn ɗamtiwai nǝ tletiwai sai nǝ sa tloti ɓutti sǝɗa katl ki ndǝgisi.”
23.22: I mul ki ndǝdlomi dǝlli' kǝmu i' za' yakǝngiɗǝnsi isi is zǝga nǝ: “Bǝ' dlǝmi mullǝn shilǝn u nǝ' dlǝmi uwai.” Is pal Bulus tya Kaisaliya
23.23: I mulkina mbe bas mi' kǝndǝdlom was gudǝli lob bi i' ulsisu, “Gadlǝn mi' kǝndǝ dlom kutlt cen lob nǝ mi' kǝndǝ dlom mi'to'tǝn bǝtsi, kult lǝbi ninngi, nǝ mi' dlati nǝ zo kult cen lob sǝ'su Kaisaliya nǝ dom nǝtapsi ki gasi.
23.24: Ngayi Bulus bǝtsi tǝto' tǝnki asulǝnti ma' gobna ki Pelis.”
23.25: I mulkina ki mi' kǝndǝ dlom lash lwabati kǝnǝ nǝgu:
23.26: Te'ma' Kaldiwus Lisiyas, tu Ma'mulnalti, Gobna Pelis. Shilniti mul nalti.
23.27: Mulgu Yahudawa si lyam tloti, amma yalǝ nǝ mi' kǝndǝ dlommini yakwacati, a kumi timul dǝm ki pit a Loman kǝni.
23.28: Ami lyamti taman yakǝn laki singettiɗa, ya mbǝlti ma' mi'dlǝtl shilǝnwasǝn ɗa.
23.29: Yambi si dakǝtti tǝn shilǝn ki kushtiwasǝn, amma bezǝn lǝɓa u nǝs zitu atala ki kǝndǝti ko tlotwai.
23.30: “Nakumi sa kǝndi bezǝ' ulǝntintu, iki ya shini sǝ'talati maki. Ya ul mi' pǝtlti nǝ shilǝn ni su sǝ' dlǝm ulnǝ pǝli u akina wagi.
23.31: Tǝn gaki nǝgu imi' kǝndǝ dlom kan Bulus ne'si a gasi is talati Antipatlis.
23.32: Nǝ lucilu is za' mi'kǝndǝ dlom mi'tottǝn bǝtsi sǝ'zǝgane'ti, is paltya gelu dǝmtwasan.
23.33: Nǝ mi'kǝndǝ dlom mi'tottǝn bǝtsi mbǝci Kaisaliya u, is bǝl Gobna i lwabati is za' Bulus atoh wasi.
23.34: Nǝ gobna ya lwabatisi u, i' gyem Bulus kiɓo age'lu u kǝnkiɗa. Nǝ'kumi a Kilikiya u,
23.35: i' usu, “Anga'kiki kǝm ǝn mi' pǝtl ki nǝ shilǝn sa mbǝ u.” I gobna i bǝl zhil sǝ', dlǝl Bulus a bidla ki Hilidus.

24.1: Kal ki mutti nantam i bal lǝɓa, Ananiyas, is su Kaisaliya nǝ mi'kinayen nǝ lauya mulshin Taltulus, is tǝla shilǝn ki Bulus akina ɗǝ gobna.
24.2: Nǝ sul Bulus giɓi u, i Taltulus mbǝl shilǝn akina ɗǝ Apilikus: “Mul nalti tu'maki mbalǝn mbi dǝp kizoki mul mbunti, tu'ma' yellu loluwa' kǝn likǝn dǝb ki mbalǝn inǝn ɗa.
24.3: Ko a nǝmi, mbalǝn inǝn si godeki ko a una.
24.4: Amma gaki ɓa dǝmbǝl ki, Ami ngepki nǝ zo' mbadlwa gu ga' kimi kǝm tǝn ndo'lǝs ulnǝ tǝn dlǝmiku.
24.5: “Mǝ mbi mulu mul ngaushilǝn kǝni, mul mbǝlt dlatl kǝni adlom ki Yahudawa nǝ ko a u nǝ age' dǝb lǝɓa, kuma tikǝ mulkina ki ɗalika ki Nazalawa.
24.6: Hal ti lyap kon nǝ libi ki Lya; in gobti. Nǝ lati mbatl ki tǝn pǝli' shilǝn tǝn zhillinǝn.
24.7: Amma mul kina Lisiyas kǝm shilǝni u i' mbǝ i' kanti ɗǝ mami nǝdǝlti.
24.8: In ka cetti nǝ gawagu, kǝn ma' bali tǝn mus ulnǝ mi dlǝmti tǝntu.”
24.9: I na Yahudawa yen pǝ kal ki shilǝnisi, is ndǝgi shilǝni nǝguɗa.
24.10: Nǝ gobnayi ndǝgiti tǝ' shilǝn u, “I Bulus usu, amani hwon dimbǝlli ka tle pǝli' mbalǝn i shilǝn i. Nǝ hwol mbatl kǝn ta pal shilǝn ini.
24.11: Kimanini a ngǝl muttu kult nǝ lob nǝ patl tai ini a Ulshelima ɗǝ shilǝn nǝ Lya wai.
24.12: Mi' mbǝtl shilǝn i sa mbi ɗǝ shot bi nǝ tlilt gatl lya nǝ mbalǝn age' libi ki Lya wai, nǝ age lu dopga ki Yahudawa nǝ age' gatli.
24.13: Sǝ'kǝn ma' dlǝmi'ki ulnǝ lakiɗa is mbǝllǝn ɗa makuwai.
24.14: Amma a ndǝgi, nǝ shitu u nǝsi mbeti ki ‘Dalika u, nǝ ami bǝtl Lya ki kolsi i nǝn ɗa u, ami lati mbatl nǝ mus ulnǝ ki laci ge zhil ki Musa nǝ ge lwatbat ki mi' nje shinkǝn ki Lya u.
24.15: Ami la'ti mbatl nǝ Lya, kan u nǝ gi ɗǝ La'ti mbadlu, nǝn tlǝtl mi'mǝshti, mi'zo'mbadli nǝ mi'besǝn mbadli.
24.16: Gaki nǝgu, ko a nǝmi ami ɗǝtl mbadli gaki ɓadǝm ulkǝ dlǝmi ma' mbalǝn nǝ ma' Lya.
24.17: “Kal ki zati Ulshelima nǝ hwon ten ngulen, Ya paltya ta ɗǝtl mbalǝn inǝn, a bǝlsi ulki toh ini nǝ ulki keli' Lya.
24.18: A mi ge' pǝlti nǝgu is mbi nǝ ki peshti age' libi ki Lya. Bǝ ami ɗa ne' hwu' mbalǝn wai bǝ a tlili mbalǝn mbadlwai.
24.19: Amma Yahudawa yen ɗa tye'ge' atl ki Asiya, ginǝ a mbuni asi ki a kina ɗa'ka, si tǝlla shilǝn i ma'ki ǝn shilǝn won nisiɗa tǝnkǝn u.
24.20: Ko aza Mbalǝni sǝ' dlǝb lati asǝn giɓi u nǝs mbi nǝ nali u, gasi u nǝ a dlǝl kina ki mi'dlǝtl shilǝn u,
24.21: Atǝn shilǝn nǝmon kǝn katl na tlǝl yali a ami ki dlili akina ɗa si, ya usu ‘Gaki tlǝtl lya ki mi' mǝshti si pǝlitǝn shilǝnɗa akina wakǝn a sǝtti.’ ”
24.22: Pilikus nǝ dǝm niki timul ma'lǝɓa a tǝn shitu u, i' dlǝtlsi. I' usu, “In Lisiya mulkina a mbǝ u,” “An poci'kin shilǝni.”
24.23: Ibbǝl bal mul kǝndǝ'dlom bǝl zhil tǝl le Bulus, amma ibbǝltti mbul ki tǝza' yelǝnsi wasi sǝmɓǝ sǝ ngawi' wunnǝ ti lyamti u.
24.24: Kalkǝ lǝb mutti i Pilikiya mbǝnǝ kǝliwasi Dulisila, yakǝn Yahudiya. I' shin shin kǝn sǝ'mbǝlli' Bulus i' gakki' kǝm tǝn la'ti mbatl nǝ Almasihu Yesu wasu.
24.25: Nǝ Bulus ɗǝ dlǝb ulkǝ zoki, nǝ ngapti ga nǝ zǝ' ɓatltu nǝɗǝ bǝtu, I Pelikus kum ɓulti i' usu, “Nǝ guni apǝ i! Kǝn ma'zǝ'ga. In a mbi mbulu an ta'ki ki bi.”
24.26: Gaki ti la'ti mbadli ɗǝgon a Bulus bǝlti ulpi, i lakiɗa i' gob takinti biɗa ati shilǝn siti.
24.27: Kalki hown lob, Bolkiyes pestas nje Pilikus. Pilikus ne gaki ngau holhuwla ma' Yahudawa i'za' Bulus age' lukǝndǝn mbalǝn.

25.1: Nǝ Pestus mbǝ'ci ge' atlwasu, Kal ki mutti maki i' za' Kaisaliya illǝ Ulshelima,
25.2: Iki i bas lǝɓasi nǝ mi'kina ki Yahudawa is tǝla shilǝn ki Bulus ma'ti. Is bǝl Pestus bi
25.3: tǝ' ɗǝlsi, sǝm mbǝl Bulus a Ulshelima, amma is kǝndi tǝ gen hwun tǝn shitu gaki sǝ' tloti.
25.4: Amma i Pestus ndǝgi i' usu, “Bulus ki i dle Akaisaliya, ami nǝ gayini ami lyab lǝti tyaka ge' muttuni.
25.5: Hwe tǝ na mi'kina wakǝn mbǝ ne' kǝni, in a mbi mullisi nǝ lati asǝn giɓi u as mbǝl shilǝn wasi.”
25.6: Pestus a ngǝtl mutti usǝpsi ko kutl a tine'siwai, i lǝ Kaisaliya. Lucili i' totǝn kundǝn guntwasi, illaki sǝm mbǝl Bulus a kina ɗa'ka.
25.7: Nǝ Bulus tette' giɓi u, I Yahudwa ginǝ mbǝ te' Ulshelima i is gadǝl ti galgal. Asi mbǝtl shilǝn dimɓǝli tǝnti besni, gini sima bǝs Mani wai u.
25.8: I Bulus dlǝli gawasi: i' usu “Amiɓo a lew nǝ zhil ki Yahudawa wai ko libi ki Lya ko Kaisallwai.”
25.9: Pestus, ne gaki ngau hwol hwula ma' Yahudawa, i' ul Bulus su, kǝn ndǝ'ti ki'su Ulshelima sǝp pǝli shilǝn a kina ɗaka tǝn usi nǝsi zi'ki gawa?”
25.10: I Bulus usu: “Nǝgun u ki dlǝli ami ɗa abidla shilǝn ki Kaisal, a ge'lu unǝ mbuni tǝ pǝli shilǝn ɗa u. A pǝli Yahudawa ulǝn wai, ki gawagi ki mani nǝguɗa.
25.11: In lati asǝn gibi i u atala tlotu, ai, a kǝn dlali mǝshtwai. Amma in bal shilǝn nisi ɗa tǝn ulnǝ si ngauti tǝn kǝn u wai u, to mul bǝtl Yahudawa ami ɗawai. Ya ngayi tǝ mbǝl' shilǝn ini a kina ɗǝ Kaisal!”
25.12: Kalkǝ shilǝn ki Pestus ne' mi'dlǝdl shilǝn wasi, indǝgi i' usu, “To ka ngayi tǝ tala shilǝn wa' kina ɗǝ Kaisal. To ma' Kaisal kǝn ki'lǝ!” Bulus akina ki Agalipa nǝ Banis
25.13: Nǝ tlǝp mutti tenngulen u, i Guu Agaliba nǝ Banis is mbǝ Kaisaliya gaki sǝ' uli Pestus ɗem.
25.14: Is lǝm mutti tyaka diɓǝlu, iki i Pestus dlǝm shilǝn tǝn Bulus isǝ Guu. I' usu: “Mulǝn aki gunǝ Pelis za'ti ge'lu ki ndǝ mbalǝn.
25.15: Na lǝ Ulshelima u, i bas laɓasi nǝ kolsisi ki Yahudawa is mbǝl shilǝn tǝnti, is usu ta poci' shilǝn.
25.16: “Amne ya ulsisu Lomawa aku ɗǝ pǝlt guwai, tǝ'zi mul lati asǝn giɓi ɓatltwai, gaki tǝla' mulǝn ɗǝ hwol tugwai, sai nǝti nǝ mi'pǝlti nǝ shilǝn sa mbǝ sa makina ɗǝ pǝtl shilǝn, ammbi abmbun gawas tǝn shilǝn u nǝs mbǝli tǝntu.
25.17: Nǝs mbǝ kummwasǝn u, a dǝmbǝl shilǝni wai, citl ki lu ya totǝn kundǝn guntini ya bǝl zhil sǝm mbǝli mulisi.
25.18: Nǝ mi'ship shilǝn hilya u, a kum bezǝn shilǝn u nǝ a la'mbadli sǝn dlǝmti tǝn tuwai.
25.19: Sai hwu'shilǝn yen kǝn sǝ mbǝlli tǝnti tǝn bǝtl Lya wasǝn, nǝ mulǝn kise Yesu, gunǝ mǝcu, amma i Bulus dlǝl katl tǝn ta mǝcuwai.
25.20: Amine a hol kan unǝ ta bǝl gǝs ki shilǝn u ɗa u i: Ya usu ko tǝn suti Ulshelima gaki sǝ' pǝllit shilǝn swaka.
25.21: Amma i Bulus ngayi sǝ' dlǝl shilǝn wasi, i Augustas ya shilǝn nisi, iki ya bǝl zhil sǝ' idlati sai gasi u nǝ a taki Kaisal ti u.”
25.22: I Agilipa ul Pestus su, “Ami gayi ma ami lyap kup ulnǝ tǝ mulu dlǝmi u.” I Pestus usu Akyeu kǝn kubti.” Bulus akina ki Agilipa
25.23: Nǝ citl kǝlu Agilipa nǝ Balniki is mbǝ age' naltwasǝn ki gunti is te'ge' kǝs ki dlǝl shilǝn ne' mi'kina ki dlati nǝ bas mbalǝn kige' gatli. I Pestus, bǝlsi zhil sǝn mbǝl Bulus.
25.24: I Pestus usu, “Guu Agilipa, nǝ mus mbalǝn i nǝ ne' mini u, kǝn ɗǝ ye' muluwa gunǝ Yahudawa mbǝl shilǝn was a Ulshelima nǝ a ki a Kiasaliya, asi matltti ambuni tǝzati tǝ' dǝm tǝn diwai.
25.25: A yen ulnǝ' pǝli i a kǝmmǝsh tuwai, tun nǝ ti nǝ gawas kǝn tǝ ngauyi sǝ' palshilǝni akina ki Augustas, ya usu an takkitki tiswai.
25.26: Amma ulǝn niɗa gunǝ ta laci mul ban ini gawa suwai. Tǝn gaki nǝgu ambǝlti kina wakǝn ɗa, nǝ akina ɗa'ka Guu Agilipa, ko gaki kal ki gyepti an ammbi ulnǝ talaci u.
25.27: Tǝn yati ini, ndokkǝkkǝni tǝta' mul ki kǝndi bǝnǝ mbitti nǝ ulnǝ' pǝli uwai.”

26.1: Iki i Aglippa ul Bulus su, “A ndǝgi ki'shilǝni a'dlǝli gawagi.” I Bulus ta'toh lya I'gob shilǝn I'usu:
26.2: “A mbi zo' asǝn i Guu Aglippa, nǝ dǝmniki akina ɗa'ka ta dlǝli ta shilǝn asǝti u tǝn mus ship shilǝn u nǝ Yahudawa pǝli u,
26.3: Nǝ dǝm niki Ki mul ma' lǝɓani ge'dǝb ki Yahudawa u nǝ shilǝn wasǝn u. Ami ngepki ki' ga'ki kǝm nǝ ngaptibi.
26.4: “Mus mbalǝn ki Yahudawa sǝman dǝmtini a ɗǝ ya'ni, tun tlǝ tini age atlini, nǝ a Ulshelima.
26.5: Sǝman nǝni tun teɗe ǝn sǝn dlǝb ulnǝs mani tǝnkǝn u, Sǝmani ami mul bǝtl ɗalika mul ndǝl tuni ge' bǝtl Lya inǝn, a pǝlǝn dǝpkǝ mul palisa.
26.6: Nǝguni tǝn gaki la'tti mbadlǝ tǝn dlǝlliti u nǝ Lya pǝli mi'zǝ' mi'zǝm mini u i lakiɗa ami ki dlǝli tǝ pǝli shilǝn ɗa asǝti.
26.7: Guki dlǝlliti ki bi inǝn kutl nǝ lop ginǝ ɗǝ la'ti mbatl nǝ bǝtl Lya gasi nǝ dloncin si la'ti mbadli sǝ'en njikǝn twasi. Guu Aglippa, gaki la'ti mbaldlu Yahudwa ɗǝ pǝltǝn nǝ shilǝn ɗa.
26.8: Yalaki ɗa tǝn yenti wakǝn Lya kǝn ma'tlil mi'mǝshtwaiya?
26.9: “Teɗi ammi gayi ni ya yeni kǝnǝ mbunni tapǝl lǝɓa iye' ki kon nǝshin ki Yesu mul nazalat.
26.10: Nǝgu apǝli a Ulshelima. Tǝn ndǝ'ti ki bas lǝɓasi ala' mbalǝn mi'bǝtl Yesu kal dimbǝli age'lu kǝndǝ' mbalǝn, hal ɓal tlwassi u, ami pǝ' kal ki nǝgu.
26.11: Cin diɓǝli atle bǝtl lu dobga ki Yahudawa a ami pǝlissi ngashti, ami la'tisi sǝn nge Lya. Gaki kub dutugwasǝn, a ami bǝtlsi kali hal tyage' atlen a ami pǝli'si ngashti.
26.12: “Age' nǝguni, ami lǝ' Dimaskus nǝ ndǝ'ti ki bas lǝɓasi nǝ shinkǝn wasǝn.
26.13: Adlocin, Guu Aglippa, ami tǝn shitu nǝgu, yayen chilti sul lya, ngǝtl chin, nǝ chilti, ɗǝ chitl a malgǝn ini ne' elsǝni dutini.
26.14: Musi nǝn in nda atli, yakum yalon ɗǝ ussu nǝbi ki Alamai, ‘shaulu, shaulu, Yaki pǝlitǝn besǝn lǝɓaɗa? Bǝna ki ɗa katl nǝki nge tǝn u.’
26.15: “Ya usu ki okǝni, mul nalti?’ I mul ban usu. “Amiki Yesu, gunǝ ki pǝlitǝn ngashtu,’
26.16: Hilya ki' dlǝl tǝn Asǝn wagi. A mbǝn ma'ku ki'dǝm mul kyautǝn i ɗani, a' dlǝm ulnǝ' eni tǝnkǝn u ɗa, nǝ ulnǝ ta dlǝmi' a kina ki u.
26.17: An pekǝtl ki ɗǝge' mbalǝn wagi nǝ ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u, ginǝ tashin ki swa ma si u.
26.18: Gaki ki' ɓulisi dwaɗǝn, sǝppete ɗǝge' dǝmshal, as paltya' tǝn chilti, as pe'ɗǝge' gukki shedan as paltǝn guk ki Lya, nǝnǝgu nǝn pacisi besǝn laɓa wasǝn ɗa sǝn dǝm ne' mus nǝginǝ peshsi u, tǝn gaki sa la'mbatl nǝ ami i.’
26.19: “Gaki nǝgu, Guu Aglippa, a nge ndǝ'ti nǝ tlu'tu nǝ pe'sul lya uwai.
26.20: A Damascu a pisi shilǝn ki Lya pa, nǝ a Ulshelima nǝ mus alt ki Yahudiya, a pa ya pǝli mi'ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u, shilǝn ki Lya sǝ'za'pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓawasǝn sǝ' palte' ma' Lya aspǝl kyautǝn u nǝ mbo'totin patl te ma' Lya wasǝn u.
26.21: Gaki nǝgu Yahudawa goppǝn ɗa a ge'libi ki Lya is ngayi sǝ'tloɗa.
26.22: Amma i Lya ɗǝlǝni hal i mbǝl nǝguni; i laki ɗa ami dlǝmi' mbalǝn shilǝn ki Lya bazi nǝ mil a ami dlǝb ulnǝ bǝ a shoti nǝ mi'nje'shinkǝn ki Lya nǝ Musa dlǝmi nǝn ndatu.
26.23: Sǝ usu Almasihu nǝn tle' bǝna ti hilya ɗǝ ge'mi'mǝshti pa, atl dlǝmi Yahudawa cilti ki pe'ti nǝ ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u.”
26.24: Bulus age' shilǝn kǝn ngu, i Pestus tlǝl yali nǝ ndǝlti i ultisu! “Ki Bulus ga a gǝliki, “Pǝtl lashtiwa' eye u ɗǝ gǝlli'ga.”
26.25: Amma i Bulus usu. “Mulnalti Pestus,” Ga a gǝliwai, “Balini ami dlǝmti nǝ mbatl nǝm.
26.26: Guu Aglippa amma' shilǝn nǝki nǝ mbatl nǝm. A mani ka zi mus usi nǝ dwaɗǝ, pǝlin dli ki hwundǝliwai.
26.27: Guu Agilipa, ka ndǝ' ni nǝmi' nje shinkǝn ki Lyawa? Amani ka ndǝgi.”
26.28: I Agilipa ul Bulus su, “Kǝn ɗǝ yenti ge' yakǝn cin u kǝn la'tǝni adǝm Kilista ya?”
26.29: I Bulus usu, “Ko ge' yakǝn cin, koge' pya'si, ami shilǝn nǝ Lya bǝ ki nǝmwai nǝ mus ginǝ ɗǝ gakti kǝm asǝti u, sǝn dǝmti kǝnǝ ami, kidai bannǝ zhim domu.”
26.30: I Guu hilya, nǝ mul kina Pestus nǝ Balniki, nǝ ginǝ ki dǝmi ne'tu.
26.31: Kalkǝ za'ti kǝb swasǝn, is pal shilǝn ne'elsǝni, “Mulgu tapǝl ulnǝ tǝ mbalǝn tloti ko kǝndǝ'twai.
26.32: Agilipa ul Pestus su, “Tǝ gaki tǝ ɓewlǝn shilǝn u kina ma' Kaisal lwai u, a ndali tǝ za' mulu.”

27.1: Nǝ kǝndi ɗǝ hilya ɗǝ su' Italiya ge' kundǝlǝn ki malu, is ta' Bulus a toh ɗǝ bal mul kǝndǝ' dlom ne' na mi' ginǝ ge' kǝs kǝndǝ' mbalen u, mulshin Yuliyas, nǝm age' mi' kǝndǝ' dlom ki domga ki Agusta.
27.2: Nǝn te ge' kundǝlǝn te' Adalamatiya mul lyap su'ge' gatlen a malgǝn Asiya u, in gob lǝti, a Alistalkus mul Tasolonika won ki atl ki Makidoniya, tine' mi.
27.3: Nǝ lucilu in mbǝci a Sidom. Yuliyas ne ippǝli Bulus ulki zoki, is za'ti tǝs su ma yelǝnsi wasi gaki sǝ' ɗǝlti ɗa.
27.4: Nǝn tlǝ aki age' kundǝllǝn ki mallu gaki ki etǝl tlǝtl tetǝn kina inǝn, in gandǝl tu kal calgatl ki Kublus.
27.5: Nǝn peɗǝ ge bal mallu nǝ nja nǝ atl ki Kilikiya nǝki Bampiliya u, in mbǝ'ci Mila a ge' atl ki Likiya.
27.6: Bal mul kǝndǝ' dlom mbi kundǝlǝn ki Iskandaliya mul lǝ' ge' altki Italiya, illa'mi a giɓi.
27.7: In lǝm mutti ami lǝti' ten ten, nǝ ngeskǝn mǝ mbǝci nja nǝ Kinidas. Nǝ bǝ yetǝl a zamiwai u, in gandǝli akal calgatl ki Kalita nja nǝ Salmoni.
27.8: Nǝ nges kǝn mǝ ɓew nja nǝ bǝgasi in mbǝci ge' lu u nǝ ɗǝ mbeti hwu' ki zoki, nja nǝ gatlt ki Lisiya.
27.9: Nǝ dǝmniki lǝtisi a dlewtwai u, lǝti sima i' dǝm ulki ci' ɓanti, cinkǝ ngaptibima a ɓewyi, i Bulus dǝlisi kǝm,
27.10: I' ulsisu, “Ami yenti lǝtinǝn u nǝn dǝmti ulki ki ci' bulti, bǝ hwotl lǝɓa nǝ kundǝlǝn ki malu katlwai, nǝ dli inǝn ma.”
27.11: Amma bal mul ki ndǝ'dlom a ndǝ' nǝ ulnǝ Bulus dlǝmi u wai, tǝ gǝtli nǝ kub shilǝn ki mul kundǝlǝni nǝ mul dǝtl kundǝlǝn u.
27.12: Nǝ dǝm niki lu hwuntu a mbuni kundǝlǝn i' sǝ' ci watlǝn agimbi wai u, mbalǝn diɓǝli is mbǝl shilǝn sǝ'tlǝ ɗǝki, kowongi si ngashti bi mbǝci tya Ponokiya sǝ'dǝm tya ka. Age' lu hwu ki calgalt ki Kalita, gunǝ ɗǝya' bǝgasi ki alewa nǝ kudu u. Bundǝlǝn a dlǝlka
27.13: Nǝ yetǝlu gop hotti te'ɗi ten ten u, tǝn lati mbadl ki mbalǝnisi sambi ulnǝ si lyamti u i; is dǝl kundǝlǝn ki mali nǝ kali nǝ zhim dom is bǝli tya malgǝn calgalt ki Kalita nja nǝ bigasi.
27.14: Alǝm dǝmtwai, i bal etǝl tlǝtoh ge' calgatli gunǝ ɗǝ mbeti ki Yulokilidon.
27.15: Nǝ etǝl li' ku ndǝllǝn ki malisi u, hal taman nga'ti etǝli ndan wai, in zaki katl i etǝlli si go' jakǝnmi.
27.16: Nǝn bǝli kal yakǝn calgatlon u mulshin Kauda, lu unǝ etǝl bosɗa u, nǝngeskǝn mi dlǝl ya kǝn kundǝllǝni.
27.17: Is sul yakǝn kundǝllǝnni swa ge' bali u, si kupɓanti is kǝ'kǝndǝ zhim is gandǝl bal kundǝllǝni ɗa, gaki ɓa suge tisǝn ki bǝgasi ki Siltis mul sǝga' mus lǝɓa, iki is shit luluti ki tǝn kǝndǝlǝnnisikǝ tǝn gaki tǝ yetǝl jakǝn kundǝlǝni siɗa.
27.18: Gaki bundǝlǝn mul ndǝlti ɗǝ kundǝlǝnni eye', nǝ citlkǝlu i mi' ndǝtl kundǝllǝni gop utti kaya taka swage'mal.
27.19: Nǝ mutti maki nǝ toh wasan kǝn sǝdla' ul kyautǝn ki kundǝllǝni taka.
27.20: Mutti di ɓǝli mayen cin nǝ cadlǝllwai, sai bal yetǝlon kǝn ɗǝ li'ti mi, in pe'kǝl mbadl ki pe'ti.
27.21: Nǝ dǝm niki alǝm mutti ba ɗap ulki ɗami, i Bulus hilya gal adlom ɗa si i'usu: “Mbalǝn, tǝ'ka kumǝn shilǝn i u tǝn bǝ zakǝn calgatl ki Kalita wai u, da kǝ'kǝn ndati ge' ulkǝ ci' bultuwai nǝ hwol lǝɓa u wai.
27.22: Ammi ndǝllǝn mbadli, gaki nǝgu mullǝn gudǝl nǝm kǝn gǝtl age' kini wai, sai dai tǝ hwol ku ndǝlǝni.
27.23: Age' gaski hwuɗi mul shikǝn ki Lya shilǝn nǝ ami. Ami zheli ki Lya kǝni, ti ami pǝlitti bǝna. I' shin mul shinkǝ wassuɗi tǝm mbǝ makǝni.
27.24: I usu, ‘Bǝkum ɓantwai Bulus. Kǝn dlǝlti kina ɗǝ Kaisal, i ngu Lya a kumki ta ndǝgi mus yelǝnsi lǝtwagi sǝn pe'ti.’
27.25: Gaki nǝgu ndǝllǝn mbadlwakǝn, kini mbalǝn, a la' mbatl nǝ Lya tǝn ussu, kan u nǝs dlǝmi u, nǝgu tǝ pǝldli.
27.26: Amma nǝ ngeti etǝl nǝn la'timin tya tǝn bǝgasi.”
27.27: Age' gas ki mutti kutl nǝ upsi asi dǝtl mi age' dlǝlka ki Adaliya, abal gasi mi'dǝtl kundǝlǝni siyenti mǝ ɓal nja nǝ bǝgasi i.
27.28: Is cimbǝl lolu' ki mali is mbi asan kutl cen nǝm nǝ kutl lǝbi lop. Nǝn lǝ kina ten ngulen u is cimbǝli ɗaɗanu is mbi lolu tisi asan kutl lǝbi nǝtapsi.
27.29: Gaki kitǝli' li'ti zǝnga, is la' dom gudǝl upsi ki kal kundǝlǝni, is shilǝn nǝ Lya tǝ lu dlewti ɗǝ cilti.
27.30: Mi'dǝtl kundǝlǝni is ngau kitǝl ɗǝ ge' kundǝlǝni, hal sashi' yakǝn kundǝlǝn age' mali, gaki tǝ yen dli kǝnǝ sǝ shit dom ki bikina ki kundǝlǝni ni is za'si.
27.31: I Bulus ul bal mul kǝndǝ dlom ki Loma su nǝ mi'kǝndǝ dlom, in mbalǝn i adlǝl ge' kundǝlǝn uwai u, ka mbǝ'cini ki' pe' twai.”
27.32: I mi'kǝndǝ dlomi is ɓaɓatl zhim ki tǝn yakǝn kundǝlǝni is za' kundǝlǝni i mal kami.
27.33: Nǝ lu ɓal nja tǝ cilu. I Bulus ulsisu sǝn na'ɗam ulǝn, “A sǝti mutti kutl nǝ upsi ngu, aki dǝp ki ɓutti, bǝ ka ɗamǝn ulǝn wai.”
27.34: Gaki nǝgu ami shetl kini ki'ɗamini, gaki dliwakǝn, gaki nǝgu mulǝn gudǝl nǝm medlǝn ki gawakǝn kǝn gǝltwai.
27.35: Nǝtl dlǝmi nǝgu u, i' kan biledi i' shilǝn nǝ Lya akina wasan, i' chali it gop ɗamti.
27.36: Musswasǝn is kum ndǝlti, sima is ɗam ulki ɗami.
27.37: Musi nǝn age' kundǝlǝni mi kutl cen lop nǝ kutl lǝbi ningi nǝ mǝ'ka ni.
27.38: Nǝs ɗami nǝ kǝmsi u, is gop bosi' kundǝlǝni di ɓǝtl taka, is gop utti alkama swa ge' mali.
27.39: Nǝlucilu, saman atlu nǝsi lǝbi uwai, amma is yen luwon multisǝn is kǝndǝ shilǝn is ussu in mul pǝkkǝn u as tǝla kundǝlǝni atǝn tisǝni.
27.40: Is ɓaɓatl zhim domi taka is zaki age' mali, age' cini a si tǝngǝl ul jakkǝ kundǝlǝni, is tlǝl lulut ki tǝn kina ki kundǝlǝni tǝn kina yetǝl. Is nga bigasi tya.
27.41: Amma nǝm mbǝci gelu unǝ dlǝlka pǝl dandle u, is jakǝn kundǝlǝni i gami te'ge' tisǝn, hal kundǝlǝni taman utti nuwai i kal kundǝlǝni kan tatlti gaki tlitti ki bǝs ki mal.
27.42: Amma mi'kǝndǝ dlomi lyami sǝ'tlwa mi' ginǝ ge'lu kǝndǝ mbalǝn i, ɓas pe' ge' mali as kitǝli.
27.43: Amma nǝ bal mul kǝndǝ dlom ki Loma lyami tǝ pekǝl Bulus su, in nge. I' balsi zhil i' ulsisu mulnǝ man malu as ndaswa ge' malu as lǝ tǝn bigasi,
27.44: Gen ne is to'tǝn ancin ki kunɗǝlǝn genne tǝn use ki kundǝlǝnisi. Nǝnǝgu is mbǝci lau.

28.1: Kal ki ma pe'ti nǝn in kumi shin ki ɗani i ki Malta.
28.2: Mbalǝn ki lǝbi is pǝlimi ulkǝ zoki is njemi mus, is hwotimi utu gaki mal ɗǝ mbǝti a etǝtl kǝn ngu.
28.3: Bulus dwam ancin te'ɗi ti utti utu ngu, i uci won pe'toɗi nǝn kum utu i' gobpi Bulus toh.
28.4: Nǝ mbalǝn ki lǝbi yen uci a sǝnkǝli Bulus toh u, is ul elsǝnisu, “Mulu mul tlo' mbalǝn kǝni; ko nǝ' ta pe' ki bal malu, ngonǝnagu ngashtwas ɗǝ bǝtlti kali sai nǝ ta mǝci.”
28.5: Amma I Bulus dladla'toh wasi idldla'uci i swa utu amma ulǝn a mbitwai.
28.6: Mbalǝn ni ɗǝ yenti lǝbi nǝn kǝtti ko anda ammǝci, amma kalkǝ lǝb dǝmti nǝbǝ sa yen ulǝn a mbitwai u, is shilǝn ɗaɗanu is usu ti lya won kǝni.
28.7: Nja nǝ Lǝbi, lu ki mul kina ki ɗani i, mul shin Pubilus. Ti njemi a libi ɗakka, i' shimmi ge' nalti hal mutti maki.
28.8: Mulzǝ' Babiliyas tǝ ki muɗi atli ti gonti. I Bulus su mati, i' shilǝn nǝ Lya i' zi' toh ga i muli ndokki.
28.9: Nǝ nda nǝgu u, i mus ginǝ ɗǝ gonti kitǝn ɗa ni, is gop mbǝti asi mbi' ndo'ti.
28.10: Is nalmi tǝn shitu dimbǝli; nǝtǝn tlǝ ge' kundǝlǝn ki malu, is domimi mus ulnǝ mi lyamti u. Bulus Mbǝkǝci a Loma
28.11: Kal ki limaki in tlǝ ge' kundǝlǝn ki mali ki Iskandaliya, gunǝ ci watlǝn atǝn ɗani u. A pǝli' lwaɗi kǝnǝ ngugǝs ki lyayen.
28.12: Nǝm mbǝci silakusu in mu'maki alǝbi.
28.13: Nǝn za'lǝbǝ u in gandǝli mingu sai a Lhegium. Nǝm muɗu, i etǝl tlǝte'kudu Nǝ lucilu in mbǝ'ci a puteoli.
28.14: A kikǝn mǝma ne'elsǝni mi'bǝlti, is ngyemmi tǝn pǝl mutti ningi ne'si. Nǝnǝgu immbǝci Loma.
28.15: Nǝ elsǝni inǝn mi' bǝlti ki Lom kum mbǝtinǝn u, is mbǝ sǝ ullimi ɗem hal Age'lu dobga ki Abiyus, gu nǝ si mbetti ki maciya maki. Nǝ Bulus ma ne'mbalǝ ni u, i'gode Lya i ndǝtl mbiti.
28.16: Nǝn tye Loma u, i ndǝgi Bulus tǝ'dǝm tǝn gawasi nǝ mul kǝndǝ'dlom mul ɓuttiti u. Bulus ɗǝ Dlǝp Shilǝn ki Lya a Lom a ɗǝ Buttiti
28.17: Kalkǝ mutti maki, i Bulus taki bas mi' kina ki Yahudawa bi. Nǝs domga u, I Bulus ulsisu: “Yelsǝni ini, ko nǝbǝ aleu wi mbalǝn inǝn mbadlwai u, ko pǝtl gokkǝ mi'zǝ'mini, ngonǝ nǝgu is goppǝni a Ulshelima is bǝl ami ki kǝndi a toh ɗǝ Lomawa.
28.18: Nǝs ngyemǝn u si' lyamti sǝ za kǝni, gaki a pǝl bezǝn ulnǝ tǝla tlotu wai.
28.19: Nǝ Yahudawa nge' ndǝtu, i dǝmi hwel ta tǝla shilǝn u a kina ɗǝ Kaisal. Gaki mbalǝn i kǝn ta tǝla shilǝni ɗawai.
28.20: I laki ya lyam shilǝn ne ki ɗa, gaki zǝ' mbatl ki Isla ilawa i ami ki ki kǝndi nǝ zhim dom ɗa.”
28.21: Is ndǝgiti, “Miɓo ma mbi lwabbaton ma' Yahudawa gawagwai, mulǝn a mbǝl shilǝn wa' gi ge elsǝni inǝn wai, ko idlǝm besǝn shilǝn won tǝn kwai.
28.22: Amma mi lyamti tǝn kum shilǝn a bi wagi, mǝ mani mbalǝn hu a una si dlǝb bezǝn shilǝn tǝn pyal kushti kǝlagatu.”
28.23: Nǝs zǝ cin ki ma' ne' Bulus, sǝ' en Bulus age' cin u nǝs dlǝlli u, Is mbǝ nǝ mbalǝn diɓǝli age' lu unǝ tiɗa nǝ dǝmtu. I' pallisi shilǝn daga nǝ kyau hal a su'ti, ati dlǝmissi shilǝn atǝn gu' ki Lya, ati lyap shetlsi tǝ ndǝlsi te' ma' Yesu tǝn shitu zhil ki Musa nǝ lwabat ki mi'nje' shin kǝn ki Lya.
28.24: Gen is ndǝ nǝ shilǝn wasi gen ne is nge'ndǝtti.
28.25: Nǝs nge ndǝtti nǝ elsǝni ɗaɗɗasi u, nǝs ɓalkǝ sǝ'za' lǝbi u i Bulus dlǝmisi shilǝn nǝm i'usu, “Ase yal ki mbatl ki Lya a dlǝm bali, nǝ' dlǝmi mi'zǝ'mi zǝ'kini tu'bi ɗǝ Ishaya mul nje'shinkǝn ki Lya ɗǝ usu,
28.26: “ ‘Lǝma' mbalǝn i ki' usu, “Kǝn kumtini amma kǝkǝn mantini wai; kǝn yentini amma kǝkǝn mantini wai.”
28.27: Gaki mbatl ki mbalǝn i a ndǝndǝli, sa cak kǝmwa sǝn i sa idla dwaɗǝn wasǝn i. Gaki ɓas yeni nǝ dwaɗǝn wasǝn as kumi nǝ kǝmmwasǝn. Gaki sǝp mani nǝ' mbadlwasǝn as palte' makǝni a ndokǝlsi.”
28.28: “To manin ca, Lya shinkǝn ki pekǝtl mbalǝn, hal ginǝ bǝ Yahudawa wai u, sikuma sǝn ga'ti kǝm!”
28.29: (Nǝdlǝmi nǝgu u, i Yahuawa hilya is gob shotibi ne' elsǝni.)
28.30: Hal hwon lop a Bulus ki dǝmi age' libi ki ɓatlti, ti nje'mus ginǝ mbǝ ma'ti sǝ' entu.
28.31: A ti dlǝb shilǝn ki te' ge' gugkǝ Lya ati kulci' mbǝlǝn lǝɓa ki mulban Yesu Almasihu nǝ ndǝtl ki mbadli bǝnǝ ɓultwai!

1.1: Tuˈmaˈ Yakubu, zheli ki Lya, nǝ mulban Yesu Almasihu, swamak gǝs kǝ kutl nǝ lopi ginǝ dlaˈga tǝn dǝp lǝɓa u. shinniˈ mulnalti. Laˈti mbadli nǝ Shindǝtl ga
1.2: Yelsǝni ini, ǝn undiˈ bǝna kǝ shoti a mbi kini u aˈ pǝllin hwol tugi,
1.3: Kǝ manini cimbitl laˈti mbadlwakǝn u, nǝn ɗǝ zǝˈ ngashtibi.
1.4: Ikǝ ngashtibi nǝn njikǝˈ kyautǝn wasi, nǝn laˈti aˈ dǝm mul nalti nǝ ngaptiga, i laˈti bǝ kǝkǝn hwotl ullǝn wai.
1.5: In gonwakǝn a hwol maˈulǝn u, an ngyem Lya, mul bǝlti nǝ toh kǝ zoki , bǝnǝ laˈti biwai, Lya nǝn bǝtlti.
1.6: Amma an gyemi nǝ laˈti mbadli, bǝnǝ cetl mbadlwai, gaki mul cetl mbadli kǝnǝ lakumi kǝgeˈ balmal kǝn siɗa, ginǝ etǝl ɗǝ katti u, a ɗǝ jakǝnti
1.7: Bǝ undi mulu laˈmbadli tǝn mbiˈ ulǝn ama mulban wai.
1.8: Gaki timul mbatl lob kǝni, tiɗa zǝm mbatlwas nǝmmwai ageˈ lu mus kyautǝn waswai. Ulkǝtoh nǝ Bǝna
1.9: Mul shindǝtl ga tǝppǝ ɓulmǝn nǝ nal twasi.
1.10: mul usǝn tǝmpǝtl ɓulmǝn nǝshindǝtl gawasi, ama tǝm paˈti kǝnǝ buzhame.
1.11: In cin a celga nǝ mattwasu, me nǝn kokǝnti, a buzhewas lwaki a mbuntwas gǝli. nǝgu tǝmul usǝn gǝli geˈ dlom kǝ tǝleti nǝ palliti wasi. Bǝna nǝ Cibǝlti
1.12: Albalka tǝn mul ngacciˈ cimbǝtl bi, inta ngash bi geˈ cimbǝltu, tǝn mbiˈ ul kǝndǝ ga kǝ Gu kǝ mbidli, gunǝ mulban pǝli miˈ lyapti ndǝtu.
1.13: In ka mbi cimbil tu, bǝˈ usu “Lya kǝn ɗǝ cimbitl ki wai.” Gaki Lya ɗa cimbitl mulǝn nǝ bezǝn lǝɓa wai, kǝn pǝti a cimbǝlǝn Lya nǝ bezǝn wai;
1.14: Amma in mulǝn ambi gawas geˈ cimbiltu lawaskǝn shelti, a tle gawasi.
1.15: Bezǝn lyap lǝɓa in apǝl tugu, nǝnzǝˈ byas lǝɓa. in byas lǝɓa analu nǝn mbǝtl mǝshti.
1.16: Bǝs gǝl kini waica, mil yelsǝni ini mudli nǝ mwani.
1.17: Mus mbuni bǝlti ki njǝˈni, sul lya kǝn ɗǝ peˈti, mul mbǝˈsum maˈ Mulban kǝ cilti, gunǝ bǝ ɗa shottwai u kǝnǝ gwasǝn mul shaˈti.
1.18: Iˈ oli tǝp bǝlǝn min zǝti tuˈma shilǝn ki bali, gaki tǝn dǝmni kǝnǝ nyoh ki kina kǝ mus halitta wasi Kub Shilǝn nǝ pǝlti
1.19: Mil yelsǝni ini mudli nǝ mwani, manǝngu: dleuwonkin ɗǝ gaˈti kǝm, bǝ dlewon kin ɗǝ shilǝn ko ɗǝ leutl mbadli wai,
1.20: gaki leukǝ mbatl ki yakǝn mbalǝn ɗa talaˈti ɗǝ pǝtl kyautǝn ki zoki ki Lya wai.
1.21: Gaki nǝgu, aˈ lakǝn mus kyautǝn ki bezǝn lǝɓa taka nǝ ngyem mbiti ki mbalǝn, shilǝn u nǝ dlilli geˈ mbadlwakǝn u, ndǝˈni nǝ nali geˈ shindǝtl ga, gaki tinǝ ndǝtl kǝ pekkǝtl dliwakǝn.
1.22: Dǝmni miˈ petl shilǝni, bǝmiˈ kumti katlwai, aki shatl gawakǝn wai.
1.23: gaki mus mulnǝ mul kup shilǝni katlu, bǝ mul pǝltiwai u, kǝnǝ mul nǝ ɗǝ yak kinawas age' boka u ni.
1.24: gaki tǝn yak kinawasi azzǝga, alǝbi alǝbi am musni nǝ tetwasi.
1.25: Amma mus mul nǝ ɗǝ yaˈ njikǝˈkǝ zhil ki mbiˈ ga u, inngash bi tǝnki u, tadǝm mul kumtikatl ammus niwai, addǝm mul pǝlti nǝ ɓotlti, gu sǝppǝliˈ albalka ageˈulnǝ ti pǝlti u.
1.26: In mulǝn ɗǝ patl gawasi ti mul bǝtl Lya kǝn u, amma bǝ ta ngab biwaswai u, iki bǝtl Lya wasu bali wai.
1.27: Bǝtl Lya ki zoki gunǝ bǝ bezǝn ulǝn ɗa giɓi wai u, akina ɗǝ Lya bwasinǝnˈ, iki kizi gulsi mudli, nǝˈ milu nǝ bǝ miˈ zǝssi ɗawai u, dwaɗǝn geˈ bǝna wasǝn u, aˈ pekkǝl gawaˈtaka ɗǝgeˈ bezǝn lǝɓa ki dǝp lǝɓa.

2.1: Yelsǝni ini mudli nǝ mwani, miˈ laˈti mbatl tǝn Yesu Almasihu mul nalti, bǝˈ shimǝn otl elsǝni geˈ mbadlwakǝn wai.
2.2: In mul ulkǝ shimi toh kǝ zinaliya nǝ luˈ lǝgǝl kǝ zokki a mbǝ geˈlu dobga wakǝn u, i mul nǝ bǝ ulǝn nidɗawai u a teteˈ kǝ dlili nǝ keci luˈlǝgǝlu.
2.3: In ka ngǝtlin nǝ natl mul laˈti zoˈ luˈlǝgǝlu, iˈ ulǝn tisu, “Kundǝn kǝngu kǝ zoki gawagi,” Amma iˈ ulǝn mul nǝ bǝ ulǝn nidɗawai usu, “dlil tyaka” ko “kuma dǝm atli a kina ɗaka,”
2.4: Ase bǝ otl elsǝni geˈ dlomwa kǝn nǝ dambǝtl kǝ ngashti ageˈ dlomwakǝn wai wa?
2.5: Kumini yelsǝni ini mudli nǝ mwani: Ase, Lya wolǝn miˈ lǝshi ulǝn kǝ dǝp lǝɓa sǝddǝm miˈ usǝn geˈ laˈti mbadlwaiya? si kǝ miˈ mbiˈ guˈ kǝ Lya nǝ pǝl dlǝlti tǝn ginǝ ɗǝ lyapti uwai ya?
2.6: Amma ki mbǝtl miˈgini bǝ ulǝn nisi ɗawai u. Ase, miˈusǝni ɗǝ mbitl kini waiwa? siɗǝ dǝtl kin twakina ɗǝ miˈpǝtl shilǝn waiwa?
2.7: Si ɗǝ dlǝb shilǝn kǝ kabbi tǝn shin mul naltu nǝ ɗǝ mbekkin nǝ nali uwai wa?
2.8: In ka shindǝlǝn ga tǝn kushti kǝ guˈ kǝ Lya u gunǝ geˈ shilǝn kǝ Lya kǝ laci u ɗǝ ussu, “lyam else dǝm twagi kǝnǝ gawagi,” ka pǝlin kǝ zokki i.
2.9: Amma in ka pǝlǝn lyab ga geˈ dlomwakǝn u, ka pǝlǝn bezǝn lǝɓa u ngu, tǝn kushti kǝ Musa ka dǝmni miˈ cetl zhili.
2.10: Amma mus mul nǝ ɗǝ katliˈ zhil kǝ Musa u, amma it cel gudǝl nǝmu, to mus ta cel zhilu ɓalu.
2.11: To ti u nǝˈ usu, “Bǝ pǝl kontwai u” Ti usu ɗaɗa nu, “Bǝ tlo mbalǝn wai.” To, in kapǝl kontwai u, amma iˈ tlo mbalǝn u, to, ka dǝm mul cetl zhilu ɓalu.
2.12: Gaki nǝgu, shilǝn wakǝn nǝ kyautǝn wakǝn tǝ dǝm kǝ miˈ ginǝ nǝn pǝlissi shilǝn kǝ zhil kǝ mbiˈ ga.
2.13: Amma gas pǝtl shilǝn Lya kǝn zǝˈ gontwai maˈmulnǝ bǝ ɗa zǝˈ gontwai u. Amma zǝˈ gonti nǝn ɗǝ tleˈ ga kǝ zǝˈ ɓatlti. Laˈti mbadli Bǝ nǝ Kyautǝn kǝn wai u Use Kǝni
2.14: Kini yelsǝni ini, ya kǝ mbuntwasi tǝ yakǝn mbalǝn usu laˈti mbatl nidɗa, bǝ kyautǝn was ɗawai u? anya, laˈti mbadlwasu nǝn pekkǝtl ti wa?
2.15: Cibǝlti, in yelsǝni mudli ko mwani, si dǝmti bǝ lulut nisi ɗawai u, hu anǝmi bǝ ulkǝ ɗami ɗa kǝpsiwai.
2.16: In gon wakǝn a ulsisu,“To, mbǝkǝcin swaca, tǝ Lya bǝlkin ulkǝ ɗami nǝ ulkǝ tle, nǝ ulkǝ laki” Bǝka bǝlǝnsi ulǝnwai u, mbuntwas nuna?
2.17: Nǝgu ɗa laˈti mbadli nǝm nǝ gwasi, bǝnǝ kyautǝn waswai u mǝcini.
2.18: Amma mulǝn nǝn ussu“ ai, kiɓo laˈti mbatl niˈ ɗa, ami ne ɓo sai kyautǝn.” To, mboki toh tǝn laˈti mbadlwagu, bǝ nǝ kyautǝn wai u, ami ne a mbokiˈ toh tǝn kyautǝn, yenti kǝ dwaɗǝn kǝ laˈti mbadli.
2.19: Ka ndǝgi Lya ɓo nǝm kǝma? A mbuni! to miˈgatl ma sa laˈmbatl nǝti i, amma hal si nepti kǝ dli nǝ ɓanti.
2.20: Ki mul lǝshi maˈ ulǝn! ko kǝnɗǝ lyamti hal nǝguni kiˈmani laˈti mbadli bǝ nǝ kyautǝn kǝn wai u, use kǝma?
2.21: Cin u nǝ bwasi nǝn Ablahim taˈ yakuwas Ishiyaku tǝn lu kyetl ulnǝ ɗǝ mbilliˈ Lya u, ashe gaki kyautǝn waskǝn manti ti mul zoˈ mbatl kǝn waiya?
2.22: Ka yeni laˈti mbadlwas ɗǝ lǝˈ neˈ kyautǝn wasi, kuma laˈti mbadwas a njikǝn tuˈ maˈ kyautǝn wasi.
2.23: I njikǝn shilǝn kǝ Lya nǝ usu,“Iblahim a laˈmbatl nǝ Lya i, laˈti mbadlwasu i ɓildli mbatl kǝ zokini maˈti,” I mbekki yelǝn ki Lya.
2.24: To ka yenini, Lya ɗǝ pekkǝtl yakǝn mbalǝn gaki kyautǝn wasi, bǝ gaki laˈti mbadlwas nǝmwai.
2.25: Gaki nǝgu Lahab mul pǝn neˈ mwani mbi peˈti gaki kyautǝn wa swaya? nǝn nje miˈshinkǝn i u, ippekkǝlsi tuˈtǝn shitu won.
2.26: Kǝnǝ kan unǝ dli ɗa bǝ lu shuˈti nidɗa wai u hwunini, nǝguma laˈti mbadli bǝnǝ kyautǝn wai u hwunini.

3.1: Kini yelsǝni ini, bǝ dǝmni kumwakǝn miˈkulciˈ mbalǝn wai, gaki manti wakǝn kǝni, mi miˈkulciˈ mbalǝn nǝn pǝlimmi shilǝn nǝ bǝna iye.
3.2: Gaki musinǝn mini miˈlwetini diɓǝli, in yakǝn mbalǝn ɗa dlǝb use geˈ shilǝn wa swai u, to muli kǝ njǝˈni tiɗa, tǝn maˈngapti mus kutlakǝn ki dli wasi.
3.3: Cibǝlti ngu, in a shimi bǝs ul kǝndǝ bi u gaki tǝˈ kumimi bi ɗani, nǝnǝgu mǝn maˈbǝlti nǝti mus lu u nǝmi lyamti u.
3.4: Nǝ yanǝn kundǝlǝn kǝ mal, ko nǝ si bazi u ndǝtl kǝ yetǝl ɗǝ jakǝˈsi, mus nǝnǝgu nǝ yakǝn domkǝn mul dǝlti ɗǝ gandǝtl ti mus lu u nǝ tin ngaki ɗa u.
3.5: Nǝ gu lǝga ma ɗa, tigu yakǝn ulǝn kǝni, sai bas laˈtibi! yanǝn kan unǝ yakǝn masɗi ɗǝ lakik bal dǝlgǝn utu u.
3.6: Lǝga ma utu ca! Ageˈ mus ku tlakǝn kǝ dli inǝn, lǝga tikǝ gǝskǝ bezǝn lǝɓa ti kon nǝ mus dli, mul hotti mbadli atliti, tine libi kǝ utu ɗǝ hottiti.
3.7: Yakǝn mbalǝn nǝn maˈ tlegga kǝ mus lǝɓa kǝ dǝlgǝn nǝkǝ ban, nǝkǝ geˈ mali nǝ yadli nǝ miˈ dǝtl tugi.
3.8: Amma yakǝn mbalǝn kǝn maˈ tlegga ki lǝga wai, ngashti ni gunǝ bǝkǝn maˈ dlǝtl ti wai u, kǝ njiˈni ɗa nǝ igǝn kǝ tloti.
3.9: Nǝ nali mi natl mul ban nǝ bwasi nǝn, nǝ nali mi byatl mbalǝn ginǝ pǝlsi geˈ teˈkǝ Lya u.
3.10: Nǝ bi nǝm kǝn ɗǝ natlti, nǝ byalti ɗaɗanu, yelsini ini, ai, gu a mbunwai!
3.11: Ko shu mal nǝm nǝn maˈ bǝtl mal mul tǝmtǝ, nǝ mal mul kukkudu ya?
3.12: Mil yelsini ini, pǝkkǝ ka nǝm maˈ utti mil kǝ zaitu ya? ko pǝkkǝ innabi nǝm maˈ zǝm mil kǝ ka ya? Tuˈ nǝgu shu mal mul bǝtl mal kǝ kukkudu kǝn bǝtl mal tǝmiwai. manti kǝ bali
3.13: Mul manti nuna nǝ mul kal lǝɓa laplap a geˈ kini? An mboˈ tohtǝnki tuma zoˈdǝm twasi, nǝ kyautǝn kǝ zoki gunǝ ti pǝlti nǝ shindǝtl ga gunǝ ɗǝ peˈti geˈ ma' ulǝn u.
3.14: Amma in bezǝn nget mbalǝn nikin ɗa nǝ lyap ga u ageˈ mbadlwakǝn u, bǝˈpǝn ɓulmǝn nǝ nǝ guwai, aki nget baliwai.
3.15: Undi manti gu sul lya kǝn ɗǝ ndassuɗwai kǝ dǝp lǝɓani, kǝ lyap mbatl kǝni kǝ sheɗan.
3.16: mus geˈlu unǝ nget ɗa nǝ lyap ga u, alǝbi dlati nǝ mus bezǝn lǝɓa ma ɗa.
3.17: Amma manti kǝ sul lya u, kǝ kina kǝ zokini, mul shindǝtl ga kǝni, mul natl kǝ ga kǝn wai, mul zoˈ mbadli, mul lyap dǝb kǝ zoki, alhelini, mul zoˈ mbadli mul bi nǝm, mul pǝtl bali, mul nǝ bǝ ɗa wotl mbalǝn wai u.
3.18: Undi mutti kǝ mbadli gunǝ u miˈ bwasti dlati ɗǝ watlti u, i mbǝtl zoˈ mbadli.

4.1: Yakǝn ɗǝ mbǝtl ngeˈ elsǝni nǝ dlati a geˈ dlomwakǝn? ase, bǝ lyap lǝɓa hukkǝn ɗǝ latikin ɗǝ dlan nǝ yelsǝni ambadwakǝn wai ya?
4.2: Kǝn lyap lǝɓa aˈ hwolini, aˈtlo mbalǝn. kǝn lyap lǝɓa, bǝ kǝkkǝn mbitini wai, aˈ tlilǝn dlati. Ki hwoltini gaki ki ɗa shilǝn nǝ Lya wai kǝni.
4.3: Kǝn shilǝnti nǝ Lya aˈ hwolini, gaki ki nǝ bezǝn mbatl kǝn ki pǝlini, gaki ki konni nǝ nali tǝn kup tǝp kǝ gawakǝn.
4.4: Kini miˈ lǝshi zoˈmbadli! Ki manini yelǝn nǝ dǝp lǝɓa ngel Lya kǝn waiya? gaki nǝgu, mus mulnǝ ɗǝ lyap pǝtl yelǝn nǝ dǝp lǝɓa u, ta pal gawas mul ngel lya u ngu.
4.5: Kin nǝ yentini tǝn swi kǝn shilǝn kǝ Lya usu, “Yal kǝ mbatl kǝ Lya gunǝ Lya shimi geˈ mini u nǝn ɗǝ mbuttimi iye ya?
4.6: Amma ti bǝtl min alheli diɓǝli. I laki ɗa shilǝn kǝ Lya usu: “Lya ɗǝ ngeˈmiˈnatl kǝ ga, amma ti pǝliˈmiˈshindǝtl ga alheli.”
4.7: Gaki nǝgu takkǝn gawakǝn maˈLya, aˈnge lǝɓa kǝ shedan, ti kuma tǝn kitǝlliˈkini.
4.8: Shaˈni maˈLya tima tǝn shaˈti makini. Dǝmni nǝ mbatl kǝ zokki, kini miˈbezǝn mbadli, wokǝlǝn mbadlwakǝn taka, kini miˈmbatl lop.
4.9: Pǝlǝn du mbadli, kulni, pǝlǝn lu. hwe tǝ getltwakǝn pal kulu, hwol tuggwakǝn tǝpal du mbadli.
4.10: Shindǝlǝn gawakǝn maˈmulban, tima tǝn natl kini. Bǝˈzi yelse kapbi wai
4.11: Kini mil yesǝni ini, bǝˈbyalǝn yelsǝni wai. Gaki ko wokǝn byal yelse wasi mul bǝlti, ko mul nǝ a zi yelse was kapbi u, ta byal pǝtl shilǝn u ɓalu, ta ziˈkapbi u ngu. In ka zi pǝtl shilǝn kapbi u, ki mul bitl tiwai, ki mul zitti kapbi ni.
4.12: Mul bǝtl shilǝn nǝm kǝni, tikǝ mul pǝtl ti, tikǝ mul ndǝltl kǝ pekkǝlti nǝ mǝcǝlti. to, kikǝ wongi kiˈzi yelke waˈkapbi? Bǝˈpǝl laˈti bi gaki kyau wai
4.13: Gakǝn kǝm, kini u nǝ ɗǝ usu,“Asǝti ko akyau mǝn lǝti geˈgatl gwaˈ, an pǝl hwon tyaka, ami ulti nǝ ulti taka am mbi ulpi.”
4.14: I ngu kǝ manǝn ulnǝ tǝ nda kyau uwai. Undǝ dli ukǝn nikini? ai, kǝnǝ wolkǝndǝ ɗa, alǝm dǝmtu nǝn gǝlti.
4.15: Mbun ni kǝ ulnisu,“ In Lya a ndǝgu, in mi geˈmiˈdli u, mǝn pǝtl gu nǝ gu.”
4.16: Amma i ngu, nǝguni ki laˈtibi nǝ dun ngesi. Undǝ laˈtibi gu bezǝn ulǝn kǝnǝ.
4.17: Gaki nǝgu, mus mulnǝ a man zoˈlǝɓa u, in nge pǝlti u, ta pǝl bezǝn lǝɓa u ngu.

5.1: To kumini kini miˈ usǝn! Kulni nǝ laˈti yali gaki bǝna u nǝtǝ mbǝtǝn kini u.
5.2: Usǝn wakǝn mus ɓosini, luˈlǝgǝllwakǝn mus shisshil a ɗam i.
5.3: Zinaliya nǝ azulpa wakǝn sa koni, kontwasǝn u nǝn dǝmti yenti kǝ dwaɗǝn tǝn kini, kǝn ɗap tlu kǝ dli ɗakini kǝnǝ utu. Ka domi gawakǝn usǝn i ageˈ paˈti kǝ ndallǝɓa i.
5.4: Yanini! upkǝ miˈkyautǝn u nǝˈ nge ɓatl tisi u si kulu maˈ Lya. Kulu kǝ miˈ otlikin lǝɓa taka a mbǝkǝci kǝm ɗǝˈ “Lya mul nalti i.
5.5: Ka pǝlǝn dǝp lǝɓa i geˈ tǝmti, ki ɗamti nǝ tleti nǝ kon nǝ lǝɓa. To, ka katlǝn gawakǝn i gaki cin kǝ poshti.
5.6: Ka poci mul zoˈmbatl ɓatlti, kuma tloti, bǝ ta lwe mbatl nǝ kini wai. Ngashti bi ageˈ Bǝna
5.7: Gaki nǝgu mil yelsǝni, ngacem bi, hal gas patl kǝ mulban. Yanǝn kan unǝ mul kotl lu ɗǝ ngashti bi ɗǝ ɓutti cin unǝ tǝ guwas bǝl gwe kǝ zoki u.Nǝ ngashti bi iye ti ɓutti mal kǝ otlti o nǝ mal kǝ gisi.
5.8: Aˈdǝmni nǝ ngashti bi. Aˈ dlǝllǝn mbadlwakǝn, gaki mbǝˈ kǝ mulban ɓal nja i.
5.9: Yelsǝni bǝ nalǝn ni tǝn yelsǝni wai, gaki ɓa zikin ɓatlti, i ngu mul pǝtl shilǝn ɓaltǝn bidlabi i!
5.10: Tǝn cimbǝlti nǝ ngashtibi geˈ bǝna, yelsǝni, yanǝn miˈnjeˈshinkǝn ki Lya ma nǝs shilǝn nǝ shin kǝ mulban u.
5.11: I ngu, mǝnɗǝ ndwaˈti ginǝ ngashbi i, ka kumǝn un ndi ngashtibi unǝ Ayuba pǝli u, ka yenǝn un ndi paˈti bisi u nǝ “Lya kǝ njiˈni, nǝ kup ciˈgonti, mul zǝˈgonti.
5.12: Amma tǝn ko yan ngi, yelsǝni, bǝˈ lenceniwai, ko nǝ lya, ko nǝ atli, ko mus undi lenceti ukǝni. Ənka ulnisu “E u,” A dǝm tǝn “E” katl, ǝn ka ulnisu “Oˈ o”, A dliltǝn “Oˈ o” i katl, gaki in nǝgu wai u nǝn zikin ɓatlti.
5.13: Ən gon wakǝn ɗǝ tleˈ bǝna u, to, aˈ shilǝn nǝ “Lya, ǝn gon wakǝn ɗǝ kup hwol tuga? To, aˈul wul kǝ dwati “Lya.
5.14: Ko gon wakǝn nǝn ɗǝ gonti? To, am mbe kolsi kǝ Ikilisiya bi as ngemiˈ “Lya, asi swatitti mil nǝ shin kǝ mul ban.
5.15: Ngep Lya ki laˈti mbadli, nǝn ndokǝtl mul gonti Lya nǝn tlilti lya, in ma tapǝl bezǝn lǝɓa u, nǝn pecitti.
5.16: Gaki nǝgu, aˈgopǝn dlimiˈ yelsǝni bezǝn lǝɓa wakǝn, a ki ngemi yelkǝni Lya, gaki kiˈ mbi doˈti ɗa. Shilǝn nǝ Lya kǝ mul zoˈmbadli kyautǝnwas ndǝlni iye.
5.17: Iliya yakǝn mbalǝn kǝni kǝnǝ mini, amma nǝˈ gob ngep Lya u gaki bǝ mal mbǝwai u, sai nǝpǝl hwon maki nǝ li mǝkka bǝ mal a mbǝ geˈ atliwai.
5.18: Kal ki nǝgu nǝn ngem Lya ɗaɗanu u, i mal mbǝ sul lya, atl ne ibbǝl gwei lǝɓa wasi.
5.19: Yelsǝni ini, in gon wakǝn a zaˈshitu kǝ Lya u, a gon wakǝn palti teˈtǝn shitu.
5.20: Am maninca mus mulnǝ a pal mul pǝtl bezǝn lǝɓa teˈtǝn shitu u ta pekkǝl mul bezǝn lǝɓa i ɗǝgeˈ mǝshti, gu nǝn dǝmti shitu kǝ peshti lipǝn diɓǝli.
